name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Fox News just admitted:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[I really wish I didn't have to ask you for money \-- but our situation is absolutely dire. Three news reports have revealed my Democrats' House Majority is in critical danger. I know I don't normally send you emails this long -- and I know you already have so much on your plate -- but I'd be so grateful if you could read my entire message and then rush $3 to help me STOP Republicans from taking our Majority. I'm calling for 2,000 gifts before midnight to keep Republicans from EVER holding power in Congress again >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZPe-4B-)**

* * *
**
WASHINGTON POST: REPUBLICANS ARE OUTRAISING DEMOCRATS**
I cannot overstate the severity of this situation.

\-- Trump has hinted he'll run for President if Republicans **DESTROY** our Majority.
\-- And Republicans have **MILLIONS** in their war chest to do it.

This is the most important ask I have ever made of you:

****[We could LOSE our chance to protect our Majority and beat back Republican attacks to destroy us if we fail to outraise Republicans and close my budget gap before midnight. I'm calling for 2,000 gifts to close the gap. Will you rush $3 to defend my House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)****

* * *
**
NEW YORK TIMES: REPUBLICANS GAIN HEAVY HOUSE EDGE **
I'm completely speechless.

\-- Republicans have added **FIVE** seats to their list of expected wins.
\-- And they only need to flip **FIVE** seats to take our Majority.

I mean every word I'm about to say:

****[I will not allow Republicans to swoop in, retake our Majority, and destroy all of the progress we've made. I've watched them build momentum off of Donald Trump's lies to the American people. But I will NOT allow them to use those lies to regain power. I'm calling for TREMENDOUS backlash -- 2,000 Democratic gifts before midnight -- to PROTECT our House Majority. Will you rush $3 to elect House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBeYZ-)****

* * *
**
FOX NEWS: REPUBLICANS LAUNCH ATTACK TO RETAKE HOUSE**
I need you to understand the position I'm in right now:

\-- Republicans have launched attacks to unseat **70** of my Democrats.
\-- Their filthy attacks are working: They just took a shocking **LEAD** in the polls.

I need you to read this very closely:

****[We cannot let Republicans regain power by blanketing the airwaves with attacks on my Democrats. I need to ensure every voter knows the TRUTH about my Democrats. That's why I'm calling for 2,000 gifts before midnight. Will you rush $3 to save our critical Democratic House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)****

* * *
**
We are at a crossroads.**

We can either let Republicans outraise us by millions, take our Majority, and destroy all of our progress...

Or, we can UNITE, build an UNPRECEDENTED grassroots movement, and STOP Republicans from ever holding power again.

I'll be completely blunt with you: Republicans are on the verge of pushing their lead out of our reach.

**[I KNOW we can thwart their dangerous attempts to regain the Majority -- but it'll take grassroots Democrats like you stepping up before midnight. I'd be more grateful for your $3 in this moment than you can possibly imagine. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3L7RgB-)

Thank you,

Nancy

name: Mckayla 2022
subject: Take our End of Year Survey >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, It’s been nearly a year since this campaign launched, and we’ve been overwhelmed by the support we’ve had. We say it often, but it really does mean the world to us. **We know Mckayla’s life experiences make hers a really important voice in our politics.** Over the years, we’ve seen nothing fundamentally change. We’ve seen how the system treats people like her — regular people — and we know change can’t wait. Steny Hoyer has been in office for 40 years. While he’s on the phone to big donors, Mckayla’s in our community, talking to regular folks. That’s thanks to the support of this community, enabling us to run a true people-powered campaign. _[But we want to take a moment as we close out the year to hear from you too. Will you take our campaign’s brief issues survey? It’ll only take a minute.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5wKQCK2Knpo7lAZVw8DJ4DPCYdu8mlsST07_luMtfya74YOMvOAi0jByDi4-Gry4ZNSzCSUQmCQ06NY_DHRLMl91kOGVZMTmvIBshLGEaqbs6Ovvi51nv9Z7NYVo7mtJ7DuDHM3-1twvW5OY9LOwWc6z7_UyAbZkaPfJzgOVW3rdo2zVQSOzXRD6pDxdSmUQbX3kM-dmfTjH4JZTLG4bawjg86tRZfQFqTdWK8awJUVfs/3hm/khNDlEWqRFK94YJrhTwqgQ/h0/dJV_ARm8oO87FEZsfrbnU-1z89Qmii8kfijGpF0icmA)_ | [ TAKE THE SURVEY

We have a representative right now who takes a lot of corporate money, and his stance on policy tends to reflect that. We need to be bold. Now isn’t the time for meekness and timidity. That means listening to people and hearing what they want.
Thank you for taking the time. We’re excited for the work we’re going to do together to win this race in the coming months.
In solidarity,
Team Mckayla

Friend,

The Left will NEVER stop trying to keep the truth from you.

They want you to forget all the GREAT accomplishments we had under my administration by feeding you LIE after LIE.

I was the only President in decades to not get us into a war--I got us out of wars.

**Our Country has been taken over by Scammers and Hoaxsters, and we have to take it back.**

We no longer talk about greatness for our Country, everything is about _political investigations,_ hoaxes, and **scams.**

We will **Make America Great Again -** I know that - but only if we get the LOSERS and HYPOCRITES OUT OF OFFICE. You've never let me down before, and I know you won't start now.

They want you to forget all the GREAT accomplishments we had under my administration by feeding you LIE after LIE. I was the only President in decades to not get us into a war--I got us out of wars. Our Country has been taken over by Scammers and Hoaxsters, and we have to take it back. We no longer talk about greatness for our Country, everything is about political investigations, hoaxes, and scams. We will Make America Great Again - I know that - but only if we get the LOSERS and HYPOCRITES OUT OF OFFICE. You've never let me down before, and I know you won't start now. name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: Check out the calen-deer for this week! 🦌🎄

body:
| Shhhh...your presents are waiting for you in this email 🎁
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM4NzUyMTI1LCJuYmYiOjE2Mzg3NTIxMjUsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJuNHdjMnFnbTJmejlqNzk5MmJwaSIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHJhaW5kZW1vY3JhdHMub3JnLz9fX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.hCMBGzyRmlQ9TgkppHxJOe1BwML8Ng2iKlRFU2RH1_Q)
Peter — _It’s the most wonderful time of the year_...for virtual live trainings! 🎄☃️ **⇨ First up is**[**What is a Democratic Precinct Chair**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..wh9Cm892QGd1IB2JLdtnirOgO3WP_eYDd1xbOi-0zO4)**on Monday, December 6 at 1pm ET.** There are a lot of important roles in your community, but have you ever heard of a Precinct Chair? Our team of experts will run through and discuss Precinct Chair responsibilities, non-electoral organizing, and understanding tactics to maintain and engage precinct members after Election Day. Join us and learn more about this important role in your community! | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..wh9Cm892QGd1IB2JLdtnirOgO3WP_eYDd1xbOi-0zO4)
---

* * *
**⇨ Next, there’s**[**Managing Your Progressive Job Search**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..n22YONImr47iYABViIz5HifzRwk1ol_qgqX7abWsKx8)**on Tuesday, December 7 at 1pm ET.**
If you’re in the middle of a job search, you know they can be tedious and time-consuming. But you don’t have to feel alone in this process, because NDTC has got you covered!
Our experts will identify ways to maximize your efficiency during your job search and will help you practice backwards planning the timeline and tasks of a job search.
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..n22YONImr47iYABViIz5HifzRwk1ol_qgqX7abWsKx8)
---

* * *
**⇨ Then, we have**[**Do You Want to Run for Office?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..fz2Z12jf98uUDb54e6uiqSd80M0_hpoG_aHpelKg1o4)**on Wednesday, December 8 at 8pm ET.**
Just because this election cycle is over, doesn’t mean you can’t consider running for office next year! Running for office is a BIG deal and there’s a lot to consider. Fortunately, you don’t have to decide all on your own. **_We’re here to help!_**
In this training, you’ll learn how to decide if running is right for you, what you should research for your race, and even practice sharing the news with friends and family!
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..fz2Z12jf98uUDb54e6uiqSd80M0_hpoG_aHpelKg1o4)
---

* * *
**⇨ And you definitely don’t miss the next Kelly Q &A: **[**Your 2022 Political Forecast**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEyMDUyMV9SVSZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.nL9yvHKw_uWea8rqVvoMHROmmEYNzJUVa2AOzK3Whl4)**on Thursday, December 9 at 1pm ET.**
Join Kelly Dietrich and NDTC’s Political Director Anthony Robinson for this special interactive session. They will be discussing what we are seeing in the political ecosystem and how that might affect next year’s midterms! Bring your burning questions and get ready for a great conversation!
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEyMDUyMV9SVSZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.nL9yvHKw_uWea8rqVvoMHROmmEYNzJUVa2AOzK3Whl4)
---

* * *
**⇨ We’re wrapping up the week with**[**Networking for Early Career Professionals**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..-2wCNAjvIYwqeGQrwBmNBXAyaHtbuMmsCgWGNKNtF6w)**on Friday, December 10 at 1pm ET.**
Networking helps _a lot_ when it comes to searching for jobs and establishing your career. If you’re an early career professional, consider joining this training to learn how to build your professional network, identify opportunities to engage your professional network online, and review strategies for successful informational interviews.
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..-2wCNAjvIYwqeGQrwBmNBXAyaHtbuMmsCgWGNKNtF6w)
---

* * *
Can’t wait to see you there!!
\-- NDTC Live Training Team

Bring your burning questions and get ready for a great conversation! ⇨ We’re wrapping up the week with Friday, December 10 at 1pm ET. Networking helps a lot when it comes to searching for jobs and establishing your career. If you’re an early career professional, consider joining this training to learn how to build your professional network, identify opportunities to engage your professional network online, and review strategies for successful informational interviews. Can’t wait to see you there!! \-- NDTC Live Training Team | This message was sent to: | Connect with us on social media!** | | | ---|---|--- | ---|--- Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats.org, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th Street NW, Suite 925, Washington, DC 20006

name: Pro Life Update
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbi24jbj2gqe47u3j0eh80iq5antplrs90q8j118_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uiom9dr5m3gmeopkethbcstj6tj3fcbme2pncpb7m5rm1pr4s1qjbdhnmpjr3c77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0slgcponed9kcup32phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or6c3jm1o71chj649fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zscssrpq0oeajm6cct23ja8rjrt8a1ee9ac0t250_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stge1ob4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvd2ppp1mr751888trjl9377jhuf4mjfj8hj9b78_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stge1ob4cph2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze4r8l5prrtocnu79u1d1tl294dsb5gv5dh6gmlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stge1ob4cph2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zigg06mcfc5akctmbdbsmsnb8crc5d6no3t5eoc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stge1ob4cph2bs)** Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zbdc2pka0ir0d8m60r9c8c53cu9s3p6dab0839ag).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpa10m1pju1lindfkeps31rtu35377ied87gler8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c3jm1o71chj649fg)

subject: now Fauci is lying about me

body:
It’s time to FIRE FAUCI! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8122%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=J3xs%2bCYQ12%2bRoXSGZbLpkw&sysid=1)
**It’s time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19928%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vIUrEG2nituxXspq2w6amw&sysid=1)** __ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19929%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4us9tMubgVEAUBInyqjYxQ&sysid=1) | |
---
Friend, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _"really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take \- and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19920%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EJsEx61ne%2bIwI7yCPoVoNQ&sysid=1)
__
Friend, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_"I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It’s clear all the power has gotten to his head and it’s about time we send him home.

**If you’re with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you’ll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19921%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m7%2bpGZDBCVCRpzyGcAMCeg&sysid=1)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that’s why he’s spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19922%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=muwa%2fYnPjMqwOtrIpxBCQQ&sysid=1)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19923%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rslCRKQsrPVEQFL9bj5uxQ&sysid=1)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19924%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7jvzefbZG3CGfGvtTHJvdw&sysid=1)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19935%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Yp%2fz3bs%2bue3Fw7t%2bCCV7Q&sysid=1)
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: A Christmas Card from President Trump + His New Book!
body:
A Must Have for all Patriots!
|
---
Friend, President Trump’s New Book, Our Journey Together, is a beautiful photo book which covers President Donald J. Trump’s successful time in the White House—a must-have for all Patriots. **Every photograph in the book was handpicked by President Trump himself.**
| [ ](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxVUMtuwyAQ_Bp8c2SDbZyDD0ndqGrOkXpDGHCMwsMFrCj9-q4jt1UlhNjZ2WFnZIcrWhGV6Q4XuCxx0RQNIHhXilqQmuyHdhgJLwiqCsuvnIukveNGhbQT3mYTzIkG15K2xajakpN9LcTYCkkpbYp922Smm1KaIyIHhE9wqnrw_hbXcajm4OUiUoTn4qK-OiVz4ecHIqclWWaV1ItFpFeWa4Nws4LRL0EoAAfZcl61vM6dMIzb2ejxsZEElBz0gLZZq3POxBR0TJZH6AfJxuAtm4OKWiqXWAqLndmkI3PqztY1f8S8S0AALfgoHz7oLYXz2-ECbeaMlusu_8FJS7DcH835ot73WejkfNfG6NhQiPK6unkGuC3dIXpEGD-nMH5mhf_ckc8-_wrudW3hF7jTY1a_vE1it0WEEe2_ASCXl9Y)
---
Walk through President Trump’s historic time in the White House through his eyes, **with captions written and selected by President Trump himself.** This book will show you a behind the scenes look at building the southern border wall; cutting America’s taxes; confirming almost 300 federal judges and 3 Supreme Court justices; rebuilding our military; creating Space Force; dealing with Kim Jong-Un, President Xi, President Putin, battling liberals on two impeachment witch hunts, and much more. Due to Joe Biden’s disastrous leadership, we are facing shortages of every product-including paper. **Place an order today and get this unforgettable book in January 2022 and a Christmas Card from our great President that will arrive in time for Christmas.**
| [ **ORDER PRESIDENT TRUMP'S NEW BOOK NOW!** ](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdUMtuwyAQ_Bpyc2SDnwcfmro5pOeoR4QBx6i8Crhp8vVdR24rVUKIndkddkb0uGxKIneqxzkuCpzXeQ0I3he84qQi3diOE2E5QWVu2IUxnpSzTMuQ9tyZ3dwXrAI-5x2u-dhITvKuaCUbeddW01RWO93PKfmIyBPCRzhlNTr3HtdxqHxwYuEpwnOxUV2sFBl3_obIcUmGGinUYhAZpGFKI1yvYHRL4BLAUbSMlS2rMss1ZcZrNd22Jg4lAz1o26xVGaN8DiomwyLwQdApOEN9kFEJaRNNYTGezipSK690XfNHzNkEDaAFH2Vvh3P39Xk_pTegqdVKAPEPnJUAy8NBv57lqduFXvir0lrFuoEoL6ubR4Db0j1qDgjjxxTGj6zwnzvyMWT3YF9WCj_DnW5e_vZtEvstIoya4RsOx5i-)

name: Kim Travis, Campaign Manager
subject: Critical Race Theory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, Democrats are using critical race theory to indoctrinate our children. We must put an end to this!
Hi Peter, The prevalence of "Critical Race Theory" in our schools is appalling. Our schools should not be promoting racial hatred. When I grew up, we were taught to view others based on their character and not their skin tone.**While we can acknowledge that our history has its highs and lows, we cannot let the bad parts of our past define us. We are not a racist country.** Instead of advancing fear and hatred, our schools should be promoting us coming together. As someone with their grandchild currently in school, it worries me that this poisonous ideology is going to indoctrinate our students and children to be divided instead of united.**I joined this campaign because I know Congressman Steil shares my values. I know he will do everything he can to make sure nobody is indoctrinating our children and our students.****[I ask that you please donate to our campaign and help us fight back against the poison that is Critical Race Theory. The Democrat's have been promoting this, and it is time we stand up and tell them no.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zelkyd-idtjvlhlh-r/)**Thank you,Kim
**--
Kim Travis**

_Roe v. Wade_ is under the most serious attack in our lifetimes.
**That’s why Jahana voted to pass the Women's Health Protection Act out of the House earlier this year, which would protect a person’s ability to determine whether to continue or end a pregnancy and a health care provider’s ability to provide abortion services.**
Reproductive justice means people should be in full control of their bodies, careers, and health. It means letting people make informed health care choices for themselves. We must work to ensure everyone has full access to reproductive health care, whether it be birth control, comprehensive prenatal care, or abortion care – _and maintain their right to choose without restriction._
[**It is more important than ever for pro-choice women to be leading in the House, but the Democratic majority is razor thin. Jahana’s race will help decide who holds the House in 2022. Will you donate to support a pro-choice champion and ensure Congress can continue to fight for our rights?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39377980/319586230/-1864963531?refcode=E12782-20211205-RoeSCOTUS-SL-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDNjNDU2ZS05NDU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oaf3_mCi_0vQd9hQcxpNoAhpFn-zHN9C2BpNfqhL9R0=)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: What I Will Do On Day 1 In The US Senate | Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
First Things First As a father of 5 amazing kids every decision I make filters through that paradigm. When deciding what to do first when elected to
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1754368.1033.1.a5340b934999e827d5b0f555feed31de) |
---
## First Things First
---
As a father of 5 amazing kids every decision I make filters through that paradigm. When deciding what to do first when elected to the US Senate it was a _quite easy decision_. **I believe that parents should raise their kids not the government.** Therefore, on day 1 **I will sponsor legislation to ban any and all federal funds to any public school that teaches Critical Race Theory** in the classroom. Our classrooms should equip students to learn to read, write and do math instead of teaching one another to hate based on skin color. I will work with a member of the house to sponsor similar legislation to expediate this important move to protect our children. Not only will I do this on day 1 but **I will also be VERY vocal that I will NOT support Mitch McConnell** to be the leader of the Republican Senate Majority when we take back the Senate in 2022. Please continue to:
1\. Pray for me (_Favor, Wisdom & Direction_)
2\. Spread word on social media (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Telegram...)
3\. Financially support the campaign ( www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate ) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

Peter,

I'm running for Governor of Georgia to stop Stacey Abrams and save our state.

We need bold conservative leadership to unite Georgia and stand up to the woke left.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58945219:6Ea-xQEHN:m:1:3298722022:0260C0A656487A2B1B6654C3ACA9584D:r)

Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, and the liberal mob want to silence us and turn Georgia into a state that's more like California or New York.

_**Not on my watch.**_

As your Governor, I will:
* Completely eliminate the state income tax
* Crack down on crime and make our communities safe again
* Put parents in charge of their children's education
* Ensure the safest and securest elections in the country

Career politicians say it can't be done, but with your support, we can **STOP STACEY** and send a clear message that Georgians** will never bow down** to the radicals or the liberal elite.

Bonnie and I are forever humbled by your support - and we're asking for your help again today.

Join me, and together we will **STOP STACEY** and **SAVE GEORGIA**.

name: Dr.  Bob
subject: When so many are struggling to make ends meet, what was my opponent thinking?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
One of the most significant obstacles we face in creating a better future for this district is Jack Bergman. His opposition baffled me until I understood that Jack Bergman answers to the large corporations who donate to his campaign, rather than serving the great people of this district. **"Cutting corporate taxes but opposing proposals which reduce child poverty in half. clean_body: Hello, The latest polling in Iowa’s critical Senate race shows that Republican Chuck Grassley is in real danger. Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley, and his approval ratings are the lowest they have EVER been! And this isn’t just any old poll. These numbers come directly from Ann Selzer and the Des Moines Register, who Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight calls “the best pollster in politics!” Democrat Mike Franken has jumped into the race, and we now have our best chance ever to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. The stakes couldn’t be higher: Senate control will be decided in Iowa, so we MUST help Mike Franken win. Mike’s up against Grassley’s $3 million campaign war chest, but he’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so if he’s going to protect our Democratic Senate majority, we need grassroots donors like you to give right now. Our first big December fundraising deadline is in just 72 hours, and we cannot fall short of our goal: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

body:
I'm asking for your help
I'm running for Governor of Georgia to stop Stacey Abrams and save our state.

Peter,

I'm running for Governor of Georgia to stop Stacey Abrams and save our state.

We need bold conservative leadership to unite Georgia and stand up to the woke left.

**WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO:**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58945415:Jz4heQE0N:m:1:3253819041:5E4CF4F472B0A14C49F9952FF44B0BF2:r)

Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, and the liberal mob want to silence us and turn Georgia into a state that's more like California or New York.

_**Not on my watch.**_

As your Governor, I will:
* Completely eliminate the state income tax
* Crack down on crime and make our communities safe again
* Put parents in charge of their children's education
* Ensure the safest and securest elections in the country
* Stand up to the woke mob and radical left
* Fight back against Biden and his overreaching mandates

Career politicians say it can't be done, but with your support, we can **STOP STACEY** and send a clear message that Georgians** will never bow down** to the radicals or the liberal elite.

Bonnie and I are forever humbled by your support - and we're asking for your help again today.

Join me, and together we will **STOP STACEY** and **SAVE GEORGIA**.

body:
Our life is the realization of the hope my ancestors carried with faith in a future they could not see.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39382670/319607668/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211206-a-EM&amount=25&refcode2=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjA2ZjAwZC1hMjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evb0BGfwtg1Vjk0UeyR63grAoxNYMsz_dLrcYUfEZ54=)
---
| Peter,

The far-right is trying to rewrite the history of slavery and segregation, and as the direct descendant of enslaved people, I take that personally.

The truth is, these are direct attempts to erase the real people who built this country — people like my ancestors, Charles, Lydia, and Anne King, who were enslaved in Gaithersburg, Maryland, in a cabin just 25 miles from where I live with my wife and two daughters today.

Our life is the realization of the hope my ancestors carried with faith in a future they could not see. Our story is proof that progress is possible, because in just three generations, my family went from being enslaved in that cabin to serving in the cabinet of our nation’s first Black president. That’s why today, I am launching a new video about my family’s story and my vision for a more prosperous Maryland built on economic, racial, climate, and educational justice.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39382671/319607669/-78424889?refcode=BLU-KING-20211206-a-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=8f06f00d-a256-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjA2ZjAwZC1hMjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evb0BGfwtg1Vjk0UeyR63grAoxNYMsz_dLrcYUfEZ54=)

name: V. Demings
subject: Friend, I have been reflecting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader that understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm two points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39387613/319618795/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1826-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I4NmJlMC1hNTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2e6wvvalfjQmH9DGgrDENK2Ksx6EEuxL3j_oHYiCYCc=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39387616/319618798/-144803992?refcode=jtk1826-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I4NmJlMC1hNTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2e6wvvalfjQmH9DGgrDENK2Ksx6EEuxL3j_oHYiCYCc=&emci=beabfaaf-e051-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=17b86be0-a556-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/beabfaaf-e051-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/17b86be0-a556-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I4NmJlMC1hNTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2e6wvvalfjQmH9DGgrDENK2Ksx6EEuxL3j_oHYiCYCc=&id=123159867). name: Marco Rubio
subject: Here is the memo I sent around
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Fellow Conservative, below is a memo I sent around to my staff this morning. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?30h1h--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative, below is a memo I sent around to my staff this morning. Because you’re a valued member of our team, I wanted to make sure you saw this. Please don’t share this, and delete this as soon as you’re finished reading.
| To: Team Marco
Subject: State of Race 12.1.21
Status: SENSITIVE
Date: **[12/1/21](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30h1h-1nx93-4qqlpo8/ "12/1/21")**
Time: **[7:45 AM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30h1h-1nx94-4qqlpo9/ "7:45 AM")**

Good Morning Team-

I promised I would be honest with you at all times.

So here’s an update on the state of my race so far:
* Recent polling shows my opponent is virtually tied with me
* _Fox News_ said this would be the most expensive Senate race ever
* _CNN_ listed my race as a top 10 seat to flip
* Senate Democrats have listed me as a top 3 target
* Pelosi Puppet Val Demings is spending thousands in online ads smearing me daily
* _Roll Call_ just labeled me as the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for re-election

Sorry to bring terrible news, but it’s true...and if we don’t meet our extended End of Month goal by midnight, I’m worried we won’t be able to fight back. **[Team, I’m hoping you’ll help me ramp up today because we’re going to need each and every patriot who wants to flip the Senate red, to donate $27 before midnight.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30h1h-1nx95-4qqlpo0/ "Team, I’m hoping you’ll help me ramp up today because we’re going to need each and every patriot who wants to flip the Senate red, to donate $27 before midnight.")**
---

Fellow Conservative, now that you see the memo do you understand why I’m sending it to you?
| | | [STAND WITH MARCO](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30h1h-1nx96-4qqlpo1/ "STAND WITH MARCO")
---
If you were waiting to step up, now is the time. We need you now more than ever, we can’t afford for a single patriot to ignore this email. I’m relying on the support of grassroots conservatives like you to carry me across the finish line. **[So I’m pleading with you, don’t let us lose -- donate today.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30h1h-1nx97-4qqlpo2/ "So I’m pleading with you, don’t let us lose -- donate today.")**

Thanks for all your help,

Marco Rubio
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30h1h-1nx98-4qqlpo3/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Fellow Conservative, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30h1h-1nx99-4qqlpo4/ "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

name: Sue
subject: I miss Trumps America, Peter👈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | I hope you know just how much I - _and everyone here on Team House Conservatives_ - values your continued support and dedication.

**[Taking back the House for Republicans and restoring Trump's America First Majority in Congress is our #1 priority. But it's no small feat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58946972:JxS35QEyN:m:1:3253819041:5832BE3259ADA64B91F49A470FE640F2:r "Taking back the House for Republicans and restoring Trump’s America First Majority in
Congress is our #1 priority. But it’s no small feat. ")**

Nancy Pelosi is scheming day and night to unseat freedom-loving patriots and replace them with her socialist puppets from Alaska to Florida. She's called up every dark money donor and cashed in every favor to bury Trump's allies under a wave of max-out checks. She knows her Majority is hanging on by a thread and she knows we have a MASSIVE Red Wave of momentum behind us.

Her plan: outspend, outraise, and outmaneuver. The Radical Left already has a HUGE fundraising advantage. We can't let them buy the House Majority out from under us.

**_But we won 't win unless we fight together._ That's why we are so grateful to have patriots like you on our grassroots team. We're facing an uphill battle and you are our secret weapon.**

Which brings me to the most important question you will be asked today: **[Will you step up one more time to fight back against the Radical Left's socialist agenda?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58946972:JxS35QEyN:m:1:3253819041:5832BE3259ADA64B91F49A470FE640F2:r "Will you step up one more time to fight back against the Radical Left’s socialist
agenda?")**

I absolutely hate to ask, because I know we ask so much of you already and so often you step up to the plate. I'll be frank, this is the last email I wanted to send today, but _we 're in a bind and in desperate need of your help. _

Every day conservative patriots in Congress put up a fight for our freedoms. Every day they fight to Keep America Great. But unless we fire Pelosi and put an end to the Radical Left's socialist agenda, all their hard work goes to waste.

**[Please, chip in whatever you can. As long as Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are in control of Washington, everything that we accomplished with President Trump in the White House is at risk.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58946972:JxS35QEyN:m:1:3253819041:5832BE3259ADA64B91F49A470FE640F2:r "Please, chip in
whatever you can. As long as Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are in control of Washington, everything that we accomplished with President
Trump in the White House is at risk. ")**

YOU are the only thing standing in the way of a socialist takeover.

For Freedom,

Sue
Team House Conservatives

---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58946973:JxS35QEyN:m:1:3253819041:5832BE3259ADA64B91F49A470FE640F2:r "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump might run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58946973:JxS35QEyN:m:1:3253819041:5832BE3259ADA64B91F49A470FE640F2:r "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, can we count on you to step up?")******************************

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

subject: Stacey Abrams needs you now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Stacey’s work paved the way for Joe Biden, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to win the state. Now it’s her turn.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39394126/319638339/46153894?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211206-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjU4OGIyMS1iMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSY2pNzguTtcl1qaFcHhDWo6Oeido7Jg8FtKWKEkjj0=)
---
Peter,

Last week, Stacey Abrams announced she’s running for governor in Georgia, and we need to do everything we can to make sure she has the resources to win this race and defeat Brian Kemp. [_**Will you make a split contribution to her campaign right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39394128/319638354/46153894?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211206-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjU4OGIyMS1iMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSY2pNzguTtcl1qaFcHhDWo6Oeido7Jg8FtKWKEkjj0=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39394130/319638368/46153894?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211206-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjU4OGIyMS1iMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSY2pNzguTtcl1qaFcHhDWo6Oeido7Jg8FtKWKEkjj0=)
---
Stacey Abrams knows the importance of cultivating relationships with rural voters. It was a crucial part of her efforts in 2018, and she has continued making inroads with rural communities. **Stacey’s work paved the way for Joe Biden, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to win the state. Now it’s her time to win.**

Republicans in Georgia are doing everything they can to suppress the vote and stop Stacey from winning this race. This will be one of the most expensive races in the country, and it’s going to take all of us working together to make sure she can win this election. clean_body: Stacey’s work paved the way for Joe Biden, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to win the state. Now it’s her turn. | = Peter, Last week, Stacey Abrams announced she’s running for governor in Georgia, and we need to do everything we can to make sure she has the resources to win this race and defeat Brian Kemp. = | = Stacey Abrams knows the importance of cultivating relationships with rural voters. It was a crucial part of her efforts in 2018, and she has continued making inroads with rural communities. Stacey’s work paved the way for Joe Biden, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to win the state. Now it’s her time to win. Republicans in Georgia are doing everything they can to suppress the vote and stop Stacey from winning this race. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39394199/319638715/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4NTM3ZC1iMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9hugc55pfoTBK0F0OiNXna8LlhWX9XlydzI8avzr48=)
Hi there, friend -- this is Sam, Eric’s big brother.

**[I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to Eric's campaign for Congress. But first, let me tell you a little more about my brother, and why I think he’d make an incredible representative for Western North Carolina.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39394200/319638716/1573898945?refcode=em-12.6.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4NTM3ZC1iMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9hugc55pfoTBK0F0OiNXna8LlhWX9XlydzI8avzr48=)**

Growing up, Eric and I didn’t have much. What we did have was football and the opportunities it provided. We both played high school ball here in Henderson, North Carolina.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39394201/319638717/1573898945?refcode=em-12.6.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4NTM3ZC1iMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9hugc55pfoTBK0F0OiNXna8LlhWX9XlydzI8avzr48=)
_"Big E" always had my back on the field._
Eric went on to get a football scholarship at UNC Chapel Hill. I went to Penn State, and then to the NFL where I was selected to the Pro Bowl twice and won a Super Bowl with the Baltimore Ravens.

I was a running back in high school, so Eric likes to joke that he “made my career” blocking for me. That’s up for debate. 😉

**What’s not up for debate is the love Eric has for his community. It’s why he came home to become the head football coach for the same team that kept us out of trouble. And it’s why he became a teacher and mentor for young people to teach personal responsibility and respect.**

If they gave out Super Bowl rings for service and giving back, Eric would have more than a couple. He’s got a sincere love for Western North Carolina, and I know he’ll always put the people first in Congress.

**[Eric’s race just got a whole lot more competitive, so we need to raise $15,000 before the end of the week to send a message that we can win. If you can, please send in $3 today. I know Eric would appreciate it, and it’d make me a happy big brother.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39394202/319638718/1573898945?refcode=em-12.6.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4NTM3ZC1iMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9hugc55pfoTBK0F0OiNXna8LlhWX9XlydzI8avzr48=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39394203/319638719/1573898945?refcode=em-12.6.21-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4NTM3ZC1iMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9hugc55pfoTBK0F0OiNXna8LlhWX9XlydzI8avzr48=)

clean_body: | = Hi there, friend -- this is Sam, Eric’s big brother. = Growing up, Eric and I didn’t have much. What we did have was football and the opportunities it provided. We both played high school ball here in Henderson, North Carolina. = "Big E" always had my back on the field. Eric went on to get a football scholarship at UNC Chapel Hill. I went to Penn State, and then to the NFL where I was selected to the Pro Bowl twice and won a Super Bowl with the Baltimore Ravens. I was a running back in high school, so Eric likes to joke that he “made my career” blocking for me. That’s up for debate. 😉 What’s not up for debate is the love Eric has for his community. It’s why he came home to become the head football coach for the same team that kept us out of trouble. And it’s why he became a teacher and mentor for young people to teach personal responsibility and respect. If they gave out Super Bowl rings for service and giving back, Eric would have more than a couple. He’s got a sincere love for Western North Carolina, and I know he’ll always put the people first in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, = Sam "Smash"_ Gash = | = Eric Gash is a teacher, pastor, former professional football player, and high school football coach running to flip NC-14 blue. Friend, Last week, arguments concluded in a U.S. Supreme Court case that will determine whether Mississippi’s 15-week abortion ban is constitutional, and it could mean the end of reproductive choice in the United States as we know it. The 6:3 majority conservative court is already expressing the idea of turning the issue of abortion over to the states, **potentially overturning the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ case that has guaranteed the federal right to abortion since 1973.** Taking reproductive choice and life-changing medical decisions out of the hands of women and their doctors is not only backwards, but it will have life-or-death consequences, especially in the Black community where the maternal mortality rate is 2.5 times that of white women. We simply cannot go back to the days of back-alley abortions or turn into a country where choice is only available to those with the means to travel across state lines or pay large sums of money for it. It is clear that we cannot depend on this Supreme Court to defend the fundamental right to reproductive health care. **When I’m Governor of Maryland, we will ensure we never take the right to legally and safely access an abortion for granted.** **[Let’s make sure that Maryland has a pro-choice governor willing to defend our rights in 2022: make a contribution of any amount today to support this campaign and ensure Marylanders can continue to access safe, legal abortion.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39394573/319640747/-1552190924?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211206choice_wm_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTgzMzAwMi1iMzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPeWsSVGGKF4h2OuWd3GO81Ww9lPxjcKBTBtT9qD-MM=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Before representing Staten Island and Brooklyn in Congress, Max served as a platoon leader in the U.S. Army. He was awarded the Bronze Star and Purple Heart for his service in Afghanistan, and he knows firsthand what it means to make sacrifices for your country.
This experience not only makes Max an astounding leader — it has also made him a fierce advocate and defender of our Democracy. He’s never been afraid to call it like it is (or to use _colorful_ language to do so). I’m proud to have served alongside Max in Congress representing the American people.
A proud Staten Islander and New Yorker, Max will always fight for the best interests of his constituents. In Congress, he has fought for expanding Medicare, treatment to end the opioid crisis, and banning military-style assault weapons to stop the scourge of gun violence plaguing our country.
I know Max well, and I’m confident he’s the best candidate in this race — not only for New York, but our entire country. Because we cannot allow GOP Minority Leader and Trump sycophant Kevin McCarthy to take the Speaker’s gavel from Nancy Pelosi. So today, the day Max is launching his campaign to retake New York’s 11th district, I’m asking for your support.
**Please rush a donation to Max Rose and our campaign to help kickstart his candidacy and win back New York’s 11th district. In a race this close, every dollar will make a tremendous difference.**

body:
Peter --

Your private medical information is now the
property of the U.S. government.

Joe Biden can track you and catalog like a
zoo animal based on your vaccination status.

And Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer rode to the
rescue for Joe Biden and Dr. Fauci's totalitarian COVID police
state by voting for a scheme to create a federal vaccine
database.
HELP JOHN GIBBS DEFEAT NEVER TRUMP RINO PETER
MEIJER BY CHIPPING IN TODAY
It's none of Joe Biden's business knowing who
is vaccinated.

The only reason the Biden regime desires your
personal medical information is so Joe Biden knows who to target
for forced vaccination the next time Dr. Fauci cooks up another
one of his illegal and un-American vaccine mandates.
Donald Trump endorsed my campaign for
Congress because President Trump knows Republicans need America
First conservatives in Congress to fight back against Joe Biden's
assault on our liberties.

Will you join President Trump in supporting
my campaign by chipping in a generous contribution of $10 or more
right now?

Peter Meijer proved he's another RINO
rollover for Nancy Pelosi and the socialist Democrats.

RINO Peter Meijer voted with Nancy Pelosi to
IMPEACH President Trump in a second Democrat hoax.

Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer voted to throw
Trump supporters in jail for questioning the 2020 election.

And now Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer voted
to register Americans in Joe Biden and Dr. Fauci's federal
vaccine database.

I know how to fight back against the Never
Trumpers, the socialist Democrats, and the fake news media.

I proudly served in the Trump administration,
advancing the president's America First agenda.

And President Trump appointed me to the 1776
Commission to lead the fight to stop racist critical race theory
from poisoning the minds of America's students.
HELP JOHN GIBBS DEFEAT NEVER TRUMP RINO PETER
MEIJER BY CHIPPING IN TODAY

Simply put - this election is a choice
between a Trump-endorsed fighter. . .

. . .And a swamp RINO that jumped at the
chance to impeach Donald Trump and help Joe Biden create a
federal vaccine database.

Can I count on you to
join President Trump in supporting me in the fight to remove
Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer from Congress by chipping in your
most generous contribution today?

The good news is I can feel the grassroots
support building behind my campaign.

$10, $25, $50, $100 -
whatever you can afford - will help my campaign keep the momentum
going.

I need your help to alter every voter in
Michigan's third congressional district that I am the
Trump-endorsed America First conservative in this race.

So please chip in today
and help me retire Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer.

Sincerely,

John Gibbs

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39395969/319648130/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmNDQ1OS1iNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnbYvnuSe6H3YIUyakUSVcg9cZH_NKkxHf7GIETiK_c=)

Peter,

Today marks the 156th anniversary of the ratification of the 13th amendment, which outlawed slavery in the United States. At the time, this marked an opportunity for freedom -- a freedom that did not come without a price to be paid.

As we fast forward and take a look at where we're at now, we are reminded that even with 156 years of major strides, we're still grappling with the legacies of slavery.

We've seen systemic racism thrive in our criminal legal system, in our health care system, in our education system, and everything in between.

**I'm ready to take the fight for racial justice to Congress.**[Join me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39395973/319648132/-465419534?refcode=em21_211206_attorneyuplift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmNDQ1OS1iNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnbYvnuSe6H3YIUyakUSVcg9cZH_NKkxHf7GIETiK_c=)** ** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39395975/319648136/-465419534?refcode=em21_211206_attorneyuplift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmNDQ1OS1iNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnbYvnuSe6H3YIUyakUSVcg9cZH_NKkxHf7GIETiK_c=) As a civil rights lawyer, I've worked on various cases to defend those who are most vulnerable to our oppressive systems. One of my cases included fighting against the “stand your ground” self-defense law, since in reality, it's just propaganda that justifies murderous vigilantism, especially against Black folks.

Whether it was as a civil rights attorney, as a Statehouse representative, as an ordinary Floridian and now as a candidate for Congress. I've always been an advocate and fighter. I've always been fighting for our communities that continue to be plagued by systems working against us.

The reality is, It shouldn't be the “norm” for _any_ American to feel fear as they go for a run, drive to the grocery, or walk around with a hoodie on.

**[The work that needs to be done speaks to the fabric of our democracy -- and if we work together, we can achieve total liberation and racial justice.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39395977/319648138/-465419534?refcode=em21_211206_attorneyuplift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmNDQ1OS1iNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnbYvnuSe6H3YIUyakUSVcg9cZH_NKkxHf7GIETiK_c=)**

In solidarity,

Michele [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39395979/319648140/-465419534?refcode=em21_211206_attorneyuplift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmNDQ1OS1iNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnbYvnuSe6H3YIUyakUSVcg9cZH_NKkxHf7GIETiK_c=)

name: Mike Collier
subject: We need to fix the damn grid.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Folks, Winter is coming — and Republicans are at it again. As we head into winter, our state’s gas infrastructure is no more prepared for cold temperatures than it was during the freeze in February. Meanwhile, the Texas Railroad Commission (RRC) continues to fail Texans by doing the absolute least. Reminder: The RRC recently voted to let consumers pay off $3.4 billion of the profits made by corporations during the winter storm. This bailout will be added to Texans’ energy bills for the next 30 years, an estimated $350 per household. And now, the RRC just approved a rule that allows numerous energy companies to be able to opt out of winterization requirements for just $150. Make it make sense — bet ya can’t. Because how can we expect our state leaders to fix the damn grid while they cash checks from the folks that made money from the grid failure? Dan Patrick himself got record donations from the same corporations that made BILLIONS during the winter storm. And one thing is for sure: If he’s taking their money, he’s not holding them accountable. **As an energy expert, you have my word that I will fix the damn grid to serve Texas families — not corporations. These corporate handouts paid for by Texas families and get-out-jail-free cards that keep our state’s power grid unstable will be put to an end once I’m elected. ** And unlike Dan Patrick, I _will_ _not_ take a penny from corporate PACs because the Lt. Governor ought to serve the people of Texas alone. [**So that’s why I’m asking you personally today: Can you chip in just $5 to support my campaign so we can finally fix the damn grid? Anything you can spare would mean the world to me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39396549/319651042/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211206_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTU4YjVkOS1iYTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0qi9ckEHrP731My4Cgimg1iBMra4xTN_vA7OASUcTo=?) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39396549/319651042/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211206_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTU4YjVkOS1iYTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0qi9ckEHrP731My4Cgimg1iBMra4xTN_vA7OASUcTo=)

clean_body: | Folks, Winter is coming — and Republicans are at it again. As we head into winter, our state’s gas infrastructure is no more prepared for cold temperatures than it was during the freeze in February. Meanwhile, the Texas Railroad Commission (RRC) continues to fail Texans by doing the absolute least. Reminder: The RRC recently voted to let consumers pay off $3.4 billion of the profits made by corporations during the winter storm. This bailout will be added to Texans’ energy bills for the next 30 years, an estimated $350 per household. And now, the RRC just approved a rule that allows numerous energy companies to be able to opt out of winterization requirements for just $150. Make it make sense — bet ya can’t. Because how can we expect our state leaders to fix the damn grid while they cash checks from the folks that made money from the grid failure? Dan Patrick himself got record donations from the same corporations that made BILLIONS during the winter storm. And one thing is for sure: If he’s taking their money, he’s not holding them accountable. As an energy expert, you have my word that I will fix the damn grid to serve Texas families — not corporations. These corporate handouts paid for by Texas families and get-out-jail-free cards that keep our state’s power grid unstable will be put to an end once I’m elected. And unlike Dan Patrick, I will not take a penny from corporate PACs because the Lt. Governor ought to serve the people of Texas alone. =? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for hearing me out today and chipping in, if you can. Texans deserve leaders who will fight for them — not corporations. And I’m honored that you’re fighting alongside me. Mike The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

The January 6th insurrection was a threat to our democracy, so it was a threat to all of us. It didn’t matter who you voted for in the last election. Your democracy was under attack on that terrible day.
Investigating the insurrection should be a bipartisan matter. After all, the congressional committee examining the events of January 6th is bipartisan!
But Gov. DeSantis would rather engage in partisan politics and do Donald Trump’s bidding than ensure accountability for insurrectionists. In my view, that’s disqualifying -- and it’s part of the reason I’m challenging Gov. DeSantis.
**[So, Derek, please consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Common Good. Together, we can ensure these hate groups are held accountable so the events of that tragic day in January are never repeated. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39396578/319651209/-368092876?refcode=20211206_CGVA_CC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjNmZjM3NC1iOTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1IfsIxIPOVKfTBS_hdB4BfynNjWeqkKBEM3UtbzP_Rg=)**

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: Ken Jeong supports our campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
| I’m running for Congress because now more than ever, we need elected officials who put their trust in doctors and scientists.

I’ve been overwhelmed by the support from the scientific community for our campaign — including from Dr. Ken Jeong, who you probably know best as an actor and comedian from _The Hangover_ and _The Masked Singer_. Ken was a doctor before his acting career began, and he’s still a licensed physician today.

[I’d love to have you join me and Ken Jeong for a virtual event this Wednesday, December 8. Will you give $50 to secure your spot at this exclusive event?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39396763/319652089/171805041?amount=50&refcode=AA_EM_INV_1MO_211206_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=8xt%2Bp9cad7m%2Bh%2FTilEwGk7aL%2F8TErm%2Fn7ZEeHKU2VzamODHQlmqtqGrfNQ58dYtd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTEzYTBjNy1iYzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6GsutMbKlaOq3XXx_d8ujWr-oJlTNfEnlzpCTnzU-A=)

| | | Did you miss this important message from Lieutenant Governor-Elect Winsome Earle Sears, Peter?

**\------------------Forwarded Message------------------**

**Subject: **They Called Me 'The Black Mouth Of White Supremacy'
**From:** Lieutenant Governor-Elect Winsome Earle Sears
---

Dear Peter,

The radical liberals are losing their minds that the first Woman elected to the office of Lt. Governor is a Black Republican.

Their derangement has gone so far that **THEY WANT TO CALL ME A RACIST!**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58948446:JrDkRQETN:m:1:3298722022:5538E2856F857AEF446F07E6E6FB2D46:r)
---

The radical liberals can say whatever they want, but it's obvious they are afraid that a Black Republican Woman will destroy their narrative that America and the Republican Party are fundamentally Racist.

---
| | [HELP STATE REPUBLICANS SHOW THE LIBERALS WHAT THE GOP IS REALLY ABOUT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58948446:JrDkRQETN:m:1:3298722022:5538E2856F857AEF446F07E6E6FB2D46:r)
---

Our ticket was the most diverse in Virginia history, and we brought a sweeping Republican victory to Virginia, but we can't stop now.

We all have to stand together and show the left that we will not sit idly by as they spread their lies and call us racists.

**[I'm asking you to please stand with state Republicans and reject the left's lies about us. A donation of just $11, $22, or even $55 would be an enormous help in spreading our message.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58948446:JrDkRQETN:m:1:3298722022:5538E2856F857AEF446F07E6E6FB2D46:r "I'm asking you to please stand with state Republicans and reject the left's lies about us. A donation of just $11, $22, or even $55 would be an
enormous help in spreading our message.")**

I know you won't stand by as they call you and me racists.

Thank you for all your support,

Lieutenant Governor-Elect Winsome Earle Sears

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. name: Team Franchot
subject: Financial Literacy for High School Students
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Hi Peter,
We want to make sure you have a chance to share your thoughts with us about Peter Franchot’s plan to equip high school students with practical skills like financial literacy.
As the State’s Chief Fiscal Officer, Peter has seen firsthand how a lack of financial literacy can have significant, and even devastating consequences for fellow citizens, especially for our marginalized and disadvantaged communities. That’s why as our next Governor, he’ll augment our curriculum to make sure that our students receive instruction in must-have skills that they need to thrive in a modern economy.
The importance of financial literacy education can’t be overstated. According to Pew Research Center, those in poverty who have received education in financial literacy are more likely to get out of poverty -- which is why we need to consider financial literacy training as an essential part of our toolkit in the effort to lift more of our communities into the quality of life that they deserve.
We’d love to get your thoughts on Peter’s plan to teach our students things like balancing a budget, building good credit, identifying fraud, and investing money. Click here to take our quick survey. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/czj3Y7LVS0COax-nRlSBag2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em120321]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bc8915cc-5c51-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/0110f152-be56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTEwZjE1Mi1iZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRjalIHtTfcANskv-pSjFfBt6mPdB1hDGfRlDVFNLTY=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Nina Turner
subject: This is not hard.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Why are we playing games with voting rights?
#

Dear Friend!

Everything we are working toward in 2022 depends on protecting access to the ballot box for millions of Black, Brown, and working people who showed up last year to oust the most divisive President of our lifetime.

**This is not hard. So Why are we playing games with voting rights?**

Numerous activist groups have held demonstrations demanding the Senate pass critical legislation to protect voters from race-based discrimination and set minimum standards to enable all voters to experience free and fair elections.

Bold leaders like Ben Jealous, President of **[The People for the American Way](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39397573/319656206/-2067371654?s=20&refcode=211206_FR_votingrightsevents&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTFiNmM3Ni1iZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3Nz2-znmp8SqYHDoZH2-pDpmTHbfCvKg45LdFW4vAs=&emci=96474c0e-b956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=be1b6c76-bf56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12102799)** , and Co-Founders LaTosha Brown and Cliff Albright of **[Black Voters Matter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39397575/319656208/-240888988?s=20&refcode=211206_FR_votingrightsevents&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTFiNmM3Ni1iZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3Nz2-znmp8SqYHDoZH2-pDpmTHbfCvKg45LdFW4vAs=&emci=96474c0e-b956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=be1b6c76-bf56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12102799)** have consistently and tirelessly organized around the country and in our nation’s capital on these important issues.

Congress must pass this important legislation that protects and expands voting rights before the approaching holiday recess. Here are some ways you can help keep up the pressure and demand voting rights protections now.

**[Wednesday, December 8th](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39397577/319656210/-1998036728?s=20&refcode=211206_FR_votingrightsevents&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTFiNmM3Ni1iZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3Nz2-znmp8SqYHDoZH2-pDpmTHbfCvKg45LdFW4vAs=&emci=96474c0e-b956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=be1b6c76-bf56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12102799)** the Black Women Leaders & Allies Freedom Walk for Voting Rights and Economic Justice will convene under the leadership of Melanie Campbell, President of the National Coalition of Black Civic Participation!

We need you there to urge Congress to end the filibuster and protect our voting rights. Register **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39397579/319656212/557172036?refcode=211206_FR_votingrightsevents&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTFiNmM3Ni1iZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3Nz2-znmp8SqYHDoZH2-pDpmTHbfCvKg45LdFW4vAs=&emci=96474c0e-b956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=be1b6c76-bf56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12102799)**.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39397581/319656214/557172036?refcode=211206_FR_votingrightsevents&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTFiNmM3Ni1iZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3Nz2-znmp8SqYHDoZH2-pDpmTHbfCvKg45LdFW4vAs=&emci=96474c0e-b956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=be1b6c76-bf56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12102799)
The activism continues with the incomparable Reverend Barber and the Poor People’s Campaign for a Moral Monday March on Washington, DC on **December 13th** at 12pm ET to tell Congress: Get It Done in 2021! **[Sign up](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39397582/319656216/-1173012928?refcode=211206_FR_votingrightsevents&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTFiNmM3Ni1iZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3Nz2-znmp8SqYHDoZH2-pDpmTHbfCvKg45LdFW4vAs=&emci=96474c0e-b956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=be1b6c76-bf56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12102799)** to learn more.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39397583/319656217/-1173012928?refcode=211206_FR_votingrightsevents&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTFiNmM3Ni1iZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3Nz2-znmp8SqYHDoZH2-pDpmTHbfCvKg45LdFW4vAs=&emci=96474c0e-b956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=be1b6c76-bf56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12102799)
We cannot elect a Congress that reflects the people, if voter suppression exists.

If you are not in the DC area, we still need your voice.

The Senate must deliver even if that means delaying recess. Call your Senator today and tell them to stop playing games with our voting rights **1.888.453.3211.**

Thank you for being in the fight to pressure Congress to pass voting rights protections and the Build Back Better plan before the end of the year.

clean_body: Why are we playing games with voting rights? Dear Friend! Everything we are working toward in 2022 depends on protecting access to the ballot box for millions of Black, Brown, and working people who showed up last year to oust the most divisive President of our lifetime. This is not hard. So Why are we playing games with voting rights? Numerous activist groups have held demonstrations demanding the Senate pass critical legislation to protect voters from race-based discrimination and set minimum standards to enable all voters to experience free and fair elections. Bold leaders like Ben Jealous, President of , and Co-Founders LaTosha Brown and Cliff Albright of have consistently and tirelessly organized around the country and in our nation’s capital on these important issues. Congress must pass this important legislation that protects and expands voting rights before the approaching holiday recess. Here are some ways you can help keep up the pressure and demand voting rights protections now. the Black Women Leaders & Allies Freedom Walk for Voting Rights and Economic Justice will convene under the leadership of Melanie Campbell, President of the National Coalition of Black Civic Participation! We need you there to urge Congress to end the filibuster and protect our voting rights. Register . The activism continues with the incomparable Reverend Barber and the Poor People’s Campaign for a Moral Monday March on Washington, DC on December 13th at 12pm ET to tell Congress: Get It Done in 2021! to learn more. We cannot elect a Congress that reflects the people, if voter suppression exists. If you are not in the DC area, we still need your voice. The Senate must deliver even if that means delaying recess. Call your Senator today and tell them to stop playing games with our voting rights 1.888.453.3211. Thank you for being in the fight to pressure Congress to pass voting rights protections and the Build Back Better plan before the end of the year. = In Solidarity, Nina Turner = * Paid for by Nina Turner for Us Nina Turner for Us PO Box 91956 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
