Friend,

Allow me to break down how the Media Research Center took down Chris Cuomo from CNN.

**The Art Of Taking Down a Leftwing Media Scumbag: A Step By Step Guide**

* **FIRST:** Chris Cuomo used his position as a host on CNN to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic... but that's not the worst part.

Chris Cuomo used his position at CNN to LIE about Gov. Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations in order to keep him in elected office and save his career.

* **NEXT:** The Media Research Center (MRC) quickly realized Chris Cuomo was abusing his position at CNN to cover up his brother's disgusting actions as governor and as a sexual predator. MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo's coverage and EXPOSED his lies on social media.

Over the past several months, MRC has tracked every move the Cuomo's have made in coordination with each other and mounted a public pressure campaign to hold these men accountable. We have DOZENS OF HOURS of his lies recorded on video, tracked his statements, and it's all documented on our websites.

* **FINALLY:** After MONTHS of demanding answers and pressuring the media to hold Chris Cuomo accountable for his biased and unethical coverage, the network finally FIRED Chris Cuomo from his role at CNN.

[** The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization exposing the Leftwing media's bias, holding them accountable, and WINNING the fight. Please invest in MRC's efforts by donating $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount today >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpo9pebjas64p58i7ttoa90ltku1a5k6p3c29nh0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3i6cor0cdh2bs)

While MRC has successfully shattered the trust the American people have in the media... the media have become more agenda-driven and even more influential.

Fake News machines such as the New York Times, CNN, MSNBC, and NBC are attempting to determine our elections, enact socialism, keep sexual predators in office (such as Andrew Cuomo), and pass legislation.

The Leftwing media has become one of our Republic's greatest threats.

As the Founder and President of the Media Research Center, I have committed my life's work to exposing leftwing bias in the media.

Americans must know the truth about these media outlets.

Cancel culture, Big Tech, and the Leftwing media must be stopped... and the Media Research Center can do it.

Friend, my goal is to raise $10,000 to empower the MRC to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo and restore integrity in the media. Please help me reach this goal by using one of the donation links I've copied below:

[** Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj8i0letl07a91svd22apbv347b983uip17cr9d8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3i6cor0cdh2bs)

Removing Chris Cuomo from CNN is an amazing victory.

However, you and I must realize there are more 'Chris Cuomos' on major networks or serving as editors for online media.

What else are they covering up?

If CNN was willing to help keep Andrew Cuomo in office, a man who is responsible for killing elderly patients in nursing homes and sexually harassing women, what else are they capable of?

This is NOT the time to step off the gas pedal.

MRC is doubling down and determined to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo.

[** Please join us by helping us reach our goal of raising $10,000 before our big deadline. You can click here to donate any amount. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zblgd9qis5l2d0fs4e0jpmacm0h05vb8pskfjvro_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3i6cor0cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder & President of MRC

Look, John is a proud father, Texan, Marine Corps veteran, and Democrat. **He was born and raised in Southeast San Antonio and is running for Congress to flip TX-23 blue and bring our Texas values to Washington.**

As the son of a working-class Mexican-American family, John has always been committed to giving back to our country. He served 11 years in the U.S. Marine Corps, including two combat tours in Iraq. And when he returned to civilian life, John used the G.I. Bill to go back to school and ultimately earn a master’s degree in public policy.

Since then, John has been focused on empowering community organizations to support veterans and military families. At the U.S. Small Business Administration, he helped veterans start small businesses. At the National Commission on Military, National, and Public Service, he helped develop policies to revive an ethos of service in America.

**We’ll be blunt, Peter:** The real work is just getting started, and we’re going to need your help. clean_body: = Hey Peter, December is the slowest grassroots fundraising month of the year for Democrats like John. = | = = = Our most important FEC fundraising deadline yet is on December 31st. To show Tony Gonzales and his National Republican backers that we are ready to fight in 2022, we must finish the year strong. = Look, John is a proud father, Texan, Marine Corps veteran, and Democrat. He was born and raised in Southeast San Antonio and is running for Congress to flip TX-23 blue and bring our Texas values to Washington. As the son of a working-class Mexican-American family, John has always been committed to giving back to our country. He served 11 years in the U.S. Marine Corps, including two combat tours in Iraq. And when he returned to civilian life, John used the G.I. Bill to go back to school and ultimately earn a master’s degree in public policy. Since then, John has been focused on empowering community organizations to support veterans and military families. At the U.S. Small Business Administration, he helped veterans start small businesses. At the National Commission on Military, National, and Public Service, he helped develop policies to revive an ethos of service in America. We’ll be blunt, Peter: The real work is just getting started, and we’re going to need your help. Together, we must deliver change for the people. name: Rand Paul
subject: re: you know how I know you’re not scared enough?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
DEFEND LIBERTY: REJECT COVID HYSTERIA
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z97lug58f73np5e4rfd16f325lh8n6cksb8kd6j0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp7cptl62p60obmm4pbasb161qe0t3hmdqj9cplejieasbkscrmcob1miq7fctgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661rjad30epimcdb4mdijfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpge1p35c5i6eoh5u)
_**DEFEND LIBERTY: REJECT COVID HYSTERIA**_ **[CHIP IN NOW >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaod2f7sa3qfaj1u6tdsurp0i8snk4anodd3aa80_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3i6aob4cth2bs)** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkrj22sbel1eostqg1vmuk8jfblfuh73chgo3ll0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3i6aob4cth2bs) | |
---
Friend, the COVID hysteria has already gone on too long...

And these power-hungry bureaucrats don’t want to let go!

That’s probably why we’re hearing a lot about this new _spooky_ “omicron variant.”

But let’s be clear \- the omicron variant in South Africa, and now, California, is reported as an illness with MILD symptoms and no one has been hospitalized for it at this point.

**_But of course, Dr. Fauci and Joe Biden are using this as an excuse to take your freedoms before we even know the facts._**

We must stand strong on the side of science and refuse to allow another lockdown, more regulation, or more useless rules._If you ask me, enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight. _
**_By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution_**
__
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100 **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqntq1cedcsatkk3p8qjvihpj6bgbrm3o8hfi140_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75 **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztpa03lmbeeuunl4p8qjaucfugr7q6egrsp8fcjo_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50 **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh3qp86ek2o1d4d3p5r93u2vid240vpu7m1sbg3g_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25 **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zomiib1bc2p6b15ovho0fd74fc59v2jr2a4slf5g_)
**_If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically._**
__
Friend, if we allow this nonsense of the "safety at all costs" narrative to continue, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy power-hungry leaders like Biden and Fauci. EVER.

No matter what “variant” they’re trying to scare us with, freedom must prevail.

That's why I'm putting my foot down. I will not believe the hype. I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, friend.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmh9ubjvpf6bj0dcn1171tvurtt2sv3fqt0mucpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3i6aob4cth2bs)

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
__

| |
---

Friend,
Here’s the deal. We’re still falling short of reaching the critical 1500 individual donations needed to qualify for Maryland’s Fair Campaign Funding program. We have less than 10 days now before our December 15 th deadline, will you help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Not only does this program mean we aren’t taking money from corporations or political organizations -- money that both Nancy and I firmly believe has no place in politics – it also makes your contribution eligible for an incredibly generous matching program explained here. name: Mark Holland (personal)
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas
body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/aa29445a-c956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/a5290dcb-c956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTI5MGRjYi1jOTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebfUiYuwvld-ycDItJsUU4syEr-5KV49mWJfypX7TSQ=&id=103697760)
---
| Friends, I want to take the time to thank you for your gracious support of my young, grassroots campaign.

We had a spectacular showing of support during our important End-of-Month fundraising deadline and came really close to reaching our fundraising goal! I truly could not have done it without you. So thank you. Thank you for showing up for Kansas and believing in a better future for our state, and for our country.

My campaign is people powered, and we truly climb closer to our goal of securing victory in the 2022 elections with every small dollar donation. Every dollar counts towards finding more incredible staff, organizing dedicated volunteers, and pushing forward to match our deep-pocketed opponent in next year’s election.

Supporting my campaign means you support a rational, common-sense approach to politics. Because friends, we all know there is no Republican or Democrat way to pave a street. **_What's important is that the job gets done._**

We still have a long way to go, but I know if hardworking people like you are standing beside me, we can achieve it together.

Thank you for standing with me,

Mark

So thank you. Thank you for showing up for Kansas and believing in a better future for our state, and for our country. My campaign is people powered, and we truly climb closer to our goal of securing victory in the 2022 elections with every small dollar donation. Every dollar counts towards finding more incredible staff, organizing dedicated volunteers, and pushing forward to match our deep-pocketed opponent in next year’s election. Supporting my campaign means you support a rational, common-sense approach to politics. Because friends, we all know there is no Republican or Democrat way to pave a street. name: Angel Montalvo for Congress 2022
subject: Organizing 101: Building Capacity for Political Action w/ Angel Montalvo
body:
Hey Friends!

Thank you to all who were able to attend last night's meeting! We got to see community members connect and discuss what it is we are fighting for in our communities. If you weren't able to make it this time, no worries! We will be hosting our next meeting on **December 12, 2021 @ 6:00PM ET.**

In the meantime, here's a recap on what you can do until the next meeting:

1\. **Fundraising Challenge:** We have a goal to reach 10,000 by the end of the quarter and are asking for all hands on deck! Share and contribute [HERE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/montalvoforcongress?refcode=organizing101)! We challenge you to see how much You can raise by spreading the message around you. Whether it be texting friends, canvassing in your community or sharing on social media, let's see if we can reach this goal together!

2\. **Bringing a +1:** On December 12, 2021 we will be hosting the next workshop in the volunteer program. We challenge you each to bring a +1 with you! If you're feeling really ambitious, why not try bringing +5?

Thank you all again for all the support! The only way we will have change in our community is by working together, and you all continue to show up and prove that we can do this!

Let's speak truth to power. Let's show them who the real power is!

Here are some things to keep in mind:
» In order to get the Speaker's gavel, McCarthy has been kowtowing to the far-right and defending Trump's role in the Capitol insurrection.

» McCarthy made amends with Marjorie Taylor Greene and promised her committees back, despite her previous comments advocating violence against Nancy Pelosi and Barack Obama, denying the Sept. 11 attacks, and alleging that a Jewish space laser started wildfires in California.

» Meanwhile, the Central Valley is suffering. You may not know this, but it's one of the most underserved communities in the state, which makes McCarthy's behavior all the more repulsive.
We need to craft the best strategy possible to reach voters where they're at. But in order to do that, we need to know exactly what you think so that we can develop new angles:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Haugaard?=
subject: Kristi Noem is spending YOUR money on herself--AGAIN
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Fiscal conservatives across South Dakota are shining a light on the wasteful spending antics of Governor Noem.

The press is also beginning to notice. [CLICK HERE to read the latest](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=e76f0da0aa&e=c654cab7e1).

Most recently, The Argus Leader released a report on November 29th detailing Governor Kristi Noem’s use of _**$68,000 taxpayer dollars**_ to redecorate the South Dakota Governor’s Residence.

$8,100 of that went to buying a sauna (plus the cost of installing it!) and $13,000 went to new rugs. One of those rugs cost $4,000 by itself. **Those are taxpayer dollars— _your dollars._**

This kind of excess splurging during times of surging prices and low economic confidence makes it clear that Noem isn’t just out of touch – she’s out of line.

The people of South Dakota elected what they thought was a fiscal conservative. Instead, we got a career politician, with an eye towards running for president,_**spending $130,000 of your dollars to build a new studio for doing her own TV interviews.**_

It’s shameful and it’s an irresponsible use of taxpayers’ money.

With these extravagant taxpayer funded luxury items, Governor Noem is proving to be no fiscal conservative.

>From this personal spending to her ill-advised taxpayer-funded media campaigns, everything seems to be meant to boost her own image and appease the many lobbyists who haunt the hallways of the people’s House in Pierre.

**My campaign is focused on transparency, genuine leadership, and putting South Dakotans first**.

As you can see, we’re not afraid to tell the truth. Will you help me get the truth out with a donation today? We need YOUR help so South Dakotans can know the truth.

Click on the amount that works best for you.
---
| **[$25

$75

$200

$500](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=40d921c4ac&e=c654cab7e1)**
---
| Best Regards,

\- Steve Haugaard

_Republican Candidate for Governor of South Dakota_

**** The representative of New Mexico’s 2nd District has had an extreme week, team. First, far-right **Rep. Yvette Herrell tweeted her support for overturning _Roe v. Wade_** , a landmark Supreme Court case that has guaranteed legal abortion access in the United States since 1973. Then, **she called for the continued construction of Donald Trump’s ineffective and wasteful southern border wall** instead of focusing on real immigration reform. And at the end of the week, Herrell voted against a spending bill, joining fringe Republicans in **voting to shut down the government in protest of the federal vaccine mandate.** Yvette Herrell has made it clear: she’s anti-choice, anti-immigrant, and anti-vaccine. Simply put, she’s too extreme for NM-02. [**In eleven months, we can elect a Democratic leader who will defend reproductive freedom, support compassionate immigration reform, and listen to science. Wade , a landmark Supreme Court case that has guaranteed legal abortion access in the United States since 1973. Then, she called for the continued construction of Donald Trump’s ineffective and wasteful southern border wall instead of focusing on real immigration reform. And at the end of the week, Herrell voted against a spending bill, joining fringe Republicans in voting to shut down the government in protest of the federal vaccine mandate.** Yvette Herrell has made it clear: she’s anti-choice, anti-immigrant, and anti-vaccine. name: Never Again PAC
subject: A reflection on the final day of Hanukkah
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Today is the final day of Hanukkah and we hope that all who observed had a peaceful and happy celebration. With the end of Hanukkah today and the anniversary of the U.S. entering World War II later this week, we can't help but reflect on the deep connection between fascism and anti-Semitism. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39400879/319673284/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwNjE5YjFiLWNmNTYtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SoxxaB9fTsG9SNG_ldyvWIyDDhiMzBKrBCvC54biIG8=&emci=b0bd3c51-5154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=40619b1b-cf56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16335001) Team,

Today is the final day of Hanukkah and we hope that all who observed had a peaceful and happy celebration.

With the end of Hanukkah and the anniversary of the U.S. entering World War II later this week, we can't help but reflect on the deep connection between fascism and anti-Semitism.

From Germany in the 1940s to our country today, fascism and anti-Semitism have gone hand in hand. Within our own government, there are elected officials who actively undermine our democracy while espousing hateful rhetoric.

Just earlier this year, Treason Caucus member Marjorie Taylor Greene pushed anti-Semitic conspiracy theories and compared COVID-19 safety measures to the Holocaust. Paul Gosar hosted a fundraiser with a prominent white nationalist and Holocaust denier. Matt Gaetz tweeted his support of an anti-Semitic conspiracy theory.

We could go on, but we think you get the idea.

Many of the same people who voted to overturn the results of a free and fair election are also actively pushing or embracing hateful and anti-Semitic ideas. We cannot allow these members to remain in positions of power any longer.

Here at Never Again PAC we're not just committed to ending American Fascism, we're committed to ending anti-Semitism and all other forms of hate that come along with it. We hope you'll join us in this important fight.

Thank you,

Never Again PAC

| PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
---
Never Again PAC
PO Box 2153
Purcellville, VA 20134
United States
---
If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/b0bd3c51-5154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/40619b1b-cf56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwNjE5YjFiLWNmNTYtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SoxxaB9fTsG9SNG_ldyvWIyDDhiMzBKrBCvC54biIG8=&id=117934094).
---

clean_body: Please give just $5 to help us close out 2021 as strongly as possible. | Peter, Thousands of patriots, including your friends, neighbors, and fellow conservatives, have stepped up to support my re-election campaign this year. But I was just going over a list of all of our 2021 Founding Members, and I noticed you haven’t accepted your membership or supported my campaign at all this year. I hate to think that I’d lost your support. You were one of my biggest grassroots champions in 2020, and you played a critical role in our upset victory over my radical Democrat opponent. With 2022 around the corner, I wanted to reach out and you personally to ask you to join my campaign one more time before the end of the year. This next month is going to make or break my re-election chances next November. We’ve got to stay on budget and finish the year in the strongest position we possibly can so we’re ready for whatever Pelosi and the Left throw at us in 2022. And we can’t do that without the support of grassroots Americans like you, Peter. $5 may not seem like a lot compared to Pelosi’s millions, but when every conservative does their part, it adds up quickly. The fate of my bellwether congressional district -- and the House majority -- is in your hands. I hope that you’ll come through for me like you did in 2020. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Big Vote Coming on Vax Mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| |
---
Peter

When Joe Biden announced his illegal, unconstitutional vaccine mandate, Senate conservatives didn't whine or fidget. They acted:

▶︎ Within hours of the mandate's announcement, Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) had drafted a letter telling Senate leadership that he would _**not vote for any government spending bills that funded the vaccine mandate.**_

▶︎ By the time Sen. Braun's letter was released, a dozen other members had signed on.

▶︎ As more Republicans in the House and the Senate joined the defund fight, _**all 50 Senate Republicans**_ took the next step and triggered a process to force a December vote in the House and Senate to rescind Biden's vaccine order. Now _**all Democrats**_ will have to go on record defending Biden's un-American policy - or the mandate will be toast.

This is how you win a fight in Washington. One punch... then another... then another. Unlike the Left, conservatives can't wait for the media or Hollywood or Big Tech to fight for us. We have to do it ourselves.

That can be daunting in a city hostile to conservative values. But as you know, and as Senate Conservatives Fund has been arguing for years, **COURAGE COUNTS**.

**[ Please help us elect more courageous conservatives! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58947891:JhZuTsEcN:m:1:3253819041:56BFBB90BDFB78D113326089EF0D825F:r) **

When a federal appeals court ordered Biden to halt his vaccine mandate pending further litigation, the White House initially and smugly told federal agencies to ignore the court.

But Senate conservatives didn't back down. And as more Republicans joined the fight, the Biden Administration reversed course and have now suspended enforcement of the mandate!

Thanks to conservative leadership, for now, **THERE IS NO BIDEN VACCINE MANDATE**.

None of this would be happening if Senate conservatives answered Biden's assault on our freedoms with empty tweets and press releases. **They are SENATORS, not just pundits.** And they acted like it!

On this defining vaccine mandate issue, conservatives are leading and Republicans are winning.

** [ We need your help to support conservative leadership in the Senate so please make a contribution to SCF today! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58947891:JhZuTsEcN:m:1:3253819041:56BFBB90BDFB78D113326089EF0D825F:r) **

SCF is proud to support Mike Braun and his colleagues leading the fight against the Biden vaccine mandate. And we will continue to support Senate candidates who are ready to join the fight.

_The defunding vote is coming soon._

**[ Please help us push the Senate to join conservatives in stopping Biden's vaccine mandate. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58947891:JhZuTsEcN:m:1:3253819041:56BFBB90BDFB78D113326089EF0D825F:r) **

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund
|

|
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Art Of Taking Down A Leftwing Media Scumbag
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949425:JROs8sELN:m:1:3298722022:90B46B013DD6400061D30A1F01CA1237:r)
Peter,

Allow me to break down how the Media Research Center took down Chris Cuomo from CNN.

**The Art Of Taking Down a Leftwing Media Scumbag: A Step By Step Guide**

* **FIRST:** Chris Cuomo used his position as a host on CNN to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic... but that's not the worst part.

Chris Cuomo used his position at CNN to LIE about Gov. Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations in order to keep him in elected office and save his career.

* **NEXT:** The Media Research Center (MRC) quickly realized Chris Cuomo was abusing his position at CNN to cover up his brother's disgusting actions as governor and as a sexual predator. MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo's coverage and EXPOSED his lies on social media.

Over the past several months, MRC has tracked every move the Cuomo's have made in coordination with each other and mounted a public pressure campaign to hold these men accountable. We have DOZENS OF HOURS of his lies recorded on video, tracked his statements, and it's all documented on our websites.

* **FINALLY:** After MONTHS of demanding answers and pressuring the media to hold Chris Cuomo accountable for his biased and unethical coverage, the network finally FIRED Chris Cuomo from his role at CNN.

[**The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization exposing the Leftwing media 's bias, holding them accountable, and WINNING the fight. clean_body: Brad’s 54th birthday is tomorrow. | = Friends -- Brad’s 54th birthday is tomorrow. This year, I thought of the perfect gift. I’m hoping to surprise Brad with $5,400 in small-dollar donations raised from supporters just like you who believe in this team and know what electing Brad would mean for Wisconsin, and the country. As one of our best supporters, I know it would mean a lot to Brad if he sees your name. = | = = = = = = Brad is one of the kindest, most selfless people I know, and he’d never ask for something like this. But as his wife -- and a resident of western Wisconsin -- I know how important it is to see him in Congress. For more than 30 years, I’ve watched him put his heart and soul into serving our state and helping others. I will be devastated if I see our Capitol Insurrectionist opponent elected. = Thank you so much, = Betty | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

Friend -- We're at a major inflection point.

My Democratic colleagues and I are doing everything we can to address issues like criminal justice reform, climate change, and voting rights, but Senate Republicans have made it clear they’re going to do everything they can to take back the Senate majority and block _all_ of our progress.

**These are fights I won’t back down from, and I need to know that you’re with me.**

**[Please, chip in $5 to make sure Democrats keep the Senate out of Mitch McConnell’s hands. I’ve set a goal to help the DSCC raise $20,000 by midnight, and your donation will put us one step closer:](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211206-Booker-Bookerv2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211206-Booker-Bookerv2-ETG-sl1&akid=2145%2E9716520%2EeCm2CZ)**

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211206-Booker-Bookerv2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211206-Booker-Bookerv2-ETG-sl1&akid=2145%2E9716520%2EeCm2CZ)
---

America is facing some hard battles right now. And while my Democratic colleagues and I are working to fix these problems with thoughtful legislation, Mitch McConnell and his allies are hell-bent on stopping us.

But I won’t lose hope, because our most monumental achievements have come when our leaders summoned the courage to rise above petty divisions for a larger moral mission.

**That's why I feel compelled to tell you: This isn't just about winning an election. It's about making long-lasting positive change for every single American.**

We must overcome Mitch McConnell's power-hungry cruelty with courageous empathy. We must overpower Republicans’ destructive partisanship by uniting America under a banner of justice.

If we win, we have a chance to continue that mission, and together we can make sure it's a triumphant one for Democrats. So please, I'll ask one more time: **[Will you chip in $5 or more to help defend our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211206-Booker-Bookerv2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211206-Booker-Bookerv2-ETG-sl1&akid=2145%2E9716520%2EeCm2CZ)**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Cory Booker

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Do you stand with America’s parents?
body:
The conservative victories in Virginia proved that Americans will do anything to protect their children.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kfs4PQmB3fuY5i09gSS0F3sm-nAfw_lZDIsYwJ6MfDNE9Qwxud5CYuPTl-DKMKBpbLbLqUJyZ0yBWmNUWC4tcSzUd1rWZ5PiPxnwz6JZ3LG3-tVyvK5DauBt1F-YvfsbWXclqL9vVJ-DmXeaPLznjfb4lT-TIvC9gqdPZP5QayclnMjUBh5-D22G4e47t7axW28txvQizV-Hf8IvsX_pFw==&c=TIydAyP_-6yBYRgjULtKGffm7NFhRnw7MaQCiH2CkN0czdHW5BmGOg==&ch=xweIcO11-iSwR5bl13klDSG3bxL1gVVgBkL2ckSt2KdE1OPKuVkkzQ==)
---
| Friend,
The conservative victories in Virginia proved that Americans will do anything to protect their children. Despite the liberal push for indoctrination of children in our education system, the proud parents of Virginia stood strong.
However, the fight to protect parental rights isn't over. The Radical Left has doubled down, trying to push their racist Critical Race Theory in every state. I am standing on the side of America's parents in the fight to protect parental rights and to keep this dangerous, divisive ideology out of our schools.
---
| | | [SUPPORT THE FIGHT FOR PARENTS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kfs4PQmB3fuY5i09gSS0F3sm-nAfw_lZDIsYwJ6MfDNE9Qwxud5CYuPTl-DKMKBpbLbLqUJyZ0yBWmNUWC4tcSzUd1rWZ5PiPxnwz6JZ3LG3-tVyvK5DauBt1F-YvfsbWXclqL9vVJ-DmXeaPLznjfb4lT-TIvC9gqdPZP5QayclnMjUBh5-D22G4e47t7axW28txvQizV-Hf8IvsX_pFw==&c=TIydAyP_-6yBYRgjULtKGffm7NFhRnw7MaQCiH2CkN0czdHW5BmGOg==&ch=xweIcO11-iSwR5bl13klDSG3bxL1gVVgBkL2ckSt2KdE1OPKuVkkzQ==)
---
| CRT and socialism have no place in our education system. When parents exercised their First Amendment rights against the woke school boards, Biden militarized the DOJ and FBI to target and intimidate anyone who disagrees with him.
America's parents have the right to be involved in their child's education and shouldn't be attacked for doing so.
Parents won in Virginia, but the Left is willing to do anything to control their children. They will be back, trying to shove CRT and socialism into other states' education systems.
Can I count on you to join my fight to keep CRT out of our schools and support parental involvement in their child's education?
---
| | | [STAND WITH PARENTS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kfs4PQmB3fuY5i09gSS0F3sm-nAfw_lZDIsYwJ6MfDNE9Qwxud5CYuPTl-DKMKBpbLbLqUJyZ0yBWmNUWC4tcSzUd1rWZ5PiPxnwz6JZ3LG3-tVyvK5DauBt1F-YvfsbWXclqL9vVJ-DmXeaPLznjfb4lT-TIvC9gqdPZP5QayclnMjUBh5-D22G4e47t7axW28txvQizV-Hf8IvsX_pFw==&c=TIydAyP_-6yBYRgjULtKGffm7NFhRnw7MaQCiH2CkN0czdHW5BmGOg==&ch=xweIcO11-iSwR5bl13klDSG3bxL1gVVgBkL2ckSt2KdE1OPKuVkkzQ==)

Despite the liberal push for indoctrination of children in our education system, the proud parents of Virginia stood strong. However, the fight to protect parental rights isn't over. The Radical Left has doubled down, trying to push their racist Critical Race Theory in every state. I am standing on the side of America's parents in the fight to protect parental rights and to keep this dangerous, divisive ideology out of our schools. | | | == | CRT and socialism have no place in our education system. When parents exercised their First Amendment rights against the woke school boards, Biden militarized the DOJ and FBI to target and intimidate anyone who disagrees with him. America's parents have the right to be involved in their child's education and shouldn't be attacked for doing so. Parents won in Virginia, but the Left is willing to do anything to control their children. They will be back, trying to shove CRT and socialism into other states' education systems. Can I count on you to join my fight to keep CRT out of our schools and support parental involvement in their child's education? | | | == | For Florida and America, | == | Kat Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Letitia
subject: I've sued Trump 76 times.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Peter,

No matter what, I will _always_ stand up to the powerful on behalf of the vulnerable. That's exactly what I did when I was elected the first Black female attorney general of New York. And that's what I'll do if elected governor of the great state of New York.
But I can't do it without your help.******We've set an ambitious but crucial $10,000 fundraising goal to keep up the fight in my campaign, but we're still falling drastically short of where we need to be by midnight tomorrow.**[**Please, can you spare $5, $10, anything you can right now to keep this fight going? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39402788/319683162/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fA-VpYA0vgFaxdDlzRWtJhvRXDQ6eYEBb4Vm8Wh-H6w=)

I firmly believe that _no one_ – no matter how wealthy or powerful – is above the law. Not social media monopolies, not Big Pharma, not the gun lobby, not Donald Trump. And I've fought to defend the rights of everyday Americans against these interests time and time again:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39402789/319683163/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fA-VpYA0vgFaxdDlzRWtJhvRXDQ6eYEBb4Vm8Wh-H6w=) (But who's counting?). I sued him every time he trampled on the rights of New Yorkers and Americans across the country. I fought against his malicious, bigoted administration to protect women, immigrants, people of color, members of the LGBTQ+ community, workers, and countless others from his attacks. I even brought cases against Trump personally, with an investigation of the Trump Organization which led to a criminal indictment. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39402790/319683164/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fA-VpYA0vgFaxdDlzRWtJhvRXDQ6eYEBb4Vm8Wh-H6w=) I found and revealed the devastating undercounting of COVID-19 deaths in New York nursing homes, and I fought to ensure the health and safety that every single New Yorker deserves. I called on the state to report the additional deaths, improve infection control, and boost staffing – because all New Yorkers deserve to live and work in safe environments. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39402791/319683165/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fA-VpYA0vgFaxdDlzRWtJhvRXDQ6eYEBb4Vm8Wh-H6w=) I didn’t let these prominent social media companies get away with crushing smaller rivals at the expense of everyday users. By taking action, I stood up for millions of consumers and small businesses who were hurt by these companies' illegal behavior. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39402792/319683166/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fA-VpYA0vgFaxdDlzRWtJhvRXDQ6eYEBb4Vm8Wh-H6w=) By filing the nation's most comprehensive lawsuit against opioid manufacturers and distributors, I was able to deliver up to $1.5 billion to New York communities that have been ravaged by this devastating opioid epidemic. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39402793/319683167/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fA-VpYA0vgFaxdDlzRWtJhvRXDQ6eYEBb4Vm8Wh-H6w=) I pushed for transparency and accountability in an organization that uses its donors as a breeding ground for personal gain – all while putting their profits over the lives of our children – and we emerged victorious over their fraudulent attempt to declare bankruptcy.
I don't just _believe_ that no one is above the law – I use my office to _act_ on it, and I have for years. And as governor, I will remain committed to holding those who abuse their authority accountable, no matter how powerful.

**But we have a long fight ahead of us, Peter, and I'm only just getting started. With you by my side, I know we can win this together.****[So please, before midnight tomorrow night, will you make a $5 donation to help us reach our $10,000 goal and move our state forward with real, transformative change for every last New Yorker? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39402794/319683168/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fA-VpYA0vgFaxdDlzRWtJhvRXDQ6eYEBb4Vm8Wh-H6w=)**

I can't thank you enough for your support.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39402795/319683169/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fA-VpYA0vgFaxdDlzRWtJhvRXDQ6eYEBb4Vm8Wh-H6w=)
Letitia James
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e9ddf193-4654-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/2e257d30-d856-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fA-VpYA0vgFaxdDlzRWtJhvRXDQ6eYEBb4Vm8Wh-H6w=&id=128810098) James for NY
PO Box 476
New York, NY 10034

name: Rep. Demings
subject: GREAT news, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
This Senate race is my toughest fight yet – and I need your help
| | |
---
Sorry to add another email to your inbox, friend, but **I have big news to share:**
A new poll shows Marco Rubio and me _neck and neck_ in this critical Senate race. We're gaining ground – but we're still in the margin of error, and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says 2022 could be a red wave.
**I've overcome long odds before. **The daughter of a maid and a janitor, I became the first in my family to go to college. I became Orlando's first woman police chief – and I even prosecuted a corrupt president for his high crimes against our democracy.

**But there's no question that this Senate race is my toughest fight yet – and I need your help to go ALL IN and flip Florida blue. **
The GOP has already raised more than $76 MILLION to defeat Democrats like me, flip the Senate and erase all of the critical progress we're making. Rubio himself is breaking GOP fundraising records, raising more than $6 MILLION in just the last few months.
Senate control is on the line in Florida – and the GOP is terrified that we can defeat Marco Rubio. Florida's Senate seat will come down to who has the resources to turn out more voters, which is why I'm personally asking you right now: **Will you rush a donation to help me hit my $50,000 goal by midnight tonight, defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Senate majority?**
**[Please, friend, I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to help me compete and win. Whether you give $5 or $25, every dollar will help me keep pace with Rubio in the polls, flip Florida blue and defend the Senate for Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39402847/319683443/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1827-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzI1N2QzMC1kODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vLcw9URPYgPaS7DMwraymbno5xGpMlDmsrg6cgqLGzo=)**

clean_body: This Senate race is my toughest fight yet – and I need your help | | | Sorry to add another email to your inbox, friend, but I have big news to share: A new poll shows Marco Rubio and me neck and neck in this critical Senate race. We're gaining ground – but we're still in the margin of error, and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says 2022 could be a red wave. I've overcome long odds before. The daughter of a maid and a janitor, I became the first in my family to go to college. I became Orlando's first woman police chief – and I even prosecuted a corrupt president for his high crimes against our democracy. But there's no question that this Senate race is my toughest fight yet – and I need your help to go ALL IN and flip Florida blue. The GOP has already raised more than $76 MILLION to defeat Democrats like me, flip the Senate and erase all of the critical progress we're making. Rubio himself is breaking GOP fundraising records, raising more than $6 MILLION in just the last few months. Senate control is on the line in Florida – and the GOP is terrified that we can defeat Marco Rubio. Florida's Senate seat will come down to who has the resources to turn out more voters, which is why I'm personally asking you right now: Will you rush a donation to help me hit my $50,000 goal by midnight tonight, defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Senate majority? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I'm so grateful to have you by my side on this journey. It's because of you that I know we can_ win this race – and we will. Val Demings | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Art Of Taking Down A Leftwing Media Scumbag
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949472:60vaksEN3:m:1:3253819041:0956D64A56513ABC83F6E13991BCAEE3:r)
Peter,

Allow me to break down how the Media Research Center took down Chris Cuomo from CNN.

**The Art Of Taking Down a Leftwing Media Scumbag: A Step By Step Guide**

* **FIRST:** Chris Cuomo used his position as a host on CNN to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic... but that's not the worst part.

Chris Cuomo used his position at CNN to LIE about Gov. Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations in order to keep him in elected office and save his career.

* **NEXT:** The Media Research Center (MRC) quickly realized Chris Cuomo was abusing his position at CNN to cover up his brother's disgusting actions as governor and as a sexual predator. MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo's coverage and EXPOSED his lies on social media.

Over the past several months, MRC has tracked every move the Cuomo's have made in coordination with each other and mounted a public pressure campaign to hold these men accountable. We have DOZENS OF HOURS of his lies recorded on video, tracked his statements, and it's all documented on our websites.

* **FINALLY:** After MONTHS of demanding answers and pressuring the media to hold Chris Cuomo accountable for his biased and unethical coverage, the network finally FIRED Chris Cuomo from his role at CNN.

[**The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization exposing the Leftwing media 's bias, holding them accountable, and WINNING the fight. Please invest in MRC's efforts by donating $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount today >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949472:60vaksEN3:m:1:3253819041:0956D64A56513ABC83F6E13991BCAEE3:r)

While MRC has successfully shattered the trust the American people have in the media... the media have become more agenda-driven and even more influential.

Fake News machines such as the New York Times, CNN, MSNBC, and NBC are attempting to determine our elections, enact socialism, keep sexual predators in office (such as Andrew Cuomo), and pass legislation.

The Leftwing media has become one of our Republic's greatest threats.

As the Founder and President of the Media Research Center, I have committed my life's work to exposing leftwing bias in the media.

Americans must know the truth about these media outlets.

Cancel culture, Big Tech, and the Leftwing media must be stopped... and the Media Research Center can do it.

FIRSTNAME, my goal is to raise $10,000 to empower the MRC to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo and restore integrity in the media. Please help me reach this goal by using one of the donation links I've copied below:

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949472:60vaksEN3:m:1:3253819041:0956D64A56513ABC83F6E13991BCAEE3:r)

Removing Chris Cuomo from CNN is an amazing victory.

However, you and I must realize there are more 'Chris Cuomos' on major networks or serving as editors for online media.

What else are they covering up?

If CNN was willing to help keep Andrew Cuomo in office, a man who is responsible for killing elderly patients in nursing homes and sexually harassing women, what else are they capable of?

This is NOT the time to step off the gas pedal.

MRC is doubling down and determined to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo.

[**Please join us by helping us reach our goal of raising $10,000 before our big deadline. You can click here to donate any amount. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949472:60vaksEN3:m:1:3253819041:0956D64A56513ABC83F6E13991BCAEE3:r)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder & President of MRC

name: Erica Smith
subject: My story begins right here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Our
campaign has been gaining a lot of momentum — so I want to take a moment
to share my story. It’s important that you know a little bit about me and
why I’m in this fight to represent North Carolina’s 2nd District.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29276?refcode=em20211206-667&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=667%2E3698%2EWbVWbJ ]When you finish reading, will you chip in $5 to ensure we
have the resources to sustain our momentum and win this race?

My story begins right here in our community.

I grew up on a rural dirt road in Northampton County — the same dirt road
that my mother was raised on. My father served in the Air Force. My five
siblings and I picked corn and cucumbers on the family farm, and I saw my
family face bankruptcy when I was a little girl.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29276?refcode=em20211206-667&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=667%2E3698%2EWbVWbJ ][IMG]

When I got older, I moved back home to take care of my dad after he got
really sick, and I’ve lived the heart-breaking experience of losing a
child.

I’ve faced the hardest days of my life right here, and this community has
always been there for me.

Now, our community is being confronted with a GOP racial gerrymander
that’s trying to rob us of representation. I’m running for Congress
because our community won't be silenced.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29276?refcode=em20211206-667&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=667%2E3698%2EWbVWbJ ]If you can afford to, please make a contribution today to make sure we
run the strongest race possible and win this wide-open U.S. House seat for
the people.

I understand the kind of representation we need right now. I've lived the
struggles facing so many working-class families across our district — but
so few people who understand these challenges are in the halls of power.
That's why, if I'm elected, I’ll fight tirelessly for universal broadband,
universal healthcare, a $15 minimum wage, and more.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29276?refcode=em20211206-667&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=667%2E3698%2EWbVWbJ ][IMG]

But I’ll admit: This won’t be an easy race to win. NC-02 is now just one
of a handful of swing districts across the country, and Republicans will
pour big money into this race to try to win it and flip the U.S. House.

That’s why I’m asking: [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29276?refcode=em20211206-667&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=667%2E3698%2EWbVWbJ ]Can you make a contribution to our movement
today? Every dollar raised will help us demonstrate that we have the power
of the people on our side.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29276?refcode=em20211206-667&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=667%2E3698%2EWbVWbJ ]Donate $5

Thank you for having faith in me,

Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211206-667-footer&t=1025&refcode2=667_3698_WbVWbJ&akid=667%2E3698%2EWbVWbJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=667%2E3698%2EWbVWbJ

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: James Tarantin
subject: Hanukkah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Fellow American, we have to protect our traditional values. |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=de3c895200e54218b593aaafd12398d3&_e=kZkYbWHSZwiC33xP0sYKB9kOZlatf-n4lk449pl9WNdB_2hXoHHtWgFROIcd8BHP1paqY49W7lDIOty795N1AFuIvndupUNx3xP07wYKglI0tfK29NK4lHwgfIFAWPTsFKXFAdDnB351ZsThNp3N3z8ERZ_wUkLJlUzXZs0chq28z71b_vI0Kn7UgpEy4K7vfjbYqqyHba0pztUsN8UgDxGsDAgs2MezrFYA9UT1qaG2U_XnjsiNQkgxs9pfvXGmT3l72HUTroz0LWe-t4ob3DACkcztbP_SVEhhCh4ZWk01R9cHViLdNgIZUqZOogTYVfuaEEm7aCFRzaAXfl7_igkMKHePezGUgBS1yYRLCogbTWqn9fv4X7NEEbySuNCnCboT6S3eeLsfjmlEOO7-gWk35xpLll1PhafIpSCjM1k5g5BhtRcALDGM3TkpgPbL5ySpXerMWiGtwb5mSx6dKWguYWQzmGPV18JPkGrzhex1zU-7_nUts4tPDHLJR1u2)

It’s Hanukkah Fellow American,

_**To me and many others, Hanukkah represents a divine miracle that shows God comes before government.**_ It’s about celebrating and protecting our traditional values, and in America, that means our Judeo-Christian values that founded these United States.

These values are the reason I got involved in politics and made me who I am. **I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate****, and I’m running because much like Hanukkah, America is seen as a miracle to the world.**

We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. [**We have to stand up for the values that made this nation great to begin with, are you with me Fellow American?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=de3c895200e54218b593aaafd12398d3&_e=kZkYbWHSZwiC33xP0sYKB9kOZlatf-n4lk449pl9WNdB_2hXoHHtWgFROIcd8BHP1paqY49W7lDIOty795N1AFuIvndupUNx3xP07wYKglI0tfK29NK4lHwgfIFAWPTsFKXFAdDnB351ZsThNp3N3z8ERZ_wUkLJlUzXZs0chq28z71b_vI0Kn7UgpEy4K7vfjbYqqyHba0pztUsN8UgDxGsDAgs2MezrFYA9UT1qaG2U_XnjsiNQkgxs9pfvXGmT3l72HUTroz0LWe-t4ob3Hc7vWolHdex3B38VwlJ4dyrNaLwZe-lZweEAzWqhOkxhePbM88A9yR8FgF8AlOExJyag98H9ViwMtvWzzBwqc8cI0zuv6eKhY2PrAB43zcqvuaYgqG4QmQMQDiCqGn3-6JtpduYTjF1RCYavv7UGciloXSllygeYcsRIV5Lax570qdmsmry1MaecxI0u5AaEDWzzVGj1GK3u6rVzV5QNWyVodaXWXIRcp-P10FeojPD)

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=de3c895200e54218b593aaafd12398d3&_e=kZkYbWHSZwiC33xP0sYKB9kOZlatf-n4lk449pl9WNdB_2hXoHHtWgFROIcd8BHP1paqY49W7lDIOty795N1AFuIvndupUNx3xP07wYKglI0tfK29NK4lHwgfIFAWPTsFKXFAdDnB351ZsThNp3N3z8ERZ_wUkLJlUzXZs0chq28z71b_vI0Kn7UgpEy4K7vfjbYqqyHba0pztUsN8UgDxGsDAgs2MezrFYA9UT1qaG2U_XnjsiNQkgxs9pfvXGmT3l72HUTroz0LWe-t4ob3CrlSBlZLO6cKhj94lr2gsR1mk7AiWH6t5AksuxRzOHw6R8QIr8P3DrgLG7OJkoWw5FmqE_f_ZjSWOwT6Kyhbq9kWCX_yQuTa0J7aeG_vo93CDu1kGlkPopXJSptNThjRMOBLT82QDgrBOVqu7xgbdWHEhF7fCFttMn6bTGaHAykd3CzyGDihc2L10CIHTGzScDMQg66q0IQftCgsHFT_IebhgwGQKYjEFQjhH5KCejn)
**Regardless of whether you celebrate Hanukkah or not, the values of this holiday are the same ones that made America great.** The radical liberals we’re dealing with today would never admit that. Hanukkah to them is a political talking point for social media, while quietly pushing anti-Israel policies and extending their hands to terrorists.

**Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan, and now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with their leadership which is full of internationally wanted terrorists?**

They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with. **I would never support that, and I don’t think you could either.**

name: Gary Black
subject: Here’s what we know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/9fe9cdfd1f99ffa5/8f4671769550fd7ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia to take America back. With less than a month to go in 2021, here’s what we know about where things stand: **

---
1. This race will decide who controls the U.S. Senate.

2. A Raphael Warnock / Stacey Abrams ticket will have **_unlimited resources_** to attack Republicans and cement their power in Georgia.

3. We MUST put forward a Republican nominee who can defeat Warnock.

4. **I am the**** _only_****Republican who can make this race about Warnock — and that’s the**** _only_****way we can stop him.**

**Friend, I’ve been on the field for Georgia.** I’ve scored for our jobs and economy, for food safety, and for historic disaster relief. ** ** **I’ve won three statewide elections in Georgia, earning more votes than the last two Republican governors on the ticket. **** ** Our team knows how to win in this state, and now there’s more on the line than ever before. **And that’s why we need your help. ****
[It’s essential that we end 2021 with the strongest fundraising showing possible, so if you haven’t contributed yet, I’m asking you to do so _RIGHT NOW_. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/9fe9cdfd1f99ffa5/866211c2197609adc3d6b838967d376c/37793)**
---
[ **RUSH MY DONATION »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/9fe9cdfd1f99ffa5/837b16aa61e1f178c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Ultimately, what we know is that the future of our country hinges on defeating Raphael Warnock and taking back the U.S. Senate.
And for us to win, we all must join the fight on the field. [**I hope you’ll do so now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/9fe9cdfd1f99ffa5/66c02aa94e702749c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/9fe9cdfd1f99ffa5/f07e6c9e88431b24c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[ **RUSH MY DONATION »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/9fe9cdfd1f99ffa5/b23de7e8bfef996cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[ **DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/9fe9cdfd1f99ffa5/c95fa61f77e94391c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=9fe9cdfd1f99ffa5&d=3297886ddf72f5b9c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=9fe9cdfd1f99ffa5).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of Dec. 6th: Fight the vax mandate & more!
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* Submit and send your OSHA vax mandate comment
Call both of your Senators with 2 messages
* Holding 80 Republicans accountable for vax database vote

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Submit and send your OSHA vax mandate comment**
The deadline to leave a comment opposing the OSHA vax mandate has been extended to January 4, 2022. If you haven’t yet, please submit your comment before Jan. 4th. We have a sample comment below that you can use to help you write yours.

Note: While the courts have temporarily halted the vax mandates, the Biden administration is appealing the decisions and therefore is still putting the pieces in place to implement it, should they win on appeal. This is why we must still leave comments opposing the mandate.

[**Read the summary of the OSHA rule.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
** **
[**Submit your opposition comment to the OSHA rule.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._lAUM9A)

**[View a sample comment to reference.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0NjY0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSNzYW1wbGVvc2hhIn0/6e8nCi-YIkLh3nBu6BqojA)**
|
---
[The Supreme Court heard oral arguments in the pivotal abortion case _Dobbs v. Jackson _last week.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-98y_9Dik5Zfg) This case _ _ revolves around a Mississippi law that bans abortions after the first 15 weeks of pregnancy. Many of the justices expressed skepticism about _Roe v. Wade, _and some observers think it is likely the justices either reverse _Roe _or significantly weaken it.

[The justices asked questions](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0NjY0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/JevPfA_KYmY8RfuhXvVjhQ) about many different issues surrounding the _Dobbs _case, including the importance of precedent, the meaning of viability and changes in science. While the justices will decide the case in the coming days, a decision is unlikely to be issued until next summer.
|
---
**Call both of your Senators with 2 messages**
America cannot afford for the Reconciliation (a.k.a. “Build Back Socialist”) to pass the Senate. Our country can’t afford it financially and we can’t afford it in terms of our freedom and future.

We also cannot allow the vax mandates to be funded. There is another vote in the Senate this week to defund it. Sen. Manchin has said he will vote for this one, and while that is great news, it is tempered by the fact that he knows that even if this got through the House, Biden would veto it. However, the fact that Sen. Manchin is voting for it means we can say that defunding the mandate is now bipartisan. So, let’s encourage the vote to happen, and to get as many votes for it as we can to help us in our messaging battle.

So, there are two messages to give your Senators when you call. The nice thing is you can give them both at one time – you don’t have to call two separate times.
1. ******Tell them vote NO on what the Democrats call “Build Back Better,” but we know is actually “Build Back Socialist.”**
2. ******Tell them to vote YES to defund the vaccine mandate.**

**[Find your Senators’ phone numbers.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjEzNDAtYjFkNzBkMDEzMzZjNGZkZmFkOTgyNjI1NDg2NTBkYTAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZpbmQtc2VuYXRvcnM_bWlkPTQ0NjY0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/0W9z-sQdfk76FtOVMAiaNQ)**
|
---
This administration can't seem to help itself when it comes to nominating radical leftists to important positions. President Biden has nominated Dale Ho to the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of New York, even though his credentials are almost entirely ideological. Ho has spent years working for groups like the NAACP and ACLU pushing against commonsense election integrity laws.

He even compared voter ID laws to Jim Crow, saying, "Once again, the nation's promise that all Americans be able to vote free from undue burdens has gone unfulfilled." This lack of objectivity and inflammatory rhetoric disqualify Ho from being a judge.

Biden nominated him partially because of his ties to massive liberal groups. The Sixteen Thirty Fund, [a subsidiary of Arabella Advisors](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0NjY0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/jA4GZiIRCtAcdPg940_19Q), has him on their Supreme Court shortlist and is running ads backing Ho. Other leftist groups like [People for the American Way](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) and the [Leadership Conference on Civil and Human Rights](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Hx9frCI6YNsA9_o1Ew) also support Ho's nomination.

Ho's nomination must fail. Judges should be impartial arbiters of justice, not partisan hacks.
|
---
**Holding 80 Republicans accountable for vax database vote**
Last week, 80 House Republicans voted for a bill that funded a government database to track Americans’ vaccination status. These Republicans are trying to argue they did not vote for that, but that is just spin. They are trying to avoid trouble for this vote, and we need to call them out.

**Look for a special CTA later in the week with action items specific to this issue.** These Republicans would love for this issue to go away, but that’s not going to happen. They must be held accountable.
|
---
Just prior to motorists hitting the road for Thanksgiving, the [White House announced](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-1OKhq8EURW7ekAsqbQ) plans to release 50 million barrels of crude oil from the nation’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve, established in the 1970s to cope with unforeseen oil supply reductions. But there’s nothing unexpected about the pain Americans are experiencing at the pump. President Biden cancelled the Keystone XL Pipeline the day he was inaugurated and has pursued an anti-energy agenda ever since. In fact, the Friday after Thanksgiving, his administration [recommended](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0NjY0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/FHd4mWD-d--fmuO2KVsiLw) that oil and gas companies pay more money to drill on federal lands and waters, a move that will further increase energy prices.

Biden’s release of SPR oil is merely a fig leaf and now Republicans on the Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee are [calling him on it with a bill introduced last week](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) that would prevent the administration from opening the SPR for non-emergency reasons until it develops a plan to boost oil and gas production on federal lands. "The Strategic Production Response Act provides a real solution to the Biden administration’s reckless policies,” said Sen. John Barrasso of Wyoming. “America is stronger and safer when we are energy independent.”
|
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjEzNDAtYjFkNzBkMDEzMzZjNGZkZmFkOTgyNjI1NDg2NTBkYTAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_bWlkPTQ0NjY0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/f2i2O6ne_1EapuJRJl7QFQ)
|
---

The nice thing is you can give them both at one time – you don’t have to call two separate times. 1. ****Tell them vote NO on what the Democrats call “Build Back Better,” but we know is actually “Build Back Socialist.” 2. ****Tell them to vote YES to defund the vaccine mandate. | This administration can't seem to help itself when it comes to nominating radical leftists to important positions. President Biden has nominated Dale Ho to the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of New York, even though his credentials are almost entirely ideological. Ho has spent years working for groups like the NAACP and ACLU pushing against commonsense election integrity laws. He even compared voter ID laws to Jim Crow, saying, "Once again, the nation's promise that all Americans be able to vote free from undue burdens has gone unfulfilled." This lack of objectivity and inflammatory rhetoric disqualify Ho from being a judge. Biden nominated him partially because of his ties to massive liberal groups. The Sixteen Thirty Fund, , has him on their Supreme Court shortlist and is running ads backing Ho. Other leftist groups like and the also support Ho's nomination. Ho's nomination must fail. Judges should be impartial arbiters of justice, not partisan hacks. | Holding 80 Republicans accountable for vax database vote Last week, 80 House Republicans voted for a bill that funded a government database to track Americans’ vaccination status. These Republicans are trying to argue they did not vote for that, but that is just spin. They are trying to avoid trouble for this vote, and we need to call them out. Look for a special CTA later in the week with action items specific to this issue. These Republicans would love for this issue to go away, but that’s not going to happen. They must be held accountable. | Just prior to motorists hitting the road for Thanksgiving, the plans to release 50 million barrels of crude oil from the nation’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve, established in the 1970s to cope with unforeseen oil supply reductions. But there’s nothing unexpected about the pain Americans are experiencing at the pump. President Biden cancelled the Keystone XL Pipeline the day he was inaugurated and has pursued an anti-energy agenda ever since. In fact, the Friday after Thanksgiving, his administration that oil and gas companies pay more money to drill on federal lands and waters, a move that will further increase energy prices. Biden’s release of SPR oil is merely a fig leaf and now Republicans on the Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee are that would prevent the administration from opening the SPR for non-emergency reasons until it develops a plan to boost oil and gas production on federal lands. "The Strategic Production Response Act provides a real solution to the Biden administration’s reckless policies,” said Sen. John Barrasso of Wyoming. “America is stronger and safer when we are energy independent.” | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

body:

# [Sign the petition: Rename "Trump" Hotel to "Obama" Hotel >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T436a91d0-6c9b-4de7-a037-34330a110e66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | The Trump Hotel in DC is reportedly being sold, and the name will be changed. What better way to piss off Trump -- and honor his far superior predecessor -- than to rename it the "Obama" Hotel? Barack Obama was a great president who led our country with dignity. Trump was a foul-mouthed man-baby who embarrassed and endangered us with every action. True leaders like President Obama deserved to be honored – and assclowns like Trump deserve to be mercilessly mocked. So we’re collecting signatures today to honor Obama by calling for the Trump Hotel to be renamed the Obama Hotel. [Sign the petition: Rename "Trump" Hotel to "Obama" Hotel >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb8b4d61-081e-4d5d-8917-dd280146a67d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Alex Stovall
subject: I’m getting attacked for being a black conservative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fd7600030a84fb3ba02d1e2dbf25358&_e=e2Dx20-lClB-NvDtcUIn463S1CLfsytMhhOVH6_458QnQ3JjfvgE1kY3Y7erTk6CL1vISlvnfTjeDbB8VbesPAg9SuM0ZyUcn4dA01fTKxziWAM9Jl6pLtO22KpZ_hDVC702cEVyfFjavJS1HkTUis6Yw2fci8NfNXI2DxfzQiaNI6ulbOhaTwI2NIP1zthLikqO7IIc23n_EgUYoPgUGxJcYkhTGZO8CVha1JSe2YUwxx2MnBZSkGib3cP3zqbXKoy7SVeMwAWo2Su4-moBBtv7_QIhOtJPSGn4XaV7Q0iCCI0adltKrkbNcdQ8SzWDtVlsa5GkExTMyX26LfJiuu3LDZwhG9ij1NPns4hdJrbWGKXVb2yc32mKyd6Uaq71)

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. **I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I’m SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fd7600030a84fb3ba02d1e2dbf25358&_e=e2Dx20-lClB-NvDtcUIn463S1CLfsytMhhOVH6_458QnQ3JjfvgE1kY3Y7erTk6CL1vISlvnfTjeDbB8VbesPAg9SuM0ZyUcn4dA01fTKxziWAM9Jl6pLtO22KpZ_hDVC702cEVyfFjavJS1HkTUis6Yw2fci8NfNXI2DxfzQiZ6gdvkv_091nYGjUkEiv_cDrBs3pJdbs4gvugcoQEaDcITz2cNUtiSkga-Zq3efgjvXbuhcQQ66Pbq2v-pJvFsUBFBuCrXGQE7JLoKtStk6tYg8v4Ri4LNtmgpqzj_h-DiLza53FgvwBtPuFrQs3nQLwAJ6_b2X6g6KsQWRBWPeW708WGhDjRnxvlLSNFFHo_1xv0WLulABaAPkVmYowbQ) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I’m in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fd7600030a84fb3ba02d1e2dbf25358&_e=e2Dx20-lClB-NvDtcUIn463S1CLfsytMhhOVH6_458QnQ3JjfvgE1kY3Y7erTk6CL1vISlvnfTjeDbB8VbesPAg9SuM0ZyUcn4dA01fTKxziWAM9Jl6pLtO22KpZ_hDVC702cEVyfFjavJS1HkTUis6Yw2fci8NfNXI2DxfzQibe-0ulo-qAmmTH9ozRFVjcz4IkOxs46JGJ3WQxlSg7LVTWOnXi-vyu1DHNAJlbIRzFqy1d11gpLVUdfqmbBpgkuvImXMCDXM3KlbMOyrAEg8atawrUh3K8mX4LOa2yQBm7GxRfGAIHlQq2c0RucyUvNhgotjOm8uOLRyvXvtVWygweVYCGba5dJ1uBo3Zr4zgtyUOQtrjYJovhe6IgDaV_)
The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fd7600030a84fb3ba02d1e2dbf25358&_e=e2Dx20-lClB-NvDtcUIn463S1CLfsytMhhOVH6_458QnQ3JjfvgE1kY3Y7erTk6CL1vISlvnfTjeDbB8VbesPAg9SuM0ZyUcn4dA01fTKxziWAM9Jl6pLtO22KpZ_hDVC702cEVyfFjavJS1HkTUis6Yw2fci8NfNXI2DxfzQiZZcMm-OrfDFqY1vid8i4B2cR90hPiqhmpYTyIJ7VkbsEmYrhZqDQn0s7wYlokDlF_Tq0wTymc3_WgBmeOKufy-8KdQH9omdLkCbzOfNrGEt6_0-45yNdjdL36toGQEC8Wg9QAqPo_fQNMVWZbwx8AUBumlYVgyTsVDhBJQ3t8lzVYttjHm98lxCTBRXfwAgvUUSY3zo7fDGKbhLyAHWczO)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fd7600030a84fb3ba02d1e2dbf25358&_e=e2Dx20-lClB-NvDtcUIn463S1CLfsytMhhOVH6_458QnQ3JjfvgE1kY3Y7erTk6CL1vISlvnfTjeDbB8VbesPAg9SuM0ZyUcn4dA01fTKxziWAM9Jl6pLtO22KpZ_hDVC702cEVyfFjavJS1HkTUis6Yw2fci8NfNXI2DxfzQiark__3Jpz1qlH7gGRSbnUmn6Irp2jLSXczEhlfcKtdIp3aafxIKfyruo8On6dpFMySbLUF6O8cepH-4_n5amcG81mSlwnv6iC-XZ19LWs57-FkMmpk1fD-6vueO1DMvTMVtvFu67cTzqeRLHzyR5xrTUp99cQaSqJp4rk01Le-4QyPsE2RO0fFa0zYIz2CSnsMIqDIbEVBHIZ_WUQluwNS)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fd7600030a84fb3ba02d1e2dbf25358&_e=e2Dx20-lClB-NvDtcUIn463S1CLfsytMhhOVH6_458QnQ3JjfvgE1kY3Y7erTk6CL1vISlvnfTjeDbB8VbesPAg9SuM0ZyUcn4dA01fTKxziWAM9Jl6pLtO22KpZ_hDVC702cEVyfFjavJS1HkTUis6Yw2fci8NfNXI2DxfzQibmOadxtCqio63WGL8ZABAmccQJ69mIdBFxgZyYE5WyyoRnaApxI0CI27-rqs-gYtF2E34JrrceMf5qL1sgWVbeEhwvV6lvLC04CjCjozpmMSPfwPGZcw6fxmWUbqj1ozF5IjmC4pP0RmBPAp8cyEfNsnvT4-zcoT568hxP3b_qxX-aGJ25TI6EZnehpkkZKWHEPE0V0w6YYJTdjflU5uPV)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fd7600030a84fb3ba02d1e2dbf25358&_e=e2Dx20-lClB-NvDtcUIn463S1CLfsytMhhOVH6_458QnQ3JjfvgE1kY3Y7erTk6CL1vISlvnfTjeDbB8VbesPAg9SuM0ZyUcn4dA01fTKxziWAM9Jl6pLtO22KpZ_hDVC702cEVyfFjavJS1HkTUis6Yw2fci8NfNXI2DxfzQiYtYL6nAp84fsN8kfbyRzcuWq8AsGxn13JLQqNYCLIzFUWP3uY907k2Vw7I1zki44KHnU2gjtd59yL6n-67__jIdZQ-sr7HHFAVMDsQW15GWaiW34TowU0Zg5PIFsbHL0bmKOPOloSiHeMoUKHsyon7Onl39RtX5nT7UXV56zJjDq2lBi2tXwuyDdIGOpOl7dvEdSfwMVREZYzaP4_HmCMd)

For Freedom,
Alex Stovall
