clean_body: I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Alex Stovall and I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ... I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. Enough is enough. Black conservatives running for public office are being attacked by the Democrats and I’m in their crosshairs. The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - the leader of the Democrat Party - who said, “You ain’t black” if you don’t vote Democrat. This is more than just upsetting. The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President. You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. Despite my childhood, I persevered. No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it. I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - I need to raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities. I can WIN this race, but I must raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - For Freedom, Alex Stovall Get the latest by following me on social media. | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS Use of military rank, insignia, photographs or descriptions of military service on this website does not constitute endorsement by the federal government, U.S. Department of Defense or Department of Homeland Security. subject: Attorney General Candidate Nathan Hochman Raises $1 Million Fundraising Haul
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
Nathan Hochman, the Republican frontrunner to challenge Rob Bonta in 2022, has raised his first $1,000,000. | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4456246?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4456246?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4456246?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4456246?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4456246?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
December 6, 2021
---
Contact:
press@nathanhochman.om
---
| **Attorney General Candidate Nathan Hochman Raises $1 Million**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Nathan Hochman, a former Assistant U.S. Attorney General and federal prosecutor, general counsel, and candidate in the 2022 race for California Attorney General, has raised over $1,000,000 in his campaign to unseat Governor Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022.

_"It is humbling to announce today that we have raised over a million dollars in our campaign to restore public safety and security to California" _remarked Nathan. _“With a little less than a year to go, I am so excited at the diverse, bi-partisan support we have received from across the state, with over 35% of our contributions coming from Democrats and Independents. We are building a campaign that can and will win next November."_

After graduating from Brown University and Stanford Law School, Nathan clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. In 2008, Nathan was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as Assistant US Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. After leaving DOJ, Nathan has had a successful career as a defense attorney, civil litigator and appellate counsel in two international law firms. Nathan served as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission from 2011 to 2016 and has serves on numerous community boards..

With over $1,000,000 raised and a year left to go, Hochman has already raised more funds than any Republican running for Attorney General in the past decade. He is the leading Republican candidate for Attorney General in the 2022 race.

Nathan launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April. Since then, he has secured the endorsement of a growing number of prosecutors, elected officials, and community leaders. He has made addressing fentanyl and the opioid epidemic a key issue of his campaign.

To stay up to date with the campaign, follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on [Facebook](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=bf53d26157&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=fb0abd1e3f&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=53e5c97a77&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=985b440c4a&e=94837ebab3). ###
---

She just sent a message to her followers calling me “Radical Riley!” | = | Peter, This campaign is less than a month old, but it comes as no surprise that Claudia Tenney has already resorted to name-calling. She just sent a message to her followers calling me“Radical Riley!” You can see it for yourself below — = | = It’s absurd. It's also a sign that she’s scared of the movement we’re building together to defeat her. So, if Claudia Tenney is going to call me “Radical Riley,” let me ask you this: Do you think it’s “radical” to support a bipartisan infrastructure bill that will bring good-paying jobs to working families? = Do you think it’s “radical” to lower prescription drug costs for seniors on fixed incomes and families living paycheck-to-paycheck? = Do you think it’s “radical” to cut taxes for working families while making sure the super-wealthy and big corporations pay their fair share? = Do you think it’s “radical” to raise the minimum wage so that nobody who works full time needs to live in poverty or struggle to make ends meet? = Do you think it’s “radical” to provide universal pre-K so kids have the tools they need to get ahead in life and parents are able to get to work? = = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = While Claudia Tenney is mudslinging and name-calling, our campaign is going to continue working to bring people together and lift them up. body:
I sure do miss college
I sure do miss college

| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgkuh69ck3qda2bg2km50c962p42r71mj9ipik2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3h61o34s3h2bs)
---

Friend,

I miss a lot about college: the fun, the friends, the football.

I’m not sure classes would make it into my top three, but I did take a very important one that I guess President Biden couldn’t be bothered taking: **_Economics 101._**

You see, in that class, you learn a lot about our economy. You learn about how good paying jobs grow the economy and benefit everyone; you also learn how government can screw it all up. I’ll boil down what I think is most important that he should figure out and figure out fast: **_You can’t spend what you don’t have._**
| [STOP BIDEN’S RECKLESS SPENDING](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z039ke0f4vq6c5t5lk17q1pni481rkkt99ltl700_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3h61o34s3h2bs)
---

Joe’s been spending all your tax dollars like it’s ditch water, and it’s not benefitting anyone but the Socialists. **He’s doing it because he knows he’s not the one who’ll deal with the problems down the line. It’s going to be our children, and their children, and their children.**

We’ve got to put an end to this and do it fast. **[Stand with me today and help stop Biden’s reckless spending!](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvnbd16t1un7giogenka2r2ppbt9984hv3uot1t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3h61o34s3h2bs)**

Thank you for acting now!

God Bless,

body:
Peter, we have to protect our traditional values. |
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0027faf8946a4293a76d464be8d61729&_e=IaCLHEjgM-5NJzaefJXFfhUjiFWsKA0aA4z5X_VPT6mmnGgKY-dcAREiuRznEwvywmTXnBtZ6w4EQc9omflVrUgu74zr0DPopjPBdHBrm8szaXWXkV1SsBUe27lJU13B4nHmoJEMVZDsUBm7AO88sTfv8qa_nhMyvQm_00bqWMsNUc_V3T2N5cfq_Xr4bq9l75bZATTv6H05uhdrH7OzURtJFURgJmTdpcGfNYjma6pRVgsEOO_fGcJYpNAMHS0Vxo97uiTlYhB03j6FBXQG8HbsWQlnHYBtFWB7xWyLbkzkx0P6tXgYmElVuW9IZCHBcsSmxZJLcwHSRffUzk0QQgn6svwcr18NbXR4ERKlMnJ-_crSmwVQu7pEYnIyowROCjiuiJBNe4Kk34yVpgyPGJ11eXJdHLZHe31bLy1ay_fohSzvtr8FBbiCWmpI_miJ7TR1oa3thbUTLmZMpXxPIrd6mIGgx1ZjjERqHA8fKRA%3D)

It’s Hanukkah Peter,

_**To me and many others, Hanukkah represents a divine miracle that shows God comes before government.**_ It’s about celebrating and protecting our traditional values, and in America, that means our Judeo-Christian values that founded these United States.

These values are the reason I got involved in politics and made me who I am. **I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate****, and I’m running because much like Hanukkah, America is seen as a miracle to the world.**

We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. [**We have to stand up for the values that made this nation great to begin with, are you with me Peter?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0027faf8946a4293a76d464be8d61729&_e=IaCLHEjgM-5NJzaefJXFfhUjiFWsKA0aA4z5X_VPT6mmnGgKY-dcAREiuRznEwvywmTXnBtZ6w4EQc9omflVrUgu74zr0DPopjPBdHBrm8szaXWXkV1SsBUe27lJU13B4nHmoJEMVZDsUBm7AO88sTfv8qa_nhMyvQm_00bqWMsNUc_V3T2N5cfq_Xr4bq9l75bZATTv6H05uhdrH7OzURtJFURgJmTdpcGfNYjma6pRVgsEOO_fGcJYpNAMHS0Vxo97uiTlYhB03j6FBXQG8ObQeNiMM3891fF31eozMTgnfmqYg0VTnFL9fzcKnLEavV11ZOp-SBqdhFy5G0UQy0NRy7SGRK3d2Fcr1D_YzjNJfXwEp9-496EIZqslYJ16ThU2WoQDUxJRDDc8GkzaS9bj8ES7AkkLNdj_6pddGQ_ML3Lv2CIMt1L-kplFRrDd5VT64kWGRXSJ8SJ7L-qja46jmzJj4qMjfNxpn7z7nOQ%3D)

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0027faf8946a4293a76d464be8d61729&_e=IaCLHEjgM-5NJzaefJXFfhUjiFWsKA0aA4z5X_VPT6mmnGgKY-dcAREiuRznEwvywmTXnBtZ6w4EQc9omflVrUgu74zr0DPopjPBdHBrm8szaXWXkV1SsBUe27lJU13B4nHmoJEMVZDsUBm7AO88sTfv8qa_nhMyvQm_00bqWMsNUc_V3T2N5cfq_Xr4bq9l75bZATTv6H05uhdrH7OzURtJFURgJmTdpcGfNYjma6pRVgsEOO_fGcJYpNAMHS0Vxo97uiTlYhB03j6FBXQG8K5GzReZs2nlbjHuz_nmKWXUVYdic1Y9PYLLgeWkP-sqeRy0Y9cK1-goql7fcPAwQS7w2yXdNqc8Dx4esG_RtluXVGNby9FSk4tiNdLrn4l9FLqBC2yc8rVqU0ZAjRYXrKmfbRY63hT_Nt5tKz-1tSQZ-eXA0jsZqtRnD5zjS0qVeXo86kGR5EAxFafiVe7sjlhBg7JGAJRzDpTzsAW8-BE%3D)
**Regardless of whether you celebrate Hanukkah or not, the values of this holiday are the same ones that made America great.** The radical liberals we’re dealing with today would never admit that. Hanukkah to them is a political talking point for social media, while quietly pushing anti-Israel policies and extending their hands to terrorists.

**Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan, and now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with their leadership which is full of internationally wanted terrorists?**

They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with. **I would never support that, and I don’t think you could either.**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0027faf8946a4293a76d464be8d61729&_e=IaCLHEjgM-5NJzaefJXFfhUjiFWsKA0aA4z5X_VPT6mmnGgKY-dcAREiuRznEwvywmTXnBtZ6w4EQc9omflVrUgu74zr0DPopjPBdHBrm8szaXWXkV1SsBUe27lJU13B4nHmoJEMVZDsUBm7AO88sTfv8qa_nhMyvQm_00bqWMsNUc_V3T2N5cfq_Xr4bq9l75bZATTv6H05uhdrH7OzURtJFURgJmTdpcGfNYjma6pRVgsEOO_fGcJYpNAMHS0Vxo97uiTlYhB03j6FBXQG8NpGrj7RWgEwmlLu3M2kBVwrbrDT9iDqA71eK56LOUmCnvU-A9OXoJcLj6Bq11w3BzWfC9kodQMUQeLQobX13BLiov-kaDI2pJdUyb6B-iyKdmT1nTzv0AJI-nAjvNyQ5cYybZXRHw0iugAeIGLIeyCmfklzIddzQGr82hPDUu90Q2uRJIXfvNDb_mMHWlyULqzqLr4cZ15xbYVC5_KSi_E%3D)
**If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking, and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**Help me be the reason we win back the Senate by supporting my campaign to become the next Republican Senator from Maryland. If we can do that, then we can finally win back the America we know and love.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0027faf8946a4293a76d464be8d61729&_e=IaCLHEjgM-5NJzaefJXFfhUjiFWsKA0aA4z5X_VPT6mmnGgKY-dcAREiuRznEwvywmTXnBtZ6w4EQc9omflVrUgu74zr0DPopjPBdHBrm8szaXWXkV1SsBUe27lJU13B4nHmoJEMVZDsUBm7AO88sTfv8qa_nhMyvQm_00bqWMsNUc_V3T2N5cfq_Xr4bq9l75bZATTv6H05uhdrH7OzURtJFURgJmTdpcGfNYjma6pRVgsEOO_fGcJYpNAMHS0Vxo97uiTlYhB03j6FBXQG8D-HZTxpxRd6zlYqAIFt3YKjxs-oz_Cucc2bQVjMZwCs5iEU-Z5mLd2prfOwEcAe-T1jcKeXY1F7fzIB3EW1Q3d4XkvJsiwWXIeccfyPw4kg9xHXwEeRAJ6O-tbddcfK58tMzbIJt4eIMBSpS4XkwLBYcLjcEl8gR3Z715cY0UmFBt5nafYvj4KR7YjtUv6PZuwXRT0UhVc3clJHR-tFS_Y%3D)

Thank you and God bless,

clean_body: Peter, we have to protect our traditional values. | It’s Hanukkah Peter, To me and many others, Hanukkah represents a divine miracle that shows God comes before government. It’s about celebrating and protecting our traditional values, and in America, that means our Judeo-Christian values that founded these United States. These values are the reason I got involved in politics and made me who I am. I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate, and I’m running because much like Hanukkah, America is seen as a miracle to the world. We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. Regardless of whether you celebrate Hanukkah or not, the values of this holiday are the same ones that made America great. The radical liberals we’re dealing with today would never admit that. Hanukkah to them is a political talking point for social media, while quietly pushing anti-Israel policies and extending their hands to terrorists. Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan, and now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with their leadership which is full of internationally wanted terrorists? They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with. I would never support that, and I don’t think you could either. If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values. We need to get our country back to that way of thinking, and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate. Thank you and God bless, James Tarantin for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I want to hear what your priorities are.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39404461/319691333/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDBkODI0My1lMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTmp1Vh81zPq1BWLY0PMTRvrgVJocMqfiyNlqPwCD-k=)
Hi folks, To say it’s been a productive year is an understatement. Earlier this year, I helped pass the _American Rescue Plan_ that got shots in arms and expanded the Child Tax Credit. The first monthly Child Tax Credit payment alone kept millions of children nationwide out of poverty. This summer alone, I travelled 1,850 miles around our state across 15 counties to hear from folks about how they need action on climate change, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and making child care more affordable. Armed with that supporter feedback, I helped pass the bipartisan _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ — a historic investment to repair Colorado’s roads and bridges, expand high-speed internet access across the state, and create good-paying jobs in the process. Now, I’m working to negotiate the _Build Back Better Act_ to help transition our country to a clean energy economy, expand access to child care and early childhood education, lower the cost of prescription drugs for seniors — and much, much more. With all that we’ve accomplished, and all that’s ahead of us, I want to know what you think my Senate colleagues and I should prioritize through the end of this year. **So folks, will you take a minute to fill out our December Priorities Survey and share your thoughts?** | | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39404462/319691334/1340840058?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDBkODI0My1lMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTmp1Vh81zPq1BWLY0PMTRvrgVJocMqfiyNlqPwCD-k=&emci=7e0d8243-e156-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=800d8243-e156-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1295540)
---
Your input is deeply appreciated — because I work for you. I don’t accept a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists.
**I hope you’ll take a moment to fill out our December Priorities Survey today.**
Thanks and talk soon,
Michael

name: Holly McCormack
subject: A brighter future for our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39404611/319691929/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGIxNTMwYi1lMjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbpA8zk9bVY2KAsQRvJJyehjOSopVI7-V-rhqsP70iw=&emci=ea25b0a1-cd56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=10b1530b-e256-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Peter, during the holidays one of the main concerns for my team and I is the welfare of our community - especially our families.

Just like many parents here in GA-14, the future of our children is always on my mind during this campaign.**** This is why I was so excited to attend the Dalton Mistletoe Festival on Saturday, which was hosted by the Whitfield-Dalton Daycare Center. **Team Holly was a major sponsor for this event, where hundreds of children had a day filled with activities, singing, dancing, and a screening of the Polar Express. **

Team Holly had a booth and talked with some amazing children who made ornaments with our staff. I spent the time chatting with parents about some of the needs in our District. The main issue: **they can't afford childcare.**
****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39404612/319691930/-804235033?refcode=em1206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGIxNTMwYi1lMjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbpA8zk9bVY2KAsQRvJJyehjOSopVI7-V-rhqsP70iw=)
This is a problem that many Northwest Georgians face, including my own family. Most of GA-14 is considered a **childcare desert**. The lack of facilities and resources are debilitating to our local economy and keep women out of the workforce. Not to mention, the undue burden it places on our children's opportunities to get ahead.

This is why my campaign is dedicated to passing the Childcare Is Infrastructure Act and making long-term investments in our children and their education. **We can make the future brighter for our children, but only if we win in 2022. **

**[Together, we will make GA-14 a better place for families to thrive and children to grow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39404613/319691931/-804235033?refcode=em1206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGIxNTMwYi1lMjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbpA8zk9bVY2KAsQRvJJyehjOSopVI7-V-rhqsP70iw=)**

Join me today,
Holly McCormack.
|
---

clean_body: | | Peter, during the holidays one of the main concerns for my team and I is the welfare of our community - especially our families. Just like many parents here in GA-14, the future of our children is always on my mind during this campaign.** This is why I was so excited to attend the Dalton Mistletoe Festival on Saturday, which was hosted by the Whitfield-Dalton Daycare Center. Team Holly was a major sponsor for this event, where hundreds of children had a day filled with activities, singing, dancing, and a screening of the Polar Express. Team Holly had a booth and talked with some amazing children who made ornaments with our staff. I spent the time chatting with parents about some of the needs in our District. The main issue: they can't afford childcare. = This is a problem that many Northwest Georgians face, including my own family. Most of GA-14 is considered a childcare desert. The lack of facilities and resources are debilitating to our local economy and keep women out of the workforce. Not to mention, the undue burden it places on our children's opportunities to get ahead. This is why my campaign is dedicated to passing the Childcare Is Infrastructure Act and making long-term investments in our children and their education. We can make the future brighter for our children, but only if we win in 2022. =** Join me today, Holly McCormack. | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: What do you call it?
body:
Christmas Tree or Holiday Tree? | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=62682ec21e&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
|

_**WHAT DO YOU CALL IT?**_
---
[CHRISTMAS TREE 🎄 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=39525bbc3e&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[HOLIDAY TREE ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=dcef80d473&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| Friend,

_**What’s so offensive about the word “Christmas?”**_

Governor Kathy Hochul must think it is because she just called her tree a “holiday tree,” yet in 2020 and 2019 and most likely all her life she has correctly called it a Christmas tree.
[](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=665e3197c3&e=3ca66fc65a)
What changed? Could it be that she’s facing a Democrat primary and she is trying to appeal to far-left “woke” voters?

Here is why this matters. We need leaders who lead – not pander. We need a governor who has principles and will stand strong, not one who will constantly vacillate in the wind.

And if you’re all of a sudden afraid to say the word “Christmas” it doesn’t leave us with high hopes that you’ll stand strong on the issues that really matter like taxes, spending, crime and education.
_**WHAT DO YOU CALL IT?**_
---
[CHRISTMAS TREE 🎄 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=09a937dc59&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[HOLIDAY TREE ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=09f9191a80&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| Your voice matters to us.

Thank you,

Astorino Polling
---

[TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=9eb5bf071f&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=03d674f5c9&e=3ca66fc65a)._

name: David Palmer
subject: Happy Saint Nicholas Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39404797/319692673/312490568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzNmY2M3NC1lMzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYxNCPG0YH6vR17MUQ_YQVAVS2IavQW_bQosnUzc2yg=) | Peter, The holidays are all about tradition. From Grandma’s macaroni and cheese at the Thanksgiving table, to volunteering and giving back to the community, to ice skating in the cold Champaign air followed by hot cocoa and a fire, this time spent with family is precious. One of my favorite traditions is actually today: St. Nicholas Day. If you don’t know what St. Nick’s Day is, it’s when little ones (and young at heart) wait for St. Nick to leave presents under their pillows or in a shoe at their door. It’s a simple preview of the Big Day on the 25th, but has a deeper meaning in its history. The day is rooted in caring for those who need a helping hand. Historically young boys used the day to ask their neighbors for alms for the poor to support them during the holiday season. **That’s why St. Nicholas Day is one of my favorite holidays. It reminds us that we have a responsibility to our fellow woman and man to do everything we can to support each other when times are tough. That spirit is in the very foundation of why I am running for Congress.** [**Will you join my grassroots movement and make a contribution to my campaign today? With your support, we will grow our momentum and enter the next stretch of this race strong.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39404798/319692674/694734457?refcode=stnicks12621&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzNmY2M3NC1lMzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYxNCPG0YH6vR17MUQ_YQVAVS2IavQW_bQosnUzc2yg=) **I’m in this fight because I believe that if we work together, we can create a future that supports everyone in our communities.****We can have good, well-paying jobs, a healthier world for our children, a strong economy grounded in our agricultural history, and all the other policies that will usher in a prosperous future for Central Illinois.** [**My hope is that in 2022 we can bring a new, fresh look at how to ensure our communities can grow and thrive. I have the plans. I just need your support to bring those plans to life. Chip in $25 today to help me carry strength, empathy, and knowledge to Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39404799/319692675/694734457?refcode=stnicks12621&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzNmY2M3NC1lMzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYxNCPG0YH6vR17MUQ_YQVAVS2IavQW_bQosnUzc2yg=) On this St. Nicholas Day, I hope you find treasure in the love and warmth of the community that surrounds us all. David Palmer
---
* * *
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39404800/319692676/312490568?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzNmY2M3NC1lMzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYxNCPG0YH6vR17MUQ_YQVAVS2IavQW_bQosnUzc2yg=) Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Republicans **BLOCKED** our Democrats' efforts to save voting rights and strengthen our democracy in the wake of Republican power grabs.

Team, I want to take a moment to personally say THANK YOU. Because of our incredible team of grassroots supporters, I just got confirmation that we knocked our November end-of-month goal out of the park. Even when it looked like we might come up a little short, this entire team chipped in and got the job done. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can't afford to spend the next few months on the sidelines.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/4Ee7hqAj37Bk/djJadVRDbVdxTjE4OGNLeC9WbXI5bnd6WHdac3ZEaGNuWWJ0UktXM0hwVW1MN1VDWXk2RHpqVGZlalErd3BMMDZZY3NzMjlyeVJneFRObHA3TUE4V2pncVBzWm5nb0VJSktIazZzVEdVUWs9S0/V3FaN0dSaHNrNEtjYzhXeEVxdnM0Snhza1B6TmhIR3hhQ3BNMFREY3lYdz0S1) Friend -- As of Friday at midnight, I won't be able to fuel our fundraising effort for many months when Washington state's legislative session fundraising freeze begins. **While the clock ticks towards that deadline, we 're running out of time to prevent the climate crisis from becoming an all-out climate disaster.** Meanwhile, Big Oil has nothing stopping them from raising and spending millions pushing their anti-climate agenda and trying to stop our progress. We can't spend the next few months on the sidelines. So my team has set a bold fundraising goal: $50,000 before this Friday at Midnight -- enough to power our movement for climate action through the winter. [_**Ahead of this crucial deadline, I 'm humbly asking: will you make a contribution of $10 right now, so we can hit our $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal and avert all-out climate disaster?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/j~ejh-NqLkf2/djJadVRDbVdxTjE4OGNLeC9WbXI5bnd6WHdac3ZEaGNuWWJ0UktXM0hwVW1MN1VDWXk2RHpqVGZlalErd3BMMDZZY3NzMjlyeVJneFRObHA3TUE4V2pncVBzWm5nb0VJSktIazZzVEdVUWs9S0/V3FaN0dSaHNrNEtjYzhXeEVxdnM0Snhza1B6TmhIR3hhQ3BNMFREY3lYdz0S1) [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/~jRKhg2bEWMG/djJadVRDbVdxTjE4OGNLeC9WbXI5bnd6WHdac3ZEaGNuWWJ0UktXM0hwVW1MN1VDWXk2RHpqVGZlalErd3BMMDZZY3NzMjlyeVJneFRObHA3TUE4V2pncVBzWm5nb0VJSktIazZzVEdVUWs9S0/V3FaN0dSaHNrNEtjYzhXeEVxdnM0Snhza1B6TmhIR3hhQ3BNMFREY3lYdz0S1) While our fundraising is frozen, Big Oil is going to continue spending millions to power their propaganda machine. To do our part to counter their toxic disinformation and keep our movement full-steam-ahead, we need to meet this $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal by Friday at midnight. I'm so proud of the work we did in Washington state, and across the globe, this year to listen to the science and act with bold purpose to take on the climate crisis and respond thoughtfully to the pandemic. But now the momentum we've built can't take a 90-day break while we head into the legislative session, so I'm counting on you. I know that, by coming together, we can hit this goal -- and save humanity from the worst of the climate disaster. Let's meet this fundraising goal the same way we are meeting this crucial moment for the climate crisis: with imagination, optimism, and action. [_**Chip in $10 today towards our $50,000 goal, so we can hit our Beat the Freeze goal together.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/j~ejh-NqLkf2/djJadVRDbVdxTjE4OGNLeC9WbXI5bnd6WHdac3ZEaGNuWWJ0UktXM0hwVW1MN1VDWXk2RHpqVGZlalErd3BMMDZZY3NzMjlyeVJneFRObHA3TUE4V2pncVBzWm5nb0VJSktIazZzVEdVUWs9S0/V3FaN0dSaHNrNEtjYzhXeEVxdnM0Snhza1B6TmhIR3hhQ3BNMFREY3lYdz0S1) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/Z6qLHN4~-9BK/djJadVRDbVdxTjE4OGNLeC9WbXI5bnd6WHdac3ZEaGNuWWJ0UktXM0hwVW1MN1VDWXk2RHpqVGZlalErd3BMMDZZY3NzMjlyeVJneFRObHA3TUE4V2pncVBzWm5nb0VJSktIazZzVEdVUWs9S0/V3FaN0dSaHNrNEtjYzhXeEVxdnM0Snhza1B6TmhIR3hhQ3BNMFREY3lYdz0S1)

clean_body: We can't afford to spend the next few months on the sidelines. | Friend -- As of Friday at midnight, I won't be able to fuel our fundraising effort for many months when Washington state's legislative session fundraising freeze begins. While the clock ticks towards that deadline, we 're running out of time to prevent the climate crisis from becoming an all-out climate disaster. Meanwhile, Big Oil has nothing stopping them from raising and spending millions pushing their anti-climate agenda and trying to stop our progress. We can't spend the next few months on the sidelines. So my team has set a bold fundraising goal: $50,000 before this Friday at Midnight -- enough to power our movement for climate action through the winter. While our fundraising is frozen, Big Oil is going to continue spending millions to power their propaganda machine. To do our part to counter their toxic disinformation and keep our movement full-steam-ahead, we need to meet this $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal by Friday at midnight. I'm so proud of the work we did in Washington state, and across the globe, this year to listen to the science and act with bold purpose to take on the climate crisis and respond thoughtfully to the pandemic. But now the momentum we've built can't take a 90-day break while we head into the legislative session, so I'm counting on you. I know that, by coming together, we can hit this goal -- and save humanity from the worst of the climate disaster. Let's meet this fundraising goal the same way we are meeting this crucial moment for the climate crisis: with imagination, optimism, and action. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | As always, thank you for your support. Very truly yours, Jay

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6548%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=sMnjQ99xD3HHyRcIILyaFA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68532%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KfjlNsJ1l%2fCWWrDOWDC7Bg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68533%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=daylZrntRi6fXcmf2Zww7w&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68534%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=28FnY0a%2bOx55n%2fRQa3Jplg&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6548%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=sMnjQ99xD3HHyRcIILyaFA&sysid=1)_

name: Alex Stovall
subject: “You ain’t black”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee7d89a533604c31ada80de158539d9f&_e=HxeUBdUSCgz21EucvN_UIgX44GbKnTGt9ts4NN2jDf7WyRriJR6Ju7oTmu2dj_ba1xSZwOGiR-icyXHUv7W1bXyrGcj67bbg6guIF3YEx4g5QNuXNI49-Oi-uZvY36IW86eSk6qe4OAZth_WE0Ghv7Qkecd4DeM79lIKfltWAbLpZrf4sCwiWymsQYfpJaTr65T-0G164bhCDRPJeZzGMmTQrw609_hWblOyhbV6_TpZhSPMrzPogganw0at2nylQjfJ2znrLikE0pd7RbXz5Gi1t6BH-PyooQdWjd2M5X6uAybbbp4DNbg1fOB74Un829M4uswGgIKZjMYfYpCqY7qW0XbjdCGGZ7GF_DKrnag4JKoPIagIldl9eJzrlUAF)

---
Peter,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. **I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I’m SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee7d89a533604c31ada80de158539d9f&_e=HxeUBdUSCgz21EucvN_UIgX44GbKnTGt9ts4NN2jDf7WyRriJR6Ju7oTmu2dj_ba1xSZwOGiR-icyXHUv7W1bXyrGcj67bbg6guIF3YEx4g5QNuXNI49-Oi-uZvY36IW86eSk6qe4OAZth_WE0Ghv7Qkecd4DeM79lIKfltWAbIXfLYV5vC0KGwluE46gLMNHz-9dbnPPUuV9AdU-KEDrahV7Ne4z8RIImqzRdIqB67nr5z9BjzztiBnyDp0eJMkapNFlAxBOx7rbxnp0IkbLWKgSFs0w1WoZGJpzYk5mZSm1qJUZOHBTjnz1ofDMe539-eAJkJigE9LxHA6h_d-FBLlPO9_A6JSYsMIPforaPVc3d95Rk_c05umUnY_ZVhV) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I’m in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee7d89a533604c31ada80de158539d9f&_e=HxeUBdUSCgz21EucvN_UIgX44GbKnTGt9ts4NN2jDf7WyRriJR6Ju7oTmu2dj_ba1xSZwOGiR-icyXHUv7W1bXyrGcj67bbg6guIF3YEx4g5QNuXNI49-Oi-uZvY36IW86eSk6qe4OAZth_WE0Ghv7Qkecd4DeM79lIKfltWAbIlTQ12lUZdGt-oxMERZ6Jhmx0uGDAwH7jIi0TO5vS1SKU4PnmDl_KyUUb61cvxSyEWNWGKZw1ZgA9Ch93coQpncVUOjBWJJyryvRa8NdC5NaBonwkOFrQqar4UAlGoIRBaUc0Xl51hywGdcN5w8mgK9eLNutRbqHZ3AkKWXhmFhi2UMRLQ_Dv0C2ZYt0mMDSuEu_g-8N9EfHuo0PSsej37)
The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee7d89a533604c31ada80de158539d9f&_e=HxeUBdUSCgz21EucvN_UIgX44GbKnTGt9ts4NN2jDf7WyRriJR6Ju7oTmu2dj_ba1xSZwOGiR-icyXHUv7W1bXyrGcj67bbg6guIF3YEx4g5QNuXNI49-Oi-uZvY36IW86eSk6qe4OAZth_WE0Ghv7Qkecd4DeM79lIKfltWAbIMeTZaq0vSjK4vEV2u03SnkgxhWoONXGpTKyXGZlHx3IFmI-ydNeWyOmxVEF5q4vqLuW0MnOTnZHg1dDPrQl_bqJ1K-P5L0F33usKUWcyDAUM0z4It4ULwfP6wGGUj8r5zampPhCaZQZmQ_Eu90yIlYMdaXd0tt2DVpbKNwf7U5qkqj-V6Au6fnFlbbBb92MfIH1I0X6kqcOBA64rMWU0w)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee7d89a533604c31ada80de158539d9f&_e=HxeUBdUSCgz21EucvN_UIgX44GbKnTGt9ts4NN2jDf7WyRriJR6Ju7oTmu2dj_ba1xSZwOGiR-icyXHUv7W1bXyrGcj67bbg6guIF3YEx4g5QNuXNI49-Oi-uZvY36IW86eSk6qe4OAZth_WE0Ghv7Qkecd4DeM79lIKfltWAbJi9w7qs5_Cl9Q4J2pnp7RgKpn5CTE2uTleTTAk3lRGGqGPstPyG3dQhXbze2-pRH5SD5NaIf-2nW_8C6OmrxxyJBJXpK8hFqMZEqBbmwoaqmQk2AEESzLgTZwJgc1xJl6hXpvL-Jfs2TwCqb3nNFv27Fei0Iw2jNbhLRLAr-3fIoxrut32EPqBmVMbaH2H7z6z5VeKHclcUk5UFisbxvRW)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee7d89a533604c31ada80de158539d9f&_e=HxeUBdUSCgz21EucvN_UIgX44GbKnTGt9ts4NN2jDf7WyRriJR6Ju7oTmu2dj_ba1xSZwOGiR-icyXHUv7W1bXyrGcj67bbg6guIF3YEx4g5QNuXNI49-Oi-uZvY36IW86eSk6qe4OAZth_WE0Ghv7Qkecd4DeM79lIKfltWAbJmfi-ljKPngfBYR_8ppSwQDHsI-egygLQA7ypHauDx2xvvOngDt0_unD3g9CGGYKoa4Hilyn5PqRaJLbQY7AFFAIPwnGOYibCii7KQvbi09J6pVSlW8s9xbq8sOSFUA3beD05HNOe5lLYOPsaWDJV6p5s_LbiT-ZUa209zMtnM70y0H-Y5ZS6gh9FzP6VELeyODf7Rv0gy1ryRYdh3PWRT)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ee7d89a533604c31ada80de158539d9f&_e=HxeUBdUSCgz21EucvN_UIgX44GbKnTGt9ts4NN2jDf7WyRriJR6Ju7oTmu2dj_ba1xSZwOGiR-icyXHUv7W1bXyrGcj67bbg6guIF3YEx4g5QNuXNI49-Oi-uZvY36IW86eSk6qe4OAZth_WE0Ghv7Qkecd4DeM79lIKfltWAbJiNupGSZ2H6phloDhumFx50DnOntC64-CBitOIQ5SLR8RyhZaoAnC8dIT9ZJqlpgDW9h6lRxSkWsoCpjiOCEwEPHpgOf6LEqEJTL0MwUolUB4qkINUNurJu6iYcCqfmRTIZ7X-FkV_E6lolTZy9-4f3nAN-xP3q4xz-zrzoj0Bv2dfThAQzl2VKlUpRbu60LqjB7r8EN6QwFuNhrVn0wDO)

For Freedom,
Alex Stovall

name: John King
subject: an important message to share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Today, I launched a new video about my family’s story and my vision for a more prosperous Maryland.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39405260/319694311/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211206-z-EM&amount=25&refcode2=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTY0YTljMC1lNDU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zibRCvbA8pW5H1WDN-P2pqL8Qy9AGNlu7rFvcph9Zn8=)
---
| Peter,

The far-right is trying to rewrite the history of slavery and segregation, and as the direct descendant of enslaved people, I take that personally.

The truth is, these are direct attempts to erase the real people who built this country — people like my ancestors, Charles, Lydia, and Anne King, who were enslaved in Gaithersburg, Maryland, in a cabin just 25 miles from where I live with my wife and two daughters today.

Our life is the realization of the hope my ancestors carried with faith in a future they could not see. Our story is proof that progress is possible, because in just three generations, my family went from being enslaved in that cabin to serving in the cabinet of our nation’s first Black president. That’s why today, I launched a new video about my family’s story and my vision for a more prosperous Maryland built on economic, racial, climate, and educational justice.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39405261/319694312/-78424889?refcode=BLU-KING-20211206-z-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=8164a9c0-e456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTY0YTljMC1lNDU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zibRCvbA8pW5H1WDN-P2pqL8Qy9AGNlu7rFvcph9Zn8=)
| [WATCH VIDEO ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39405262/319694313/-78424889?refcode=BLU-KING-20211206-z-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=8164a9c0-e456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTY0YTljMC1lNDU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zibRCvbA8pW5H1WDN-P2pqL8Qy9AGNlu7rFvcph9Zn8=)
---
I encourage each of you to take a minute out of your day to learn about the kind of change we’re committed to building here, and I hope you will feel moved to share our message with your friends and family so we can grow this movement from the ground up. name: Rand Paul
subject: you know how I know you’re not scared enough?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6542%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=cxQu5ijsj32Yewk%2bgQT%2bgQ&sysid=1)
_**DEFEND LIBERTY: REJECT COVID HYSTERIA**_ **[CHIP IN NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68547%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jp6WDUypvOadtzLjlAXVew&sysid=1)** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68548%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QjXigcYum3zasPJqxzXDlg&sysid=1) | |
---
Friend, the COVID hysteria has already gone on too long...

And these power-hungry bureaucrats don’t want to let go!

That’s probably why we’re hearing a lot about this new _spooky_ “omicron variant.”

But let’s be clear \- the omicron variant in South Africa, and now, California, is reported as an illness with MILD symptoms and no one has been hospitalized for it at this point.

**_But of course, Dr. Fauci and Joe Biden are using this as an excuse to take your freedoms before we even know the facts._**

We must stand strong on the side of science and refuse to allow another lockdown, more regulation, or more useless rules._If you ask me, enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight. _
**_By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution_**
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100 **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68549%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OGMDoSFe0a9pcmMmbgCT8g&sysid=1)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75 **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68540%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cJBwGdeE1Avm6ZbN4iLGuQ&sysid=1)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50 **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68541%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vZTr1fzPnwELaz73JxG7Tw&sysid=1)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25 **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68542%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J%2b1BpAgR%2fUJI0Zh5LGshDQ&sysid=1)
**_If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically._**
Friend, if we allow this nonsense of the "safety at all costs" narrative to continue, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy power-hungry leaders like Biden and Fauci. EVER.

No matter what “variant” they’re trying to scare us with, freedom must prevail.

That's why I'm putting my foot down. I will not believe the hype. I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, Friend.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68543%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ww1E0Mi0s0ovLtintBlTFQ&sysid=1)

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone. I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do. Here are five things you need to know about Huwaida Arraf:
1. She founded an anti-Israel group _**known for provoking violent confrontations**_ with the Israeli military that _**has been investigated by the FBI for possible ties to terrorism.**_
2. She co-authored an op-ed that promoted violence against Israelis and said: “ _**Yes, people will get killed and injured,**_ ” but these deaths are “no less noble than carrying out a suicide operation. And we are certain that if these men were killed during such an action, _**they would be considered shaheed Allah.**_ ”
3. She has _**provided protection for terrorists,**_ even acting as a voluntary human shield for them.
4. She co-organized the “Free Gaza Flotilla” _**which led to violent clashes**_ with the Israeli Navy.
5. Now, _**she’s running for Congress**_ in Michigan’s 10th Congressional District.

Nothing is more important than stopping Huwaida Arraf.

In order to do that, we must support Rep. Lisa McClain – the pro-Israel Republican who is currently representing the district.

Nikki R. Haley

If your “pro-life” advocacy begins and ends with unborn lives rather than supporting policies that will keep people alive, healthy, and cared for after birth, you are NOT pro-life. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic woman physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Instead of uniting Americans behind policies to keep us safe, healthy, and secure, Republicans like Ron Johnson have sensationalized wedge issues like abortion — dividing and distracting people over non-issues like a woman’s right to choose. There is so much that we need to work on in our country today. We need to end gun violence and protect our children in their places of learning. We need to get the COVID-19 pandemic under control. And we need to make sure every American has health care. But politicians like Ron Johnson would rather sow division than make change. I’m done with the division and distraction — I’m fighting to make a real change on the most important issues facing our country today. = Thank you, Dr. Gillian Battino It’s time for a new kind of leadership in Wisconsin. Gillian built her career on integrity, advocacy, and action, and she’s ready to put that skill set to work in the U.S. Senate! It's going to take all of us working together to defeat Ron Johnson to get her there, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails , or you can . = Dr. Gillian Battino has dedicated her life’s work to bettering the world and continues that commitment every day. Gillian spent 20+ years serving the people of Wisconsin and helping women in the fight against breast cancer. She has seen, up close and personal, the difference that access to quality health care can make. =** Gillian Battino for U.S. Senate P.O. Box 292 Wausau, WI 54402-0292 United States Paid for by Battino for U.S. Senate

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=15a7074a3bf04dfdbc34f4441c5fc015&_e=vhd5AM7WG4LlShQEnzdbOcHw5wpc_LcnIBz_xi7_9cL-IRL86xPaU2Ssaoh5ot0k06Pn0XVJFCOLl5NTYnoqsUjgnbo-Rwo0K5ieJJx5H1kCdnKtxvaiVuBo-Wg07wOOQGhe5iOGp7_NwKNt4yNk7DZ5FfztR7Ko4B10VfjjTzrPOJducDFEqchJF_Bk2WAX-aNiDaLVMA1dGYjLUMwHaANR2kKjYuOcqlGVuhgQM3r1JCcjrtLDxeUPRMQWL0H62EjPDzj5SBYenmhQV0KwElV-7K0hQLh-X7wnCbph2d33hRgC0ZOdtJwFoNpL_5u9ly_e9kkp-lSaXa_ARuWE4_rg-P0opFF7oZTiPb25XR_DWSgvuOzpdjvZzYPGTPI0QIJAi9MJy1qIlvGuErEUkE799bO0UR-YpnfHP3vj9g2vMuESV9uDO3dgiyg10eD0eT8zgJvfYyjlDgXYXO9tCIyS6vh8KTAjm3_zpNu1Cpy-SNYJ3VpFv95Eom_koL9-)

It’s Hanukkah Peter,

_**To me and many others, Hanukkah represents a divine miracle that shows God comes before government.**_ It’s about celebrating and protecting our traditional values, and in America, that means our Judeo-Christian values that founded these United States.

These values are the reason I got involved in politics and made me who I am. **I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate****, and I’m running because much like Hanukkah, America is seen as a miracle to the world.**

We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. [**We have to stand up for the values that made this nation great to begin with, are you with me Peter?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=15a7074a3bf04dfdbc34f4441c5fc015&_e=vhd5AM7WG4LlShQEnzdbOcHw5wpc_LcnIBz_xi7_9cL-IRL86xPaU2Ssaoh5ot0k06Pn0XVJFCOLl5NTYnoqsUjgnbo-Rwo0K5ieJJx5H1kCdnKtxvaiVuBo-Wg07wOOQGhe5iOGp7_NwKNt4yNk7DZ5FfztR7Ko4B10VfjjTzrPOJducDFEqchJF_Bk2WAX-aNiDaLVMA1dGYjLUMwHaANR2kKjYuOcqlGVuhgQM3r1JCcjrtLDxeUPRMQWL0H62EjPDzj5SBYenmhQV0KwElV-7K0hQLh-X7wnCbph2d2TLYLcebHe9OgCSKpZlrqZgwZx5Ot9qno1k2x8Jzu85Qq2j4TC07fH4zhoTrVFPcEKY8-NiujA09f57bBbN_LJKOHNhAtPNqG1cdf_12k3QDSURDwRKNhKUAvB6yzCZ0Pu2LS7G6waz5P7mIJggGT-bWyswba7c0cu3qUj61i-vobYOx1B89xOgYH8O-euxVbgOHoUkWYhyZd1jZxn2mnb)

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=15a7074a3bf04dfdbc34f4441c5fc015&_e=vhd5AM7WG4LlShQEnzdbOcHw5wpc_LcnIBz_xi7_9cL-IRL86xPaU2Ssaoh5ot0k06Pn0XVJFCOLl5NTYnoqsUjgnbo-Rwo0K5ieJJx5H1kCdnKtxvaiVuBo-Wg07wOOQGhe5iOGp7_NwKNt4yNk7DZ5FfztR7Ko4B10VfjjTzrPOJducDFEqchJF_Bk2WAX-aNiDaLVMA1dGYjLUMwHaANR2kKjYuOcqlGVuhgQM3r1JCcjrtLDxeUPRMQWL0H62EjPDzj5SBYenmhQV0KwElV-7K0hQLh-X7wnCbph2d1xwXvs-kDTmz7md_2HiZJq8Yb8qwgCljoNoaq8Egk_OVwQ_XE5R_krAGT-V4kOaimFfGSGwpdi8vDs2HOuUqNFUWEQCtUeXC8Ht5deplzVJ3l4fMlQVo4iMDPNYkXErP0LrWBrU5KUYaLVDLkvg-It7398xkY_3e0-CBhIuuQgv8K9ULpqp286rFRUbQ6Wv3PCnLshyoDvNLa3s_IPLrpz)
**Regardless of whether you celebrate Hanukkah or not, the values of this holiday are the same ones that made America great.** The radical liberals we’re dealing with today would never admit that. Hanukkah to them is a political talking point for social media, while quietly pushing anti-Israel policies and extending their hands to terrorists.

**Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan, and now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with their leadership which is full of internationally wanted terrorists?**

They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with. **I would never support that, and I don’t think you could either.**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=15a7074a3bf04dfdbc34f4441c5fc015&_e=vhd5AM7WG4LlShQEnzdbOcHw5wpc_LcnIBz_xi7_9cL-IRL86xPaU2Ssaoh5ot0k06Pn0XVJFCOLl5NTYnoqsUjgnbo-Rwo0K5ieJJx5H1kCdnKtxvaiVuBo-Wg07wOOQGhe5iOGp7_NwKNt4yNk7DZ5FfztR7Ko4B10VfjjTzrPOJducDFEqchJF_Bk2WAX-aNiDaLVMA1dGYjLUMwHaANR2kKjYuOcqlGVuhgQM3r1JCcjrtLDxeUPRMQWL0H62EjPDzj5SBYenmhQV0KwElV-7K0hQLh-X7wnCbph2d2Lk370OM9y0_erMoI9kebfDw7VjZ2IfPWz0LrIikvf82412uawS6kfRA-gZbPrxf04oNaem39Lo2K2hGjz4KEWebjhvtr1EQRrvmwrp-lfEBQrDMk9BBERCb65NYRTc_srqdEIkkPdLaRAc4KGVNGx_duQWtPCWMAONJ1BBra1zck2f-TNFY9-nzHjTo86Tp-06ycA9FiqiZxH0pIyUuU0)
**If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking, and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**Help me be the reason we win back the Senate by supporting my campaign to become the next Republican Senator from Maryland. If we can do that, then we can finally win back the America we know and love.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=15a7074a3bf04dfdbc34f4441c5fc015&_e=vhd5AM7WG4LlShQEnzdbOcHw5wpc_LcnIBz_xi7_9cL-IRL86xPaU2Ssaoh5ot0k06Pn0XVJFCOLl5NTYnoqsUjgnbo-Rwo0K5ieJJx5H1kCdnKtxvaiVuBo-Wg07wOOQGhe5iOGp7_NwKNt4yNk7DZ5FfztR7Ko4B10VfjjTzrPOJducDFEqchJF_Bk2WAX-aNiDaLVMA1dGYjLUMwHaANR2kKjYuOcqlGVuhgQM3r1JCcjrtLDxeUPRMQWL0H62EjPDzj5SBYenmhQV0KwElV-7K0hQLh-X7wnCbph2d0eZhIW58YjCvb-aXxsHes719jvaQShM1mI8s_JafXp3Bx1RebVrQmJ7B3h5l1zPqzvP3mnMdGXMVxsq471yJl70XI1QBLn9_02XYCBZfWPL4GZTpRUsD9ewrd2q7Gs4YrEUNiEaPDo0d-QtgHtuL-lswKkIx6cmYSyqG1RSbILFyhswuMGVaNavwD0gXZnm9Vxs7rlmREL-t4nOEqbX7ai)

clean_body: Peter, we have to protect our traditional values. | - It’s Hanukkah Peter, To me and many others, Hanukkah represents a divine miracle that shows God comes before government. It’s about celebrating and protecting our traditional values, and in America, that means our Judeo-Christian values that founded these United States. These values are the reason I got involved in politics and made me who I am. I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate, and I’m running because much like Hanukkah, America is seen as a miracle to the world. We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. Regardless of whether you celebrate Hanukkah or not, the values of this holiday are the same ones that made America great. The radical liberals we’re dealing with today would never admit that. Hanukkah to them is a political talking point for social media, while quietly pushing anti-Israel policies and extending their hands to terrorists. Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan, and now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with their leadership which is full of internationally wanted terrorists? They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with. I would never support that, and I don’t think you could either. If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values. We need to get our country back to that way of thinking, and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate. Thank you and God bless, James Tarantin for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

In just the first six days of his campaign, he hauled in more than a quarter of a million dollars. = ICYMI, Peter: a new Republican challenger has entered the race for Washington's 8th District. Reagan Dunn, a King County councilmember, is the latest conservative Republican to announce he's running against Kim in the midterm elections. In just the first six days of his campaign, he hauled in more than a quarter of a million dollars. Dunn thinks he has what it takes to flip Washington's 8th District and help Republicans retake the House majority -- and he has the backing of the Republican establishment to help him do it. With only five seats standing between Republicans and the House majority, our opponents and national Republicans are ready to do -- and spend -- whatever it takes to defeat Kim. To hold the House majority, we must win WA-08. In this very special episode of This Is Living, my wife Erin shares her personal story of loss, sorrow, and hope. After the tragic death of her Dad, and later her Mom, Erin was left with questions about how she could overcome such hurt and disappointment. Yet, in the midst of the journey, Erin's faith was strengthened as she learned how God brings hope to the brokenhearted. You will not want to miss this very special story!

subject: November’s highlights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
This is where we’ve been
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39406187/319698165/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.06_b1_lm_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2RhYjZjYi1lODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coWJWlZ9klP6BdthSoyrhJmOieHGiTXCEsBJZEV7B2I=)
Hi Peter,

First things first -- thank you for your continued support over the past month. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, November has been the campaign’s biggest month yet. Here’s what I’ve been up to over the past few weeks:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39406188/319698166/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.06_b1_lm_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2RhYjZjYi1lODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coWJWlZ9klP6BdthSoyrhJmOieHGiTXCEsBJZEV7B2I=)
_My team and I visited Mason City Brewing and met with voters during one of our trips to the new counties that were recently added to our district._

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39406189/319698167/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.06_b1_lm_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2RhYjZjYi1lODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coWJWlZ9klP6BdthSoyrhJmOieHGiTXCEsBJZEV7B2I=)
_We shopped Small Business Saturday in Marion, and I was able to purchase some goodies for my loved ones._

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39406190/319698168/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.06_b1_lm_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2RhYjZjYi1lODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coWJWlZ9klP6BdthSoyrhJmOieHGiTXCEsBJZEV7B2I=)
_I canvassed in Ely and Cedar Rapids to collect the signatures we need to officially get on the ballot for IA-02. _
My team has been able to scale our operation faster than we ever thought possible thanks to our team of grassroots supporters. **We’ve already covered some ground, but we still have a long way to go.**

My district, with the new finalized boundaries, is projected to be one of the most competitive in the country. If we want to win, we need to keep up our momentum, and we can’t do that without your help.

[**So I’m asking, Peter, we need all hands on deck to turn this seat blue. Will you chip in whatever you can to my campaign right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39406191/319698169/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.06_b1_lm_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2RhYjZjYi1lODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coWJWlZ9klP6BdthSoyrhJmOieHGiTXCEsBJZEV7B2I=)
| [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39406192/319698170/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.06_b1_lm_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2RhYjZjYi1lODU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coWJWlZ9klP6BdthSoyrhJmOieHGiTXCEsBJZEV7B2I=)

clean_body: This is where we’ve been = Hi Peter, First things first -- thank you for your continued support over the past month. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, November has been the campaign’s biggest month yet. Here’s what I’ve been up to over the past few weeks: = My team and I visited Mason City Brewing and met with voters during one of our trips to the new counties that were recently added to our district. = We shopped Small Business Saturday in Marion, and I was able to purchase some goodies for my loved ones. = I canvassed in Ely and Cedar Rapids to collect the signatures we need to officially get on the ballot for IA-02. My team has been able to scale our operation faster than we ever thought possible thanks to our team of grassroots supporters. We’ve already covered some ground, but we still have a long way to go. My district, with the new finalized boundaries, is projected to be one of the most competitive in the country. If we want to win, we need to keep up our momentum, and we can’t do that without your help. = | = Thank you from the campaign trail, Liz Mathis Candidate for Congress, IA-02 Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Hoping for a lot of responses here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I’m asking you to take a short survey that will help make sure we are running a people-centered campaign focused on the issues. Now more than ever, it is so important that we are in this fight together.

**[Please take two minutes to fill out my survey and tell me which issues you care about most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39406286/319698679/-1266625000?ms=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx&refcode=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx_nogif&source=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx_nogif&utm_campaign=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx_nogif&utm_medium=email&contactdata=kPlUs6NIrAXwgVVb58NmWNveL7q6MzF759cUYSwl5WfOMnmuuJP4teD3MJEP%2BoPAa0iPlXCfccxZ5nEQknXiQq35mfiAqG28Zx%2BGOWVAkiamvdd8l5owdnUUErOUZh4A7ygCVMDQdO3uPNnj5IK7PEmSjlIn%2FfpLfxIRMpS%2BQxg%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjIyMzkwMC1lOTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtycybBnBib1YFLRkEp_bkQ0A_iDVaeauVqJLshUFIk=&emci=a7bffab2-de56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d6223900-e956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=18659593)**

There are so many people across this country who are wondering how they’re going to get by. When I’m traveling across Wisconsin, I hear it all the time in my one-on-one conversations.

Folks are worried about the cost of prescription drugs, finding a good-paying job that treats them with respect and dignity, being able to afford quality child care, the lack of mental health care or high-speed internet to get telemedicine in rural areas — you name it. So many across our state are struggling to recover right now.

When the pandemic first hit, Robin Vos and the Republican state legislature didn’t do anything for 300 days, and Ron Johnson was busy spreading dangerous conspiracy theories — so I stepped up as State Treasurer to make sure we were providing relief to communities hit hardest by this crisis.

**I led the first-ever special distribution of $5.25 million to address the remote learning challenges students and teachers were facing — with millions more in relief going to Wisconsin schools and communities. I also worked with Governor Tony Evers to secure $92.7 million for struggling homeowners at risk of losing their homes.**

The way I see it, the people of Wisconsin deserve nothing less than someone who will show up in their communities, listen to their concerns, ask how they can help, and get the job done. That’s the kind of scrappy, can-do attitude we need more of in Washington, which is why I decided to run for U.S. Senate — and why I’m asking for your help to shape our campaign priorities.

Can you take my quick survey? I’m hoping for a lot of responses today, so please share your thoughts if you can. We will be tracking responses at this link:

**[https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/a/end-of-year-survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39406290/319698681/-1266625000?ms=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx&refcode=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx_nogif&source=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx_nogif&utm_campaign=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx_nogif&utm_medium=email&contactdata=kPlUs6NIrAXwgVVb58NmWNveL7q6MzF759cUYSwl5WfOMnmuuJP4teD3MJEP%2BoPAa0iPlXCfccxZ5nEQknXiQq35mfiAqG28Zx%2BGOWVAkiamvdd8l5owdnUUErOUZh4A7ygCVMDQdO3uPNnj5IK7PEmSjlIn%2FfpLfxIRMpS%2BQxg%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjIyMzkwMC1lOTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtycybBnBib1YFLRkEp_bkQ0A_iDVaeauVqJLshUFIk=&emci=a7bffab2-de56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d6223900-e956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=18659593)**

We are building a campaign that is focused on the people of Wisconsin and the issues folks like you are most concerned about. That’s why it’s important to me to hear from you directly.

I appreciate you taking the time to give your feedback. It means a lot to me.

— Sarah Godlewski
| [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39406292/319698687/-1266625000?ms=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx&refcode=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx_nogif&source=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx_nogif&utm_campaign=em21_211206_EYSur2_esrv_gq_act___SG_ettx_nogif&utm_medium=email&contactdata=kPlUs6NIrAXwgVVb58NmWNveL7q6MzF759cUYSwl5WfOMnmuuJP4teD3MJEP%2BoPAa0iPlXCfccxZ5nEQknXiQq35mfiAqG28Zx%2BGOWVAkiamvdd8l5owdnUUErOUZh4A7ygCVMDQdO3uPNnj5IK7PEmSjlIn%2FfpLfxIRMpS%2BQxg%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjIyMzkwMC1lOTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtycybBnBib1YFLRkEp_bkQ0A_iDVaeauVqJLshUFIk=&emci=a7bffab2-de56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d6223900-e956-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=18659593)

body:

---
| | | Peter, you are being offered a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. We can't promise this moment will ever come again, so please read carefully.

Peter, we want to say thanks for being one of our Top Trump Patriots. As the radical Left ramps up their efforts to destroy President Trump's legacy and America First Agenda, your help means more than ever.

The cold, hard fact is this: the Democrat's dangerous agenda is growing in strength and numbers every day. Senate Republicans are the BEST check that we have on the left's growing power, but it's not enough.

name: Survey Request via Karen Bass for Mayor
subject: Are you invested in L.A.'s future?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
**Field Survey: Share Your Top Priorities with Karen Bass.**
**What issues are most important to you?**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.myngp.com/el/VqFjD0hfwOLUXek9FJeK2lnSFr175jy-mZLijHO6G40=/uY__RWHoYWhodTZ9GDQIFDvKmCZFv-h0dqQqHyilW8M=?ms=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&refcode=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&source=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})
---

**Karen wants to hear from 24 activists from ****18326**** before the deadline!**

_***Submit your response before 12/08 at 11:59 P.M.***_

Hello --

No movement is made possible by one person. It takes a coalition of activists, leaders, and organizations to create lasting change.

Karen has the vision and the drive to make our city a place that puts the people first. That's why we're coming directly to you. Karen wants to know what your top priorities are for the city and what YOU would like for her to address as L.A.'s next mayor.

**[Will you take our 90-second survey to share your top priorities with Karen? She's hoping to get feedback from 24 activists in your area.](https://act.myngp.com/el/VqFjD0hfwOLUXek9FJeK2lnSFr175jy-mZLijHO6G40=/uY__RWHoYWhodTZ9GDQIFDvKmCZFv-h0dqQqHyilW8M=?ms=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&refcode=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&source=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

From Marcia, a single mom in Silver Lake, to Melvin, a small business owner in East L.A., and Patricia, a senior living in Beverly Grove -- every single Angeleno deserves a seat at the table if we're going to address our city's biggest challenges.

Surveys like this are one of the best ways Karen can hear directly from folks in the community. If you have an opinion about how Karen can fight on behalf of Angelenos, we want to hear it!

**[Will you be one of the 24 activists we need from 18326 to complete Karen's survey? Make sure to submit your response before Wednesday's deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/VqFjD0hfwOLUXek9FJeK2lnSFr175jy-mZLijHO6G40=/uY__RWHoYWhodTZ9GDQIFDvKmCZFv-h0dqQqHyilW8M=?ms=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&refcode=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&source=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Thank you,

Team Bass

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/VqFjD0hfwOLUXek9FJeK2lnSFr175jy-mZLijHO6G40=/eayxVQPkVDtIB9scUbLzlhdktrTdjLq1oPVntDaUiO4=?ms=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&refcode=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&source=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---

Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
---

Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022
777 S Figueroa St
STE 4050
Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States

Additional information is available at [ethics.lacity.org](https://act.myngp.com/el/VqFjD0hfwOLUXek9FJeK2lnSFr175jy-mZLijHO6G40=/6qtZZeQ4zFge61Ur8ecLRTErlUgaZZs_r9LB8WdUYjI=).

---|---|---

[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/VqFjD0hfwOLUXek9FJeK2lnSFr175jy-mZLijHO6G40=/eayxVQPkVDtIB9scUbLzlhdktrTdjLq1oPVntDaUiO4=?ms=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&refcode=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&source=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211206_surv_esrv_gq_act___srkb4m_ettx&utm_medium=email)

**FROM:** Peter Willis
**DATE:** NOV. 27, 2021 Dear Joe Manchin,

**I urge you to stand with the rest of your Democratic Senators, take steps to remove the filibuster, and pass President Biden’s amazing agenda.**

When we, the American People, voted you into office, we expected you to **fight for our rights** and protect our interests.

But if the filibuster still stands, Republicans will make sure NOTHING will get done. _You will fail us._

**[So I’m donating $1 to sign on to UniteDemocrats with my signature on this letter to plead with you to stick with the Democratic Party and abolish the filibuster. Team,
Stop us if you’ve heard this one before: **_our healthcare system is broken._**
People refuse to go to the hospital — even with insurance — because they’re afraid of the bills. Doctors and nurses are overstretched — and have been for years, even before this pandemic. Independent pharmacists are squeezed out of business by pharma giants and insurance companies, AND THE LIST GOES ON.
Here’s the bigger problem: Congress lacks enough progressives willing to fight bold ideas like Medicare for All. We need leaders who aren’t afraid to shake up the system in Washington and give the people what they want.
**Matt is running for Congress to make Medicare for All a reality.** He understands that your access to care should not be determined by your zip code, employment status, or job.
But Matt really wants to know if you agree with us:

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. name: The Russell Girls
subject: Our dad is the best!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
Hi, this is Eva and Julia Russell.
We wanted to send you a quick email to let you know about our dad and see if you can help us out.
He's the best dad in the whole wide world. He's helped so many other kids enjoy the parks in South Florida by making sure that they are clean.
Our dad also takes us to the beach ALL the time. We love the beach. Sometimes he even gets us ice cream. He's also helped make sure our water and beaches stay clean.
That's why we think he would be the best person for the job and why we are helping on his campaign. Being a Senator seems hard, but our daddy will be the best Senator for our state!
You can help him win by donating today! So that all of the kids can play in clean parks and continue to enjoy our beaches! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211206-email]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211206-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211206-email]
Okay, bye bye!
--The Russell Girls
Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today.
