body:
It’s textbook corruption. It’s just plain wrong. | Listen — I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: I’m pissed at the PUCO — and every last one of the commissioners _has_ to go. Ohio’s Public Utilities Commission, with the help of Mike DeWine’s allies and Republican legislators in Columbus, sent kickbacks and favors to the FirstEnergy power company after FirstEnergy paid the PUCO chairman a $4 million bribe just weeks before he took the job. **_[_DONATE TO CLEAN HOUSE IN COLUMBUS →_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39407218/319702403/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.bd6e8d3d-ef56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.bd6e8d3d-ef56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDZlOGQzZC1lZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pcsz1WLRrEasGa4wJQTpXZk_s4rvtZzoyWL9bJHpDpo=)_** Of course, it doesn’t end there. The GOP-controlled legislature and DeWine passed HB6 — a bill that actually would’ve made hardworking Ohioans _pay_ to prop up failing FirstEnergy power plants. **It’s absolutely ridiculous. It’s textbook corruption. And it’s plain wrong.** Friend, it’s time to fire Mike DeWine and _every last one_ of the PUCO commissioners — just what I’ve pledged to do when you elect me governor. **_[Can you help me out by pitching in to support our campaign? I’ll only make it to Columbus with your clean_body: It’s textbook corruption. It’s just plain wrong. | Listen — I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: I’m pissed at the PUCO — and every last one of the commissioners has to go. Ohio’s Public Utilities Commission, with the help of Mike DeWine’s allies and Republican legislators in Columbus, sent kickbacks and favors to the FirstEnergy power company after FirstEnergy paid the PUCO chairman a $4 million bribe just weeks before he took the job. = Of course, it doesn’t end there. The GOP-controlled legislature and DeWine passed HB6 — a bill that actually would’ve made hardworking Ohioans pay to prop up failing FirstEnergy power plants. It’s absolutely ridiculous. It’s textbook corruption. And it’s plain wrong. Friend, it’s time to fire Mike DeWine and every last one of the PUCO commissioners — just what I’ve pledged to do when you elect me governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for your help, John = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Humbly asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
They’re going to fight very hard and use every trick they can to try to stop us
#

[**We are humbly asking you to make a $5 contribution to our campaign to keep Alex Padilla in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211206-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=486_159979_hbuQxj&akid=486%2E159979%2EhbuQxj)
Here's why:
Right now, we’re laying the groundwork to organize across ALL of California in 2022. Alex isn’t taking anything for granted because we know how important it is to hold on to this seat and keep Democrats’ majority in the Senate, _and_ we know how hard Republicans are going to come after us.
The sad truth is that Republicans, both in California and across the country, are more committed to preserving the status quo than solving the problems facing our state and our country.
_They’d love nothing more than to replace California’s first Latino senator with a far-right Trump acolyte who will vote in lockstep with Mitch McConnell._ So they’re going to fight very hard and use every trick they can to try to stop us.
**It’s incredibly important that we have the resources to take on the deep-pocketed Republicans and special interests who want to see us fail, so we are asking you directly:**
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to Alex’s campaign for U.S. Senate? Alex is running to fight for progressive policies like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal, and we need your support to keep him in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211206-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=486_159979_hbuQxj&akid=486%2E159979%2EhbuQxj)

name: Mike Gallagher
subject: My response to Fauci’s arrogant and unscientific claims
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
Dr. Fauci does not represent science. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=4fea670acdf24631a68ec09c45f16b7a&_e=qmG4YCGO52Cq_wUI-KEhIZAvmrxg5tzXgmSA4uXRdvpivkZrhWr4BOeHBcKMAYsQeeMo2pqXpzOnY25Q8_YPf-TFcc3FYjDnkv4QJHXlkrIZmH3Zr3gE8vtkxIlvmdWA-RD8veGRDMPSIkQ5z3SX0sCkkfQM5wUQgTzpqbwRtmCPoxEAdBCyCHSoKlUAdGL0rVavcypfdFRBB1UF2RBMLnCJ9NXZLoHuHfMaqSw5qSjm6Lhf0jH_crXtEXV3ybI-oiHhzy76l8Bg-zbPGrZjqeis_T6wQFnW0nDP0yc4JAeWsGs-tLs5KGKRNidzBBYhdG83nce0eOq9guGoQ-KEvWwYaUs7UJ5ElpHo8CdCNzQ2MqAmvnqEjIzFYP6GxRMibYCsDbW5a7QKKvHbjV8b4zpU9brQhzHqXmu8hh3lsUY%3D) Peter, Recently, Dr. Fauci gave an hour-long interview on national television during which he:
* Claimed that anybody who questions him is questioning science.
* Took credit for the vaccines produced under Operation Warp Speed.
* Dodged accountability for his role in funding gain-of-function research.

Here’s the bottom line: **Fauci does not represent science.** [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=4fea670acdf24631a68ec09c45f16b7a&_e=qmG4YCGO52Cq_wUI-KEhIZAvmrxg5tzXgmSA4uXRdvpivkZrhWr4BOeHBcKMAYsQeeMo2pqXpzOnY25Q8_YPf-TFcc3FYjDnkv4QJHXlkrIZmH3Zr3gE8vtkxIlvmdWA-RD8veGRDMPSIkQ5z3SX0sCkkfQM5wUQgTzpqbwRtmCPoxEAdBCyCHSoKlUAdGL0rVavcypfdFRBB1UF2RBMLpSExrA706FsyP3OFsBmV_TycJxkJ5tWrnYn1AWbc_FI88uCerMrp5lgAzf527rtU9u5RY28kiGE2LSAvF7WA0nGwMsv_fX0ZoIjs8HuQUo8HN6wvL_jq5mFIRkLSqFsOSa9AV_FJuprBKIVuhubD8R5C5Ksq3xbd7ysZKrMBijnp-_1GiufhNvMr5iQJdnwEkGPiztE3yy5zK4Da7N8lb0%3D) He’s the highest paid government employee who is using science as a cudgel with which to shut down debate. In fact, the idea that criticizing science is dangerous misunderstands what science is all about. Literally every scientific advancement ever made has been built on questioning the status-quo and with so many unanswered questions about the origin of this pandemic, Dr. Fauci’s disdain for debate is dangerous. **Fauci must be fired before he further destroys science.** This is not a political issue. This is an issue of truth and accountability –– and we simply cannot afford to lose this fight. [**ADD YOUR NAME: FIRE FAUCI**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=4fea670acdf24631a68ec09c45f16b7a&_e=qmG4YCGO52Cq_wUI-KEhIZAvmrxg5tzXgmSA4uXRdvpivkZrhWr4BOeHBcKMAYsQeeMo2pqXpzOnY25Q8_YPf-TFcc3FYjDnkv4QJHXlkrIZmH3Zr3gE8vtkxIlvmdWA-RD8veGRDMPSIkQ5z3SX0sCkkfQM5wUQgTzpqbwRtmCPoxEAdBCyCHSoKlUAdGL0rVavcypfdFRBB1UF2RBMLsO2lvS7HSYfOK7NVnV7sZuWJMu6_BATh8-QvPZQCdFu-XvLTa1pqgzwE1e9xBwADlnVjGoP98JRUT5d7xjkvm5mCCnaonOGdD_8_DSwCWArCfeFlBUqXZXaZbnIDD4w-DMOr5-03zykyxf7f_7k5hcoYtJYjjEsoh2G7HwVUmYPqD4g2GxRrmzxgvfMMjNwOH615-zogzshKim088-WOfk%3D) Thank you for your support, Mike Gallagher | |

body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. |

Peter,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. **I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I’m SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2c0ad8ec84c1400a8e4ebf447de2ec09&_e=uLp_bfNHsUG05AG1X7A_8uNOus4yCdNT5Qyq8jAfN3aH269lov5dNlliLedrvJPLxWUJO-jQ1lmDvCkXh27FYIGFrlDE6rFyxOgMyEG_29im_Pii-JqkQZdUWm6BFaJj3yOWJgJK62OidywleSAAECyRSByL014Nkx5qOvpU2MBJw_6TUxsElFIjC00dP5tEUPUQTt1PW4jr7-O5OmnA9BS8Rv1DGASOSFUfGGK7ZMA0213sQzg8gzyDR7thoQ_yf1d3DEScsJkQLxMfnKhiOLMYcW6V5MYsNJG-1bsJlN9zGdEWxkWZ2QffK_piAP76yATPW0yN8DLAzua23XQfG2OFjUAO4gBALrjLduJfMDZGqfU3uoSi9sdSM3OJ5zZq) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I’m in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2c0ad8ec84c1400a8e4ebf447de2ec09&_e=uLp_bfNHsUG05AG1X7A_8uNOus4yCdNT5Qyq8jAfN3aH269lov5dNlliLedrvJPLxWUJO-jQ1lmDvCkXh27FYIGFrlDE6rFyxOgMyEG_29im_Pii-JqkQZdUWm6BFaJj3yOWJgJK62OidywleSAAECyRSByL014Nkx5qOvpU2MBDtFTNzmZi48q1U2gFkN0zG3IguSY8jeXOnGzA9paE8o9BoU-VmKBv6hFCg0Z2dkApN1dtZ7KaD3wtv12ipzWRBojGZouj9TUTqz_uQscIeHqZXSS6fAtn7yDi7DXG4kifRrnZwDmtiVzUgRh940vm6Os_RG_ay-phaGignodzzKAWkxM0QWK9YAcuhbTMwx0uM7ox8Gem9Qw_XIt16DUe)
The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2c0ad8ec84c1400a8e4ebf447de2ec09&_e=uLp_bfNHsUG05AG1X7A_8uNOus4yCdNT5Qyq8jAfN3aH269lov5dNlliLedrvJPLxWUJO-jQ1lmDvCkXh27FYIGFrlDE6rFyxOgMyEG_29im_Pii-JqkQZdUWm6BFaJj3yOWJgJK62OidywleSAAECyRSByL014Nkx5qOvpU2MBJAgSS20IZXeyj1AFP-VSl2qH_mMnJ6QtxJuQnF_8df8NERi5pELogip6Un0AMP8g18bXTBa7tlJKXJxW310qCVGm-aNqHHFucrSwcr80yJWvykVNNRvOzyrGy2Ey3K9Udwft6_Epju_HppCMLmmKjkivebsg5G_VLg_CDyHZoRuwONnTV7GxnQeIGptf0idSUrhF4wDKZ8U4Hmiis-cau)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2c0ad8ec84c1400a8e4ebf447de2ec09&_e=uLp_bfNHsUG05AG1X7A_8uNOus4yCdNT5Qyq8jAfN3aH269lov5dNlliLedrvJPLxWUJO-jQ1lmDvCkXh27FYIGFrlDE6rFyxOgMyEG_29im_Pii-JqkQZdUWm6BFaJj3yOWJgJK62OidywleSAAECyRSByL014Nkx5qOvpU2MDqGy1wsFP3aN58Ubtm2q6NL_omdspN4pr8Kcpp2HqJ7XaZX6YJQD-_XvvQRjXhN6YRn0Dh5kt6p-c5bLT0R6QRloZ9MxLxjJhmMI_DTEZAPd5qw62mSXQfNMrVXW0cbsh3n1E251FmK9JGiQHlI10GXJLIvDGASWnJuj6THSUTx5aq4LxSLghs4YFRIagZFATB2tZhisbIyBWupCsFw0CO)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2c0ad8ec84c1400a8e4ebf447de2ec09&_e=uLp_bfNHsUG05AG1X7A_8uNOus4yCdNT5Qyq8jAfN3aH269lov5dNlliLedrvJPLxWUJO-jQ1lmDvCkXh27FYIGFrlDE6rFyxOgMyEG_29im_Pii-JqkQZdUWm6BFaJj3yOWJgJK62OidywleSAAECyRSByL014Nkx5qOvpU2MD4PxqX_RmUaYzcVhv6NDSOlNY5hTpmI0SVmezvapmFf4pP8_-owvoLgisLMxEnWYhuR2fjYFA9X_5EbURZusvxI2GXG9hcVZllw8fZNLCvZzjPxsAnikYXrdPTyEY7yqvojxdXOGe_sQ325ym83ixR0srZYnw-0roBOHWw7m_tPfZ-0MnCSrYT8uI_ORbKLmPqfsBP6f7rgCbaaGBlZNeG)

clean_body: I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Peter, My name is Alex Stovall and I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ... I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. Enough is enough. Black conservatives running for public office are being attacked by the Democrats and I’m in their crosshairs. The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - the leader of the Democrat Party - who said, “You ain’t black” if you don’t vote Democrat. This is more than just upsetting. The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President. You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. Despite my childhood, I persevered. No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it. I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - I need to raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities. I can WIN this race, but I must raise $250,000 in the next month. name: Dr. Oz
subject: This administration is out of touch with the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
body:
Biden failed, and left us with so little.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949572:6RiEAsENE:m:1:3253819041:5AA4B781D30E6E6369125ECBD3A3E9E8:r)
---

Fellow Americans,

_The collapse and carnage that is unfolding abroad and at our border is a true glimpse into the unmitigated disaster of Joe Biden and his administration._

I was heartbroken and disgusted by the Biden administration's reckless departure from Afghanistan that left Americans behind. Our people deserve better. _[**Join my campaign to bring back strong leadership to America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949572:6RiEAsENE:m:1:3253819041:5AA4B781D30E6E6369125ECBD3A3E9E8:r)_

As a medical student at the Philadelphia VA hospital where I worked with veterans, I witnessed first-hand the sacrifices made by our men and women in uniform.

While I supported leaving Afghanistan, I believe President Biden displayed an utter dereliction of duty by surrendering to the Taliban. _The tragedy that ensued will weigh on our shoulders for years to come._

On the homefront, Biden has failed us as well: the surge of undocumented migrants crossing the Border has not slowed down since he has taken office. _**[Pitch in here to secure our border and put Americans first once again.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949572:6RiEAsENE:m:1:3253819041:5AA4B781D30E6E6369125ECBD3A3E9E8:r)**_

If left unchecked, this will not only become an economic disaster but a complete humanitarian catastrophe. _**[Americans can not endure another catastrophe of this magnitude.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949572:6RiEAsENE:m:1:3253819041:5AA4B781D30E6E6369125ECBD3A3E9E8:r)**_

**As Commander in Chief of the United States, Joe Biden has failed us.

Such a display of weakness on the world stage would not have happened under President Trump's leadership.**

I refuse to be led by such an incompetent leader any longer. His failures go far beyond political partisanship. Joe Biden's sickening actions should outrage every patriotic American. The U.S. is supposed to be a defender of democracy and a protector of its allies.

This administration is out of touch with the American people -- and we are sick of it.

As Pennsylvania's Senator, I will always put the people FIRST.

Thank You,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949572:6RiEAsENE:m:1:3253819041:5AA4B781D30E6E6369125ECBD3A3E9E8:r)
Dr. Oz

* * *
_Dr. Oz is a Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you.**[Donate $25 today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58949573:6RiEAsENE:m:1:3253819041:5AA4B781D30E6E6369125ECBD3A3E9E8:r)** to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania's next Senator._

body:
It’s a power grab, plain and simple. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39407734/319709397/823540626?refcode=ea.9fafb8ab-f256-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.9fafb8ab-f256-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmFmYjhhYi1mMjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wftymr_Wnu0XOhFlaWO43XIEJHiD-KHYCOj2rKSupXg=&emci=9b6ca7e6-ba56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9fafb8ab-f256-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
**We need to talk about gerrymandering here in North Carolina.** Gerrymandering is what happens when the party in control of redistricting knows that they won’t win power on the issues — and when they’re more committed to maintaining that power than to heeding the will of the people. Republicans in Raleigh drew new maps for our legislative and congressional districts that could grant them a _supermajority_ in the legislature and _10_ of our 14 seats in the House of Representatives. That outcome simply wouldn’t reflect the political reality on the ground, team. Let us break it down: In the 2020 elections, Democratic House candidates earned about _**30,000 more votes**_ overall than Republican candidates did — but only won _**5 of 13 seats**_ up for grabs. Why’s that? Because Republicans consolidated their hold on power during the 2011 redistricting process. **The GOP found a strategy that works for them, and they’ve stuck with it. Thanks to their newly gerrymandered maps, 2022 could be even worse.** **[Roy is committed to supporting Democratic candidates across our state ahead of the midterm elections, but can’t do it alone. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I need your help, Emma. Republicans are on a mission to take back control of Congress in 2022, and they're laser-focused on New Hampshire. Mitch McConnell thinks next year’s elections will be good for Republicans, and he’s optimistic about flipping seats like Annie Kuster's and mine. If Republicans retake Congress, they will block critical legislation on voting rights protections, climate change, reproductive rights, and more. Before I go any further, can you split a donation between my campaign and Annie Kuster's to keep Congress blue? **[With all eyes on New Hampshire, it's critical that we have the resources necessary to build a robust on-the-ground campaign that is ready for whatever the GOP throws our way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39407813/319710211/-1195653858?refcode=e20211206_mwh-amksplit&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODY2YTFhNS1mMjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Nd9GvOYsJiZm8m6jHjXbQVFRTiUJ34b-RbBZnjghAo=)** Annie has a proven record of reaching across the aisle to deliver for Granite Staters. Thanks to her leadership on the Bipartisan Infrastructure Package, communities across New Hampshire will receive meaningful investments in roads and bridges, drinking water, clean energy, and so much more. We can't afford to lose Annie's voice in Congress. But her seat is at the top of Republicans' target list. They're flooding New Hampshire with millions of dollars to unseat Annie and me and replace us with extreme right-wing Republicans. We can't let this happen. I’m no stranger to tough fights, and I know we can win this. But it’s not going to be easy, and it’s going to take all of us working together. **[Piece by piece, one dollar at a time, we are going to build the strongest campaign we can. That starts with you, Emma -- please split a donation between Annie Kuster's and my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39407814/319710212/-1195653858?refcode=e20211206_mwh-amksplit&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODY2YTFhNS1mMjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Nd9GvOYsJiZm8m6jHjXbQVFRTiUJ34b-RbBZnjghAo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39407815/319710213/-1195653858?refcode=e20211206_mwh-amksplit&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODY2YTFhNS1mMjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Nd9GvOYsJiZm8m6jHjXbQVFRTiUJ34b-RbBZnjghAo=)

clean_body: | | | I need your help, Emma. Republicans are on a mission to take back control of Congress in 2022, and they're laser-focused on New Hampshire. Mitch McConnell thinks next year’s elections will be good for Republicans, and he’s optimistic about flipping seats like Annie Kuster's and mine. If Republicans retake Congress, they will block critical legislation on voting rights protections, climate change, reproductive rights, and more. Before I go any further, can you split a donation between my campaign and Annie Kuster's to keep Congress blue? = Annie has a proven record of reaching across the aisle to deliver for Granite Staters. Thanks to her leadership on the Bipartisan Infrastructure Package, communities across New Hampshire will receive meaningful investments in roads and bridges, drinking water, clean energy, and so much more. We can't afford to lose Annie's voice in Congress. But her seat is at the top of Republicans' target list. They're flooding New Hampshire with millions of dollars to unseat Annie and me and replace us with extreme right-wing Republicans. We can't let this happen. I’m no stranger to tough fights, and I know we can win this. But it’s not going to be easy, and it’s going to take all of us working together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you for your support. I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: John Fetterman

body:
We can’t let a multi-millionaire celebrity doctor buy this U.S. Senate seat and destroy our Democratic Senate majority.
#
Derek, Dr. Oz is turning our great Commonwealth and our incredibly important midterm elections into a joke. See what the _Associated Press_ said?👇👇👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37967?refcode=em20211206-3733&t=1&akid=3733%2E434096%2EUZtPab)
This news headline is in direct response to Dr. Oz spending over $1.2 million OF HIS OWN MONEY on TV ad buys almost immediately after jumping into this race.
Pennsylvania will *not* be bought and paid for by the highest bidder. Pennsylvanians deserve representation from someone who is willing to fight the hard fights + listen to the people. And we already know Dr. Oz is willing to put profit above all else (including the health and safety of his former TV viewers).
There’s no other way to say it, Derek: **Dr. Oz is a GOP millionaire who is already self-funding six-figure TV ad buys. And if we’re going to compete with his millions, we have to raise as much money as possible _now._**
**[Will you rush a donation of $5 to ensure that we have what it takes to win this election? Peter,

Lauren Boebert is back in the news again. This time, for calling her colleague a terrorist, just because she’s a Muslim.

Boebert reminds me of — 20 years ago — when Colorado had the nickname “the hate state.”

The Colorado I know and love is a place of community values, where we raise one another up, not tear each other down.

Unfortunately, Lauren Boebert seems to be stuck in a different Colorado. She lives in her own private hate state.

It wasn’t bad enough that she encouraged insurrectionists to storm the Capitol on January 6th and spread anti-mask and anti-vaccine conspiracy theories for months. Now she’s spreading blatant Islamophobia and hate speech from Colorado to Washington.

Lauren Boebert is dangerous for our country and for Colorado. She does not represent our values and she should not be a decision-maker in Congress.

Until we can vote her out, Congress needs to take action to hold her accountable. **[Add your name and tell Congress: censure Boebert and strip her of her committee assignments >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39407867/319711947/1801693503?source=direct_link&referrer=group-caraveoforcongress&refcode=ea.c4d714b4-f356-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.c4d714b4-f356-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGQ3MTRiNC1mMzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEJTutS4YDmFavgoNFc5jbNvION7HybAAkfvQ-sgR90=&emci=0bfc7c93-e256-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=c4d714b4-f356-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102)**

| | | **Lauren Boebert isn’t sorry**

_-CNN_
---
We’ve seen Paul Gosar’s ludicrous insistence that there was nothing wrong with posting a video showing him killing Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. Even after his colleagues in the House voted to officially censure Paul Gosar and remove him from his committee assignments, it is clear that **his behavior has set a dangerous precedent for his GOP colleagues.**

Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-CO) made inflammatory and bigoted comments about Rep. Ilhan Omar (D-MN) and refuses to apologize. Fellow American - my Democrat opponent is on Twitter asking his followers for campaign donations.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Liz Cheney tried to lay a trap for 45!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Stop Lyin Liz |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=379f1d0cad&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud Arizona Representative leading the way in election integrity: from pioneering the Maricopa audit to developing world-class watermarks and security systems to verify and solidify ballot-integrity, I fight every day to make sure our elections are protected.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0ea0c7ca34&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **This is why I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona. We desperately need our elections cleaned up. I am a six-sigma process engineer – I know how to get this job done.**

_[You can support my campaign here. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=411368c22c&e=44b8c466b0) Right now, we are fighting back against the media that is silencing our movement. Every dollar helps tremendously._

President Trump just put out a challenge...
---
|
---
| _“It’s really interesting, everybody wants me on television, I get the highest ratings by far, they need ratings to survive, and yet I put out a challenge to debate me about the massive election fraud, which took place in the 2020 Presidential Election, and there are no takers – think of it, zero takers for the so-called ‘ratings machine.’_

_The reason is, they know they can’t win. All I have to do is lay out the facts- they are irrefutable. I’ve supposedly won all my political debates, but this would be the easiest of them all! Swing state by swing state, they get decimated. This is the Hoax and the Scam and the Crime of the Century. Just remember, no takers!”_

**A very reasonable challenge, and something which needs to be done. But no one will even engage. _This is how scared the media is of letting the true narrative of the election integrity movement get out! They won’t let it happen!_**
---
|
---
| **RINO Turncoat Liz Cheney is threatening our President so that if he brings up election integrity, she will try and trap him and punish him for speaking the truth.**

**_The Gateway Pundit Reports:_**

_Vicious Liz Cheney is now openly threatening President Trump._

_The turncoat Republican and serial liar warned President Trump that any “lying” about the election results could result in criminal penalties._

_Cheney hopes that if she gaslights the American public long enough they will excuse the fraud in the 2020 election._

_Weakling GOP House Leader Kevin McCarthy allows this from Republican Caucus members._

_They both need to go._

**_Yes, in America this is what political debates have come to. One side trying to speak the truth, and the other threatening to throw you in jail if you disagree with them._**

This isn’t America. This isn’t Freedom. This is Maoist. **Silence those who disagree with you so no one learns the truth.**

_[And this is why I need your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=185c50ea4e&e=44b8c466b0) Every day we are fighting to loudly proclaim the truth of election integrity and put pressure on AG Mark Brnovich to demand perp walks! [Please donate today with anything you can! Make a rush donation of $50 tonight to help us keep up the pressure!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3f22213885&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=50af558bc4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=84def4ebeb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=d049a37f45) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=d049a37f45).

subject: Holiday Food and Toy Drive
body:
Joe Lombardo for Governor is excited to be putting on a Holiday Food and Toy Drive in partnership with Casa de Luz!
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rdDw77z3TVjMKF8jcLe_amH_cYUiWVImxCl03SmJomKi4MLVe3XotucF2chR7lL0GRGNAbh_FCEVfk3NP5buR4a6Ctviuo7wCpnshiaN2d-Gcx4xh9KUL9JjLAuasKJGVoZem7nd0IxfemeqNnQaNZyGIG7Huth-&c=8qqemMX1escxYfKsAl2-52fX5lQ4t0wUxjnkysKcUSxyg0urXXdVHg==&ch=2SRJ4ZUct5Ut3TO_rHpzbBjKvNo_gaT29o3azNJfYTe398lyXoLmOg==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
Joe Lombardo for Governor is excited to be putting on a Holiday Food and Toy Drive in partnership with Casa de Luz!
From December 13th to December 17th, we invite you to swing Lombardo Campaign Headquarters located at 4825 S Rainbow Blvd #212 in Las Vegas and donate new and unwrapped toys or any non-perishable food items!
We are excepting Drop-offs anytime daily from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM - details found below!
---
|
---
| Thank you in advance for getting in the giving spirit with us this holiday season and participating in this great drive for those in need.
Let's join together on our mission to show a positive force for good in our state and communities!
Warm regards, Team Joe Lombardo
---

Hey Fellow Conservative,

Since I started my campaign, I've attracted a lot of haters.

The Lincoln Project, Ibram X. Kendi, the Pima Democrats... basically every liberal on the internet.

My campaign has _definitely struck_ a nerve with the Left.

That's because, unlike other candidates before, I'm not playing defense.

The Left is driving our country into the ground. They are hell-bent on turning our nation into a country of losers.

I'm not going to sit by and let that happen. That's why I decided to run for the United States Senate. _We need to get back to putting America first._

We can't leave the Biden Administration and Democrats in charge for the next three years. Republicans need to take back the Senate so we can block their progressive agenda. **We must win in Arizona to make that possible.**

We have to retire lame politicians like Senator Mark Kelly.

**It's time for a new generation of bold leadership. And I need your help to make that happen!**

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Join me, Patty Murray, Tim Ryan, Jimmy Panetta, and veterans on Capitol Hill this Wednesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqYkkXXz-vQku0b106Hl8Mr4sGmzF5BIE55maZNWiYA=/b7dmgWEmxK94GCcTyYHPhYUNzrbwS04Fv-dh-nQWOz0=)

Peter,

If you are in the Washington, DC area this Wednesday evening, I hope you'll consider joining me at [_**the largest pre-Army/Navy Game event on Capitol Hill**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqYkkXXz-vQku0b106Hl8Mr4sGmzF5BIE55maZNWiYA=/b7dmgWEmxK94GCcTyYHPhYUNzrbwS04Fv-dh-nQWOz0=). Together with Senator Patty Murray, Congressmen Tim Ryan, Jimmy Panetta, Mike Thompson, and many more veteran leaders in Washington, we will be celebrating our work to support and elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress.

The Army/Navy Game is about more than just football. It's about coming together to recognize that, even though we come from different places, and even though we wear different uniforms or perform different tasks in service, we have all sworn to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. The Army/Navy Game is a reminder that we serve something larger than ourselves.

At Taking the Hill, [_**we believe Congress should be made up of people who believe in serving something larger than themselves, too**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqYkkXXz-vQku0b106Hl8Mr4sGmzF5BIE55maZNWiYA=/b7dmgWEmxK94GCcTyYHPhYUNzrbwS04Fv-dh-nQWOz0=). That's why we fight so hard for our veteran candidates and members of Congress.

If you're around on Wednesday evening, we'd love to have you. [_**RSVP for your ticket by clicking here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqYkkXXz-vQku0b106Hl8Mr4sGmzF5BIE55maZNWiYA=/b7dmgWEmxK94GCcTyYHPhYUNzrbwS04Fv-dh-nQWOz0=) Even if you can't make it, [_we 'd love to have your support with a contribution today._](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqYkkXXz-vQku0b106Hl8Mr4sGmzF5BIE55maZNWiYA=/b7dmgWEmxK94GCcTyYHPhYUNzrbwS04Fv-dh-nQWOz0=)

Thank you for supporting those who serve our country. See you soon.

Beat Navy,
Patrick

_Hon. Patrick J. Murphy_
_32nd Under Secretary of the Army_
_Former Congressman (PA-01)_
[_@PatrickMurphyPA_](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqYkkXXz-vQku0b106Hl8Mr4sGmzF5BIE55maZNWiYA=/afbuKrb-t6uW1MuUvxKf9jlhzfmLZ8I-e65aCGlOFM0=)

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/WqYkkXXz-vQku0b106Hl8Mr4sGmzF5BIE55maZNWiYA=/9JQZUO5-y_F3EQBwrkPzFkiWqWcJcNY51-Z4CCm8x8k= "https://act.myngp.com/el/WqYkkXXz-vQku0b106Hl8Mr4sGmzF5BIE55maZNWiYA=/9JQZUO5-y_F3EQBwrkPzFkiWqWcJcNY51-Z4CCm8x8k=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

body:
Like all Americans, Republicans and Independents want representation from their Congressmember. And they know that they’re not getting it from Marjorie Taylor Greene.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408505/319725959/-825069922?refcode=20211017_tf_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWMxY2Y5My1mOTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuCbR47UabNGhRDGHWsxAqC6Yl2jzppoLtItBgzrpC8=) Team, did you see the email Marcus sent you this weekend? He’s committed to meeting Georgians where they are. He knows that ours is a traditionally conservative-leaning district. But he also knows that a huge percentage of Republicans and Independents in northwest Georgia are embarrassed by Marjorie Taylor Greene. **Most importantly, Marcus knows that all Americans deserve representation from their Congressmember -- and they’re not getting it with Marjorie Taylor Greene.** **[Marcus will deliver, but he needs our help to get there. Can you donate $20 or more to help us send Marjorie Taylor Greene into political retirement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408506/319725960/-1217423743?refcode=2021206_tf_people2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWMxY2Y5My1mOTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuCbR47UabNGhRDGHWsxAqC6Yl2jzppoLtItBgzrpC8=) ** **\----Begin forwarded message----**

Subject: Meeting Georgians where they are
Sent on Sunday, December 5, 2021 at 3:00 p.m.
Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. In February of this year, I announced my campaign for Congress in Georgia’s 14th District against Marjorie Taylor Greene. **When I set out to run for Congress, I made it a priority to meet people where they are. That means talking to them, hearing what they have to say, and what they’re interested in. ** Here’s what I can tell you with confidence: There is a huge percentage of voters in our district who are embarrassed by Marjorie Taylor Greene. _Like all Americans, people in this district want real representation from their Congressmember. And they know that they’re not getting it from Marjorie Taylor Greene._ **I’ve served this country for nearly thirty years -- and I’m committed to bringing that same spirit of service to Congress. But I need your help to get there. ** **[So today, I’m asking you to donate $25 or more to help me defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and deliver real representation for Georgia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408507/319725961/-1217423743?refcode=2021206_tf_people2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWMxY2Y5My1mOTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuCbR47UabNGhRDGHWsxAqC6Yl2jzppoLtItBgzrpC8=) ** | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408508/319725962/-825069922?refcode=2021206_tf_people2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWMxY2Y5My1mOTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuCbR47UabNGhRDGHWsxAqC6Yl2jzppoLtItBgzrpC8=)**

Marcus Flowers

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: The media is attempting to "cancel" our campaign
body:
The Leftwing media are once again trying to 'cancel' my campaign. I have nothing to hide, am proud of our campaign, and they have nothing that would justify "canceling" our campaign.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hUnYMjjmCHDRzuKxYhgxLBN47FPO08IxwqkFubvC_7cOdqgcboy5r1F5JsLr7HSrSvMeionaC6W77ZyWzGiY77qe5rhbkvz6d7L9pYRZfCe6C_Ie32nnkVkbSz8SKYCcV6HN8Ys-zDcL4l8uEAPZSnFoSl42Gw6684Mk5aZ8ukVHQxjH57wjcDs45lEmCtMd&c=7arYg23R2W8eb3gVAM1htvqdKD0H4Q2uVRvC6xxaGS8nGoVRDyA4YQ==&ch=FKiZv6QulUfWpuijg4GdWSpYo3JQHMB_QqMEyCFN73mpIyIJCiFSpw==)

| Peter,
The Leftwing media are once again trying to 'cancel' my campaign. I have nothing to hide, am proud of our campaign, and they have nothing that would justify "canceling" our campaign.
So what does the media do to attack constitutional conservatives when they don't have a story? Create fake controversy or outright lie.
This time the media is targeting my most recent ad attacking JD Vance for labeling himself a "Never-Trump guy" and even threatening to vote for Hillary Clinton.
[Watch the TV ad the Leftwing media wants to CANCEL below:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hUnYMjjmCHDRzuKxYhgxLBN47FPO08IxwqkFubvC_7cOdqgcboy5r1F5JsLr7HSrSvMeionaC6W77ZyWzGiY77qe5rhbkvz6d7L9pYRZfCe6C_Ie32nnkVkbSz8SKYCcV6HN8Ys-zDcL4l8uEAPZSnFoSl42Gw6684Mk5aZ8ukVHQxjH57wjcDs45lEmCtMd&c=7arYg23R2W8eb3gVAM1htvqdKD0H4Q2uVRvC6xxaGS8nGoVRDyA4YQ==&ch=FKiZv6QulUfWpuijg4GdWSpYo3JQHMB_QqMEyCFN73mpIyIJCiFSpw==)

| The media is attacking the ad because it was filmed on a high school football field.
Our campaign paid the district to film the campaign ad there and we blurred out any logos and mention of the district's name.
This is just Fake News.
The truth is, the Leftwing media wants to hurt our campaign and either elect a Radical Leftist to the Senate or Never-Trumper, JD Vance.
I refuse to take down the ad.
I will not bend my knee nor kiss the ring of the Leftwing media or cancel culture.
Peter, I am asking for your help to keep playing this ad on the airwaves. Let's DOUBLE DOWN and expose JD Vance as a Never-Trumper to the voters. Please help me raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to keep this ad playing.

body:

Friend --

body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408736/319731361/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0YzMwYi1mZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmBJLYNBgswuTziy1n0MThfoRe_zs527DvSpHUm7YAA=&emci=f4dcefdd-d056-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=80f4c30b-fe56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11385749)

_**"I will be damned if I nearly died having both of [my daughters], only to have them see the day where they would become second-class citizens..."**_ \- Christy Smith

Peter,

You know what gets us fired up? When out of touch, conservative SCOTUS Justices (nominated by presidents who lost the popular vote twice) talk about women's bodies and what women can and can't do with them. It's a disgrace.

Because reproductive freedom isn't a political tool to be used to control and manipulate. It's settled law and a Constitutional right. It's also personal.

That's why Christy spoke out in a [ powerful and emotional new video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408737/319731362/941721655?refcode=em21_211206_watchvideoScotus&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0YzMwYi1mZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmBJLYNBgswuTziy1n0MThfoRe_zs527DvSpHUm7YAA=) where she highlights a terrifying experience with pregnancy and "how it connects to the greater fight for reproductive rights and freedom, which includes abortion."

**[You have to watch Christy’s video, and then chip in to help Christy save the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408738/319731363/941721655?refcode=em21_211206_watchvideoScotus&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0YzMwYi1mZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmBJLYNBgswuTziy1n0MThfoRe_zs527DvSpHUm7YAA=)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408739/319731364/941721655?refcode=em21_211206_watchvideoScotus&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0YzMwYi1mZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmBJLYNBgswuTziy1n0MThfoRe_zs527DvSpHUm7YAA=)
---

She also spent some time last week speaking with Jezebel in a recently published article, pledging her commitment to keep abortion rights at the front and center of her campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408740/319731365/941721655?refcode=em21_211206_watchvideoScotus&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0YzMwYi1mZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmBJLYNBgswuTziy1n0MThfoRe_zs527DvSpHUm7YAA=)
---
Christy is absolutely right.

Attacks on women's freedoms in any state are attacks on our freedom everywhere. That's why we will never give up. We will continue to fight so long as we have a voice to use and a platform to stand on.

And I know Christy can count on you to join her. Because, while we have many hurdles to overcome and a long road ahead in the movement for reproductive justice, **there is nothing we can't accomplish when we come together in solidarity to fight for it.**

If you're angry and worried about these attacks and the future of Roe too, now is the time to take a stand. Let's make sure all the far-right, anti-choicers like my opponent Mike Garcia, Justices Brett Kavanaugh, Amy Coney Barrett, and anyone standing in the way of full reproductive freedom never have their way.

**[Please watch Christy’s powerful video and then chip in whatever you can so we can stand together in defense of women and women's reproductive freedom>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39408741/319731366/941721655?refcode=em21_211206_watchvideoScotus&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0YzMwYi1mZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmBJLYNBgswuTziy1n0MThfoRe_zs527DvSpHUm7YAA=)**

Thank you so much for what you do and continue to do. We couldn't do this work without you.

\--Team Christy

Fellow Conservative,

**It is that time of the year again.**

President Trump has started hosting rallies for his Conservative supporters. We are reaching out to our top supporters of the America First Agenda to determine where one of these great rallies should take place. We believe that North Carolina would be a prime spot for President Trump. **PLEASE ANSWER BELOW:**

We know how excited you are to hear straight from the President, and these rallies are the perfect opportunity. President Trump deserves to have his voice heard, even though the Radical Left continues the attempt to silence him.

**Thank you for your response.**

God Bless,

America First Patriots

clean_body: A Trump Rally in North Carolina - Response Needed! | Fellow Conservative, It is that time of the year again. President Trump has started hosting rallies for his Conservative supporters. We are reaching out to our top supporters of the America First Agenda to determine where one of these great rallies should take place. We believe that North Carolina would be a prime spot for President Trump. PLEASE ANSWER BELOW: We know how excited you are to hear straight from the President, and these rallies are the perfect opportunity. President Trump deserves to have his voice heard, even though the Radical Left continues the attempt to silence him. Let us know if you think North Carolina should be on top of the list of places for a rally hosted by President Trump. It will only take a few seconds, and as a top supporter of President Trump, we know we can count on you to give us the TRUTH. Thank you for your response. God Bless, America First Patriots | Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 😡 Betrayed . . . again . . . by our own Party.
body:
Americans will now be in yet another database – but this one is wildly dangerous as it contains our private medical information that will be weaponized by the Biden Regime.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/v3aFek892DiDsKyL0Usrkwqg/0UJN892yViBPAOU8BJZFgDsw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/v3aFek892DiDsKyL0Usrkwqg/0UJN892yViBPAOU8BJZFgDsw) Americans will now be in yet another database – but this one is wildly dangerous as it contains our private medical information that will be weaponized by the Biden Regime.

The “Immunization Infrastructure Modernization Act” creates a federal, vaccination database – and 80 Republicans just voted for it!

**Patriot, our party needs MASSIVE change** , and that can only come from an outsider like me who has ZERO ties to the establishment!

[**Help me win my campaign against a RINO Incumbent and help me lead the hostile takeover of the GOP!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/v3aFek892DiDsKyL0Usrkwqg/0UJN892yViBPAOU8BJZFgDsw)

Kevin McCarthy, the leader of the Republican Establishment who fantasizes about becoming the next Speaker of the House, was of course one of the 80 Republicans to vote for the bill – and where he goes, the Establishment follows.

The negative result of this was stated by Rep. Mary Miller, a Republican who voted against the bill, and her valid concern is that the **database will track the unvaccinated and they, “will be targeted and forced to comply with Biden’s crazy ‘global vaccination’ vision.”**

The 80 Republicans who voted for this horrible piece of legislation just put a target on the backs of the 72 million American adults who choose not to inject themselves with a vaccine that is permanently injuring and killing people all over the world!

Regardless of your stance on the vaccine, I believe we can all agree that the federal government should not be given the power to track, harass and hunt down Americans based on their private medical decisions.

The federal government shouldn’t be dictating what Americans put inside their bodies.

If you agree with me, [**then please help me get to Congress so I can take a stand against the weakness of the GOP Establishment while fighting back against the INSANITY of the COMMUNIST LEFT!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/v3aFek892DiDsKyL0Usrkwqg/0UJN892yViBPAOU8BJZFgDsw)

Thanks for all that you do, and thank you for your support.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Kina Collins
subject: 1,000 Homicides
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
Cook County Medical Examiner’s Office has already recorded more than 1,000 homicides | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8sz02QE1aPBpyb6wqP3esNCtp4WFLHvaPUT0pjki48L66J0DDAKKgWqDDxO1BKpfUU6bDSnugd_Mo64k5bkMeLcY65UTL32Bqy_7Z6Rdb7DCOuLAi-g6Zp-1LyJOQy4nTzue6Ki0_bbqyct2FPCugaghdLKZohJbJkMkoIhxgkOyHG33qMvipZ9MSlMn_vS5ZyRA0jtnlPf_v7vu4WQD5jRM/3hm/Cih8BCGjTUCvNNijsxe_Ag/h0/TvjQwCgYk_iOt-62E5oNKMfBtk7Hiv-LZfjMuEt5xEA) Dear Team, Today, reporting [revealed](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWoGtNRrmVFNKS0ttH5O-akukl2DzX4jlWLXI8CgJooIE3VZ-iltDU2nCv7KevTh4MwjTgYRGVQmxQSqCAGOpnkWSDzIWo2pWFUz8u9LO0zp8oJHfpFtr9PvO7JS87mtCNpYVo8L9EXq3deJR8ULSY71ecHBiHM45td6E6dpFniBf4DNl3TuSJQB34TQ5zkdUS8N2i5qQtxWNsODGOg1cilZKkklO9jvts3sniLIvt6_cmaSmBJ2ZqhD56lOnr4hjZkehePkE7ivFWt0FqhuzFO-Lx9d8KxarQ441EpEt4bSY9rTPhvG31aVRJ2_a3iROfl1KaqS_Y9ln6dS3US7qb7jye1c7MhL7WACis-_Nhmfq/3hm/Cih8BCGjTUCvNNijsxe_Ag/h1/a1tH9hetVqOXFLfM0nH48Nb1hNQRcKrCuPwLmQaScGw) that with a month left in the year, the **Cook County Medical Examiner’s Office has already recorded more than 1,000 homicides, the highest annual number in nearly three decades.** The majority of the homicides involved guns, and more than 90% of the victims were Black or Latino. In Washington, D.C., politicians use Chicago as a political punching bag—or worse, a punchline. They talk about gun violence here as abstract, a worst-case scenario, an example of what they never want to become. But on the ground in this city, this issue isn’t hypothetical. It isn’t a punchline. For everyone who calls Chicago home, gun violence is our lived reality. For families like mine, it’s deeply personal. [**Help us show the country that Chicago is not a punchline. It is a city in the midst of a public health crisis, and deserves our national attention, and a national solution.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfCa090ZoHG6ANVTyk1ZDrwHLURPeEJDus_qHtw2GZw9VGJAKyfHcYHQocNe88zIlqId-n4XkCW4nzwknPdfOYDnuYAtHSlTVg0ZsDjJC_QKDfBGrfyxvBsLpwKpPpjDBJp6S0a3J8bb0uIlsKnu6jbSjQ9qhxwvkkIPsOEDXzsxIN4phcrFPRCTjL4eoSB8h5bLfxSTGHBJbR5OKhH27l-a0VKB-rDJWWPe2uSGcXXG2sBM5vjUnzi1a4Fvwwy0JSywkmHIfP7Nvkekvxwx6oow/3hm/Cih8BCGjTUCvNNijsxe_Ag/h2/AvOuNvVej8qF15zagkuRlVua08fzcBrY979NkbJkCJ0) [Contribute](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfCa090ZoHG6ANVTyk1ZDrwIAMXcb92sT4yFaWZZwcyxYd11zTja5tYad0v5keEcqf9F0sgV7ntBt0wT6Vx4yJX7GPbOMmzWvJo_UjlCgT6EtR2xvs1puobm6Uh1WzqhwgAZ9HLsDjForjpZYvAtocaqMQnD3xrSVEQzRSq8DR7asz9U_c9qa0ghdEZ-xt6BjHRpflm1B1WhVq1P0X7sEDs4cbLNwQ89_ELk9T4kiYsJbiZQHK9I0DTcqNEYI2TJVl9K356Hd6kjHCX7CG1CRb1w/3hm/Cih8BCGjTUCvNNijsxe_Ag/h3/cBKgoyYQsjCPEyijWqkbr5WrpOXj81jhAHpIzp3WBwg) While D.C. politicians will continue to invoke our city in their social media posts, fundraising emails, on the floors of Congress, and back in their districts, we in Chicago have a duty to keep reminding them: You are responsible. Every death from a gun in this city is a death that Washington chose not to prevent. And what’s happened to our city will happen to yours if you keep prioritizing your donors over real people’s lives—not just in Chicago, but in Oxford, Michigan, in Newtown, Connecticut, and in Parkland, Florida. A majority of guns used in Chicago crimes came from out of state. So long as federal gun laws and resources fall short, so too will our city’s attempts to end the rising tide of gun violence. **To meet this moment, we need federal legislation that delivers long-overdue, comprehensive gun safety. And we need federal representation from Chicago that forces Washington politicians to understand what’s happening in our city—and what will happen to theirs—and rally them to action.** [**Help me give that representation to IL-7**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfCa090ZoHG6ANVTyk1ZDrwLuqpDpoDGO2oGqNCCnTMB_KhD-Fp46GmGICkeVYzxZ1T1M4fDX41tXnw-dCHabvnCxklo4oTy80D4IR95k5IKFBkb-1afOSeUy_Dd1ve7Cz3hkf-4hFCdM23mry2fFVzsTOFW2agyVrBl7uk5FsdZqkyZgVQa1oqtSaVt2XPEomV9PttrWSAl625Gqry6J55qHWX4bG63JQe4TfaT1ph3wuobIAHt9qdT7asaQHC7MeqG5wlRsnF1szDuVcS0qMFA/3hm/Cih8BCGjTUCvNNijsxe_Ag/h4/qoaBesWS5NcX8UgDGHU-iZ-66N4g098bTWFuK5NZ8RM) In Solidarity, Kina Collins [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvCmYnnW-6I0oaLoxnMYHNBtrnKze4IZi6Cr5j7vEm7ibvqI1ysl0dw2kYC2dZmBcM1OEoa5vKiL-fO3a_5DmcvljHFhCTcJGfknDZXvaSYT0q-WvBNkovFmlng2pHzADZr9qnUAQce68Qt3GOJfGaN0_5GOZwi5LvWS18oTNd6lhQmRsmeaftNErffs_3kvyDjMBij-4O43pOeZxSsTumtZG4GzGPHC7iSup4wH_HmsFblrtOR1g7h9HYa0y_HPAcJSDQFBz-Otay5_qZAVfK9M/3hm/Cih8BCGjTUCvNNijsxe_Ag/h5/e075LDtdyhZ2BL-h1TaOg_dRLTGz6oJb0FSwnoeEAwI) | To give by check:

clean_body: Cook County Medical Examiner’s Office has already recorded more than 1,000 homicides | | | Dear Team, Today, reporting that with a month left in the year, the Cook County Medical Examiner’s Office has already recorded more than 1,000 homicides, the highest annual number in nearly three decades. The majority of the homicides involved guns, and more than 90% of the victims were Black or Latino. In Washington, D.C., politicians use Chicago as a political punching bag—or worse, a punchline. They talk about gun violence here as abstract, a worst-case scenario, an example of what they never want to become. But on the ground in this city, this issue isn’t hypothetical. It isn’t a punchline. For everyone who calls Chicago home, gun violence is our lived reality. For families like mine, it’s deeply personal. While D.C. politicians will continue to invoke our city in their social media posts, fundraising emails, on the floors of Congress, and back in their districts, we in Chicago have a duty to keep reminding them: You are responsible. Every death from a gun in this city is a death that Washington chose not to prevent. And what’s happened to our city will happen to yours if you keep prioritizing your donors over real people’s lives—not just in Chicago, but in Oxford, Michigan, in Newtown, Connecticut, and in Parkland, Florida. A majority of guns used in Chicago crimes came from out of state. So long as federal gun laws and resources fall short, so too will our city’s attempts to end the rising tide of gun violence. To meet this moment, we need federal legislation that delivers long-overdue, comprehensive gun safety. And we need federal representation from Chicago that forces Washington politicians to understand what’s happening in our city—and what will happen to theirs—and rally them to action. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Peter, Last week's arguments before the Supreme Court in the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ case was the biggest threat we've seen to _Roe v. Wade_ in ages. And while a decision around this case won't be handed down soon, it is clear that abortion access is under serious threat. The only thing that can stop this is the Senate codifying _Roe_ into law, making abortion access the law of the land. To do that, however, the Senate would need to abolish the filibuster. And that's where we run into trouble: Kyrsten Sinema continues to refuse to abolish the filibuster, and is immovable in her stance when it comes to it — even when abortion access and people's lives are on the line. **[This is unacceptable, Peter. Will you please donate $3 or whatever you can now to fund on-the-ground organizers who will hold Kyrsten Sinema accountable? [View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztp1nfn7s2dr4plpobrrm0idf9d3a50mpk74lk3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3gm4ob6cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9jegpj2sbncjib9dljmaoj8djhc8rj2sj5e2pjcsthe9ibeddgm5ob1d1lcurrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb0pjmcsqr2pti6dj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

__****
****
I'm running for Governor of Georgia to stop Stacey Abrams and save our state.
__

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za185p4k7v10rlsf684ln9k3h59cupq1o4hc9mjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3gm4ob6cph2bs)

Friend,

I'm running for Governor of Georgia to stop Stacey Abrams and save our state.

We need bold conservative leadership to unite Georgia and stand up to the woke left.

**WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO:**

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdashpibt2pjctjeehpdob2d3hjbq3c0mri95kn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3gm4ob6cph2bs)

Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, and the liberal mob want to silence us and turn Georgia into a state that's more like California or New York.

_**Not on my watch.**_

As your Governor, I will:
* Completely eliminate the state income tax
* Crack down on crime and make our communities safe again
* Put parents in charge of their children's education
* Ensure the safest and securest elections in the country
* Stand up to the woke mob and radical left
* Fight back against Biden and his overreaching mandates

Career politicians say it can't be done, but with your support, we can **STOP STACEY** and send a clear message that Georgians** will never bow down** to the radicals or the liberal elite.

Bonnie and I are forever humbled by your support - and we're asking for your help again today.

Join me, and together we will **STOP STACEY** and **SAVE GEORGIA**.

_**Please rush a donation today:**_

_****[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR -> $200](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze3dikeksb199guvahjo95u98o2n63si89q0u5rg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3gm4ob6cph2bs)****_
_****_

_**_****[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR -> $100](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgvi5c6t0c2v1ukivhkvi1iv70qvosfleqt9n1qg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3gm4ob6cph2bs)****_**_
_**_****_**_

_**_**_****[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR -> $50](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zntldarc7stl388b4v66pbrdeav5ab0ji8jauop8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3gm4ob6cph2bs)****_**_**_

_**_**_**_****[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR -> $25](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ltmloms55jugbbkud9u0p7uaos9io7935nm2ro_rp22sh2s8i66pj0s3gm4ob6cph2bs)****_**_**_**_
God bless,

David Perdue
_Republican Candidate for Governor_

subject: Your answers impressed me!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](http://go.dscc.org/go/5901?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211206-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211206-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=2161%2E9716520%2EddpCV1)
---
Hi team -- I want you to know that I reviewed this community's past survey responses and was extremely impressed.

**That's why, after careful consideration and multiple conversations with our Senior Leadership Team, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Majority Strategy Group.**

The handful of folks in this group provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and are helping us finalize the Democratic Party's official strategy to defend and expand our Senate majority.

We were _only_ able to flip the Senate this year because of the strategic decisions you helped us make leading up to the 2020 elections. And I'm 100% confident your input will help us win again.

**[So please, click this link to accept my personal invitation right away.](http://go.dscc.org/go/5901?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211206-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211206-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=2161%2E9716520%2EddpCV1)**

_*To maintain the integrity of our data, we ask that you please do not share your link with non-members._

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
DSCC Executive Director

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2021-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=2161_9716520_ddpCV1&akid=2161%2E9716520%2EddpCV1)**.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: re: Anti-choice Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As Supreme Court justices consider Mississippi’s restrictive abortion
laws, the future of abortion access in this country remains uncertain. For
years, conservatives have fought to take away a person’s constitutionally
protected right to an abortion. And we can’t have a single Democrat
joining that fight.

In 2020, Justice Democrat Marie Newman defeated anti-choice Democrat Dan
Lipinski. And now, we’re backing Jessica Cisneros in her primary against
Henry Cuellar — the only Democrat who voted against codifying Roe v. Wade
into law.

No Democrat should oppose the right to reproductive health care. That’s
why we challenged Lipinski in 2020, and why, with your help, we’ll defeat
Cuellar. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86055?refcode=em20211206-20850&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=20850%2E1203867%2Eoap0nk ]If you agree that we need to retire anti-choice Democrats,
will you chip in $3 to help fuel our fight? Early voting to
defeat Cuellar starts in less than 70 days!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86055?refcode=em20211206-20850&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20850%2E1203867%2Eoap0nk ]Retire anti-choice Democrats

Defeating anti-choice Democrats like Lipinski and Cuellar is crucial, but
with the raging attacks on abortion access — it’s not enough.

As soon as Democrats took control of the Senate and President Biden took
office, we’ve said that Democrats must end the filibuster, pass
legislation to protect the right to safe and accessible abortion, and
expand the Supreme Court. But Democrats have let the status quo continue,
and we’re seeing the consequences right now.

We’re fighting to elect Democrats who will not only say they support a
person’s right to an abortion — but will take bold and immediate action to
back it up. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86055?refcode=em20211206-20850&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20850%2E1203867%2Eoap0nk ]Can you chip in $3 to power the campaigns
to defeat Cuellar and the corporate Democrats that have failed to protect
abortion rights?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86055?refcode=em20211206-20850&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20850%2E1203867%2Eoap0nk ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=20850%2E1203867%2Eoap0nk ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=20850%2E1203867%2Eoap0nk ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211206-20850-footer&t=1026&refcode2=20850_1203867_oap0nk&akid=20850%2E1203867%2Eoap0nk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=20850%2E1203867%2Eoap0nk

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Mitch McConnell HUMILIATED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **MCCONNELL: IT 'S GOING TO BE A "VERY GOOD ELECTION FOR REPUBLICANS"**
I need you to know: EVERYTHING just changed in the race for the Senate.

\-- Democrats are **TIED** in Wisconsin
\-- Democrats are **TIED** in Pennsylvania.
\-- Democrats are **TIED** in New Hampshire.

[**If we lose a SINGLE seat, our Senate Majority will crumble -- and McConnell knows it. But if we can outraise McConnell and Republicans nationwide, we could DEFEND our House Majority, build the BIGGEST Democratic Majorities in history, and deliver McConnell and his Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat -- and I 'm calling for 1,000 more gifts before my midnight deadline to pull it off. Can I count on you to ensure McConnell and his Republicans never -- NEVER -- regain power in Congress? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.) | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
2021 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP STATUS: PENDING
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_3-)
---

I need to be perfectly blunt:

Republicans have amassed MILLIONS to defeat us.

I know they will use every cent to slander Democrats with attack ads, chip away at our lead, and ruin our chance to win.

But I will not allow Republicans to outspend us and sabotage our shot to build the biggest Democratic Majorities in history.

**[That's why I need your help to go on the ATTACK before my midnight deadline. Can I count on your $3 in these final eight hours to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)**

Nancy

name: Izzi Levy
subject: JD Vance’s book is $12.35
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1630%2E3611125%2EwxOcvu ][IMG]

Folks,

JD Vance’s garbage book, Hillbilly Elegy, costs $12.35.

You can buy a copy to use as a coaster (or a doorstop, or a chew toy for
your dog), OR you can donate $12.35 to our campaign to flip Ohio blue and
expand the Senate majority.

While JD Vance pretends to be your average Ohioan, he couldn’t be more out
of touch. After years of working in Silicon Valley boardrooms, Vance’s
qualifications for the Senate include the backing of a $10 million super
PAC from billionaire Trump lackey Peter Thiel, and a record of bashing the
working class and even blaming them for their economic struggles.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6237?t=1014&amount=12.35&akid=1630%2E3611125%2EwxOcvu ]Can you donate $12.35 (or more!) to make sure JD Vance never becomes
the next Senator from Ohio?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6237?t=1015&amount=12.35&akid=1630%2E3611125%2EwxOcvu ]Donate $12.35
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6237?t=1016&amount=50&akid=1630%2E3611125%2EwxOcvu ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6237?t=1017&amount=100&akid=1630%2E3611125%2EwxOcvu ]Donate $100

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6237?t=1020&amount=25&akid=1630%2E3611125%2EwxOcvu ]Other Amount

Folks, you don’t need to read JD Vance’s book to hear him push dangerous
myths about the challenges facing working families in Ohio and around the
country -- his policies and rhetoric are proof that at the end of the day,
he only cares about making the rich richer.

There’s only one person in this race who we can trust to cut workers in on
the deal, and that’s Tim.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6237?t=1021&amount=25&akid=1630%2E3611125%2EwxOcvu ]A recent poll has us one point ahead of Vance -- but we’ve got to keep
our momentum! Can we count on you to chip in $12.35 -- the cost of JD
Vance’s garbage book -- to stop him and flip this Senate seat blue?

-- Izzi

| Friend, In case you missed it, Team Gail was on FIRE last week! The week started with Gail rolling out her newest endorsement: Linda McMahon, who served as Administrator of the U.S. Small Business Administration under President Donald Trump.
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
Gail then took her passion for New Hampshire businesses on the road, visiting with several local businesses to hear their concerns about the economy under Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chris Pappas.
---

| |
---
|
---
---
---
| |
---
| Following her endorsement and business tours, Gail rolled out her first coalition, ‘Business Leaders for Gail.’ Already at 28 members, the coalition is chaired by Jim Boyle, owner of Toyota of Portsmouth.

---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODM1MDQyNzA5NDAwNzIyMjU2JmM9aDZoMSZlPTAmYj04MjQxMTUyMTImZD1xM3A0cDNo.xXpUA-YX0jUFja7tu4Q3USDZu9pOOJGJXXUSMPz0BI4)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Gail ended her week on a high note with several exciting events. First, she welcomed Senator Tom Cotton back to New Hampshire as an invited speaker at Cheshire County’s ‘Christmas with Cotton’ event. Next she spent some time with New Hampshire’s college Republicans, speaking at both a Saint Anslem meeting and the New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans Annual State Address. It’s safe to say that things aren’t just heating up for Team Gail on the campaign trail, THEY’RE ON FIRE!

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, In case you missed it, Team Gail was on FIRE last week! The week started with Gail rolling out her newest endorsement: Linda McMahon, who served as Administrator of the U.S. Small Business Administration under President Donald Trump. | | | | | | Gail then took her passion for New Hampshire businesses on the road, visiting with several local businesses to hear their concerns about the economy under Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chris Pappas. | | | | | | Following her endorsement and business tours, Gail rolled out her first coalition, ‘Business Leaders for Gail.’ Already at 28 members, the coalition is chaired by Jim Boyle, owner of Toyota of Portsmouth. | | | | | | | | Gail ended her week on a high note with several exciting events. First, she welcomed Senator Tom Cotton back to New Hampshire as an invited speaker at Cheshire County’s ‘Christmas with Cotton’ event. Next she spent some time with New Hampshire’s college Republicans, speaking at both a Saint Anslem meeting and the New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans Annual State Address. It’s safe to say that things aren’t just heating up for Team Gail on the campaign trail, THEY’RE ON FIRE! | | | This coming week will be just as exciting and we can’t wait to share it with you. Sincerely, Team Gail | | | | | | | | | | Paid for By Gail Huff Brown for Congress | | PO Box (#600), Rye New Hampshire 03870 United States | | | ---|---|--- You received this email because you signed up on our website or made purchase from us.

name: Mark Meuser
subject: Here's why I'm continuing to fight against the vaccine mandates being pushed by Joe Biden and the left.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
I had to share it with you because I've not seen a single corporate media outlet cover it. |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=399cea1348884a1693a850b76f62db83&_e=CD3QdUUXUMBamjm0ysILCOpavShojSyLz_9a4lZgttefclnBbBlfMiBN4eSYXKcCTpvnBu3VcoyNalbPypVLsLYdSp_MZhT1ApmuBuBdIAfOulABK5EmYJO8Q5uT3jX2AwPbfOVXh64Wsw_CSkZTpRpFynj4jLtHzBLYDmNJIIek6oQyNCyljP42-dgqXrpQh78g8I8xCUO5G-Z1gQ5597qknNKvwA2twQpLz0z4IzhQikdniY7McXyam4_lHyMVmg9LTCdM0OdFpDGXNES9NDc1_rxvXP1UEtU3fiakjp1q_euVxzFgUfkhky3tDkO9NpgjWgW_T9_A_STvNYRchg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American -

Here's why I'm continuing to fight against the vaccine mandates being pushed by Joe Biden and the left.

Last night I came across a Freedom of Information Act report that shocked me. **I had to share it with you because I've not seen a single corporate media outlet cover it.**

**The FDA just released a report created by Pfizer in February 2021, showing that their Pfizer vaccine had killed 1,223 individuals. This report also shows that 270 women had _"spontaneous abortions"_ due to the vaccine.**

Additionally, it shows that over 10,000 people had a serious nervous system reaction to the vaccine.

I am sure we will be finding out more about this shocking Pfizer report over the next couple of days.

But, Fellow American, why is no one talking about this, and why haven't they taken these dangerous vaccines off the market?!

[** help mark stop vax mandates**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=399cea1348884a1693a850b76f62db83&_e=CD3QdUUXUMBamjm0ysILCOpavShojSyLz_9a4lZgttefclnBbBlfMiBN4eSYXKcCTpvnBu3VcoyNalbPypVLsLYdSp_MZhT1ApmuBuBdIAfOulABK5EmYJO8Q5uT3jX27wJlwV4BuQK3dG3akK6V19DGVRgIdYykPxzraLPaPNiAj1WlFj9-ru9NVxs2RMaBPliSlvcSDSslQGAkdpjaVUx9RgYWgM2g_o6hgiC6k_b5CcVTyp7FXe9aAjf3ykdUmnW85ll1LPR9GHwWIsL3kaLTvF0FFNJ9joTUEzPt6AHv_OAsiaSYw8Jp6oCcwyNEybCnBizlmyAdT2ag9N4eiw%3D%3D)
The fight against vaccine mandates is no longer just about medical freedom. **Now it's about protecting your health from a dangerous gene therapy disguised as a vaccine.**

I'm still fighting in the courts to make sure a mandate never becomes permanent, but we need to take back the Senate majority and block these before they even have a chance to get started.

[**I need your help to take back the Senate. Republicans only need one seat to return to power.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=399cea1348884a1693a850b76f62db83&_e=CD3QdUUXUMBamjm0ysILCOpavShojSyLz_9a4lZgttefclnBbBlfMiBN4eSYXKcCTpvnBu3VcoyNalbPypVLsLYdSp_MZhT1ApmuBuBdIAfOulABK5EmYJO8Q5uT3jX25lYCWEGkrHncIna6bJHK4LNVXh-tqblGXrTjWYxvNxkVReqDKb9pAeXI4juLxtwhLtvDQ2R9rruF3KW-c7PBjP4opIF9DKBOrES5qq6cUooZMc0zpj8BMIrsYvbZExglsgLPdc9fKC0VYF23K9R3vjIIFSa3xJLHZJGCHumOSUPJOVUZAHWvSujwAQgoKaLRiFqB4OK2l53PGTAom8E6Pw%3D%3D) Because I am running for the seat that was vacated by Kamala Harris, the Supreme Court has ruled that the day I win the election, I immediately become a United States Senator and end the 50/50 Senate. The fastest way to end the 50/50 Senate is through California.

[**Can you chip in $15 today to my campaign for Senate and my mission to block vaccine mandates?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=399cea1348884a1693a850b76f62db83&_e=CD3QdUUXUMBamjm0ysILCOpavShojSyLz_9a4lZgttefclnBbBlfMiBN4eSYXKcCTpvnBu3VcoyNalbPypVLsLYdSp_MZhT1ApmuBuBdIAfOulABK5EmYJO8Q5uT3jX2sitVNVKmqZzO7HUZM3yI4-A5WOSJJJK4lL73B7P9kakWPE9gD8iAXH6Kfn3ggeGaVjBvMiHHMygeIzTh3qtbb0YbQ1bYrEDKZMthQfEax1A7aDLKXNpQK969FHreCuWDrZReHGo0RUeeQbJQzNY3fa9LFRUSb7KsrFv8ZXKRMdtB_nLKcguHI5bK4HHwSguJYvmDOYs_j9pvv5XcNULdrg%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[**P.S.If you're as worried about this as I am, click here to download the report and read it for yourself.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=399cea1348884a1693a850b76f62db83&_e=CD3QdUUXUMBamjm0ysILCKPF1mu1kF7tk-z9IseZeZJIw6K8wPzeH0ndgs0KKcVVFuGL4ADeFF_nxJ1m2oWeevxHJzvUkKEQsseTb0_lV3H3QCg0X55v8EfULaIW1xwggQar5d9xzuryIDrcaiCt2O6lQnh5zrkhIyPiNaNJMNw0xbtlqQSq1c3HLEGbEYEIUUNf2LgpQ3CK_Ngy4zh26SmAtv8nN3DjntL_zNosflPZ1bXwxNu-nMNXVANsJmkzh--7MmxpT3qru6y542SdRwXBB3Io3YueeBF0ESIKfM8%3D)

[** HELP MARK WIN THIS RACE**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=399cea1348884a1693a850b76f62db83&_e=CD3QdUUXUMBamjm0ysILCOpavShojSyLz_9a4lZgttefclnBbBlfMiBN4eSYXKcCTpvnBu3VcoyNalbPypVLsLYdSp_MZhT1ApmuBuBdIAfOulABK5EmYJO8Q5uT3jX28yDNus_s9ObR6H5Rv0wLvH-WkFaJLbTISfu4C5LkJnm14ksTfzSQaael2RQg0upgE3nvuvuBVuLUXt4UJeld2rnqmB9_nfAER4Cag56kZ4OxBgqzL9tR4cenSc2ZbAXmLwqWbcKN2mjMLaG4xV_RV6NJdGC1GF8WUH5CxJuYuv7TJK81NY9Ni61OIqKwRpPwNW75SP7iK_2xRZ9HHZRcKg%3D%3D)

subject: This Week's Scoop Inside 👉
body:
Here's what you need to know
| **Did you miss what was said this week? Here’s the latest:**
---
| | It was an awkward National Christmas Tree Lighting Ceremony this year when President Biden took the stage two minutes after he was introduced. The confused crowd was told to applaud **again** after he finally appeared on stage.

#

Politico just reported that over the weekend Donald Trump and Madison Cawthorn convened a meeting at Mar-a-Lago focused on making sure their hand-picked candidate Ted Budd wins this Senate race.
They’re desperate to make sure their preferred far-right candidate wins this seat, and they have made clear they will do anything it takes to stop us.
Madison Cawthorn presented his own “Plan for North Carolina” about how they can install far-right candidates all across North Carolina, and it all hinges on our Senate race.
But Cheri Beasley and our grassroots movement can stop them. We must. We cannot allow a Donald Trump and Madison Cawthorn acolyte to win this seat and rubber stamp their radical, hateful agenda.
