From: "Jim Banks, Chairman"
Date: December 3, 2021 at 5:34:36 PM EST
Subject: This crisis won't fix itself

Fellow Conservative,

_Did you know 11 million illegal immigrants are suspected of living in the USA?_**_The influx of illegal immigration is a humanitarian crisis of Democrats’ own making. _**

_Despite having billions of dollars of supplies to build the wall already paid for, the Biden administration_** _STOPPED_** _all progress on the wall. _

_They issued calls for every immigrant worldwide to come during the campaign, claiming that none would be turned away. _

_That was a lie that could not be supported by our current immigration infrastructure. _

_And_** _NOW_** _their vaccine mandates have put_** _48% of Border Patrol agents’ jobs_** _at risk while those same agents must allow unvaccinated, covid-positive migrants into the country. _

_The radical left is choosing illegal immigrants before exceptional Americans who serve our Country as Border Patrol Agents. _

_Will you claim your_** _Finish The Wall Membership_** _today? These memberships are for our most dedicated supporters_**ONLY** _, conservatives who understand the crisis on our southern border won’t solve itself. _

_Your current_** _Finish The Wall Membership Status_** _is below:_

clean_body: Activate your Finish The Wall membership | | Fellow Conservative, Earlier this week, I wrote to you about a Finish The Wall Membership, but I heard nothing back. I was surprised to learn you didn’t take advantage of this opportunity, so I’m passing along my previous message once more. \----------Forwarded Message---------- From: "Jim Banks, Chairman" Date: December 3, 2021 at 5:34:36 PM EST Subject: This crisis won't fix itself Fellow Conservative, Did you know 11 million illegal immigrants are suspected of living in the USA?The influx of illegal immigration is a humanitarian crisis of Democrats’ own making. Despite having billions of dollars of supplies to build the wall already paid for, the Biden administration STOPPED all progress on the wall. They issued calls for every immigrant worldwide to come during the campaign, claiming that none would be turned away. That was a lie that could not be supported by our current immigration infrastructure. And NOW their vaccine mandates have put 48% of Border Patrol agents’ jobs at risk while those same agents must allow unvaccinated, covid-positive migrants into the country. The radical left is choosing illegal immigrants before exceptional Americans who serve our Country as Border Patrol Agents. Will you claim your Finish The Wall Membership today? These memberships are for our most dedicated supportersONLY , conservatives who understand the crisis on our southern border won’t solve itself. Last week, _Maryland Matters'_ Josh Kurtz reflected on conversations with Doug, writing: "Former state Attorney General Douglas F. Gansler highlighted his estimable environmental record as AG and touted his very lengthy plan to fight climate change. **He talks far more extensively about land use and development than any of the other Democratic candidates.** "
---
|
---
Then, Doug spoke before the New Harford Democratic Club meeting and caught up with long-time friend, former Senator Art Helton. clean_body: | | | | Our Campaign Store is GOING LIVE! Friend, Team Hageman is launching ourOnline Campaign Store! But, before we roll it out, I wanted YOU to get the first look! Check out our store NOW so you can show off your support for our movement to TAKE BACK Wyoming’s lone Congressional seat. The people of Wyoming deserve a representative that serves their needs, not the interests of powerful insiders in DC and Northern Virginia. America First Conservatives across our country deserve a Congress that fights for Trump-era policies. To say we are up against the goliath of DC and Northern Virginia insiders is an understatement. But, the momentum of this movement is UNDENIABLE. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman P.S. Make sure to get your orders in soon for arrival before Christmas! | | | |

name: Charles Booker
subject: Legalize cannabis.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

A few years ago, when I served in the Kentucky State House, I sponsored a
bill to legalize cannabis because I’m tired of seeing our communities
criminalized.

That’s why I’m happy to share that a few weeks ago, a former colleague of
mine in the State House, Rep. Kulkarni, pre-filed legislation to
decriminalize marijuana in Kentucky.

I’m proud that this critical work is being carried on in Kentucky, and I’m
ready to take this fight to decriminalize marijuana all the way to the
U.S. Senate in 2022. It’s time to get this done,
Peter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/legalize-cannabis?source=em20211206-1302&t=1001&akid=1302%2E346206%2EQiBKTU ]When I get to the Senate, I will file the legislation to finally
legalize cannabis, and will call it the Gatewood Galbraith Justice and
Healing Act — named after a Kentuckian who spent his life promoting the
legalization of cannabis. If you’re with me, will you please add your name
in support of this act?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/legalize-cannabis?source=em20211206-1302&t=1002&akid=1302%2E346206%2EQiBKTU ]Add your name

I’ve always believed that cannabis should be legal. It has been
criminalized as a way to destroy communities like mine — Black, brown,
working class — for way too long.

Our justice system is rooted in inequity and structural racism. Instead of
protecting our families, it has grown into a system of criminalizing the
poor, traumatizing people of color, and disrupting the prospects of true
healing for people who were criminalized for their pain. To this day, the
number of Black people incarcerated for small amounts of cannabis
possession far outweigh those of white people.

Legalizing cannabis isn’t just about righting a huge wrong. It is about
acknowledging our history, and accepting the approach we currently have is
contrary to our goals of a safer, healthier society.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/legalize-cannabis?source=em20211206-1302&t=1003&akid=1302%2E346206%2EQiBKTU ]If you agree with me,
Peter, please add your name to
this petition in support of cannabis legalization today.

Thank you,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211206-1302-footer&t=1004&refcode2=1302_346206_QiBKTU&akid=1302%2E346206%2EQiBKTU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1302%2E346206%2EQiBKTU

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
